quotes.text: The consciousness so attuned however is only a small portion of the individual's total consciousness. In your system it is now fashionable to refer to this as the ego. The psychological structures are indeed so imprinted. However they are also aware and conscious of huge portions of themselves that are not so imprinted. They are aware of themselves simultaneously as individuals imprinted so as to react within several systems.
quotes.translation: 如此调谐的意识，却只是个体整体意识的一小部分。在你们的系统中，如今流行将其称为"自我"。心理结构确实被如此铭印，但它们也同时觉察并意识到自身未被铭印的庞大面向。它们同时觉察到自身作为被铭印的个体，能在多个系统中做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The dreaming self as you conceive of it, however, is but a shadow of its own reality, for the dreaming self is a psychological point of reference and, in your terms, [of] continuity, that brings together all portions of your identity. Of its deeper nature, only the most developed are aware. It represents, in other words, one strong uniting facet of your entire identity. Its experiences are as vivid and its "personality" as rich -- in fact richer -- in context as the physical personality you know.
quotes.translation: 然而，你们所构想的梦境自我，不过是其自身实相的影子——因为梦境自我是一个心理参照点，用你们的话说，也是连续性的参照点，它汇聚了你身份的所有面向。只有最进化者才能觉察其更深层的本质。换言之，它代表了你整个身份中一个强大的统合面向。其体验之鲜活，其"人格"之丰富——事实上在情境中比你所知的物质人格更为丰富。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The individual, when it is time then, begins to see beyond temporal life, to open up dimensions of awareness that in your terms he or she could not afford while involved in the intense physical focus of normal adult life. Unfortunately the personality has no system of beliefs, as a rule, to support such an expansion. The natural therapies, both physical and mental, are denied. Drugs are often used as depressants, clouding the clarity of what seems to be distorted vision. This is one of the most creative, valuable aspects of your lives. Instead the old are made to feel useless in your society. Often of course they share this value judgment, and their experience within your communities has in no way prepared them to face subjective experience.
quotes.translation: 当时机成熟时，个体开始超越时间性生命，开启觉察的维度——用你们的话说，这是他在正常成人生活强烈物质聚焦中无法负担的。不幸的是，人格通常缺乏支持这种扩展的信念体系。自然疗法（包括生理与心理的）被否定。药物常被用作抑制剂，遮蔽了看似扭曲视野的清晰度。这是你们生命中最具创造力、最宝贵的面向之一。然而在你们社会中，老年人被视作无用。当然他们往往也认同这种价值判断，而他们在社群中的经历从未让他们准备好面对主观体验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) I told you once that there were pulses of activity in which you blinked off and on -- this applying even to atomic and subatomic particles.1 "You" assign as real -- present here and now -- only that activity that is your signal. "You" are not aware of the others. When people think in terms of one self, they of course identify with one body. You know that the cellular structure of it changes constantly. The body is at any given moment, however, a mass conglomeration of energy formed from that rich bank of probable activity. The body is not stable in the terms usually thought of. On deeper biological levels the cells straddle probabilities, and trigger responses. Consciousness rides upon and within the pulses mentioned earlier, and forms its own organizations of identity. Each probability -- probable only in relation to and from the standpoint of another probability -- is inviolate, however, in that it is not destroyed. Once formed, the pattern will follow its own nature.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）我曾告诉过你，存在活动的脉冲，在其中你忽隐忽现——这甚至适用于原子和亚原子粒子。¹"你"只将作为你信号的活动视为真实——存在于此时此地。"你"并未觉察其他活动。当人们以单一自我的概念思考时，他们自然认同于一个身体。但你知道其细胞结构不断变化。然而在任何给定时刻，身体都是由那个丰沛的可能活动库形成的能量聚合体。身体并非通常所认为的稳定。在更深的生物学层面，细胞跨越可能性，触发反应。意识乘载于前述脉冲之上与之内，形成其自身的身份组织。每个可能性——仅相对于另一可能性并从其立场而言是可能的——都是不可侵犯的，因为它不会被摧毁。一旦形成，模式将遵循其自身本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You can understand what is meant by saying that your consciousness fluctuates -- for each individual is aware of various intensities and concentrations. You are more alert, or, in your terms more conscious on some occasions than others. Now the same applies to these units of consciousness -- and to atoms, molecules, electrons, and other such phenomena. The world literally blinks off and on. This reality of fluctuation in no way bothers your own feeling of consistency, however. The "holes (spelled) of nonexistence" are plugged up by the process of selectivity. This process chooses significances then, again, around which experience is built, and around which "life" is felt. The very sensations of one kind of life then automatically set up barriers against other such "world-schemes" (hyphen) that do not correlate with their own.
quotes.translation: 你可以理解所谓意识波动之意——因为每个个体都觉察到各种强度与专注度。在某些场合你比在其他场合更警觉，或用你们的话说更清醒。现在同样适用于这些意识单位——以及原子、分子、电子和其他此类现象。世界确实在忽隐忽现。然而这种波动的实相丝毫不会干扰你自身的一致性感受。"不存在之空洞"被选择性过程填补。这个过程再次选择意义，围绕这些意义构建体验，并感受"生命"。一种生命的感受会自动对其他不相关的"世界方案"设置屏障。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: According to the intensity of the situation, now, another also desirable solution may be worked out in a probable reality. On an unconscious level you are aware of your probable selves, and they of you. You share the same psychic roots, and your joint yet separate dreams are available to "all of you." This does not mean that you are dreaming someone else's dream, any more than it means that twins, for example, do. It does mean that your probable selves and you share in a body of symbolism, background, and ability. The multistructured nature of the dream state allows for dream dramas in which probable selves do appear. They may appear as symbolically representing strong characteristics upon which they have focused, though you have ignored them.
quotes.translation: 根据情境的强度，另一种同样理想的解决方案可能在可能实相中被制定出来。在无意识层面，你觉察到你的可能自我，他们也觉察到你。你们共享相同的心理根源，你们共同却分离的梦境对"你们所有人"都是可用的。这并不意味着你在做别人的梦，正如这不意味着双胞胎在做彼此的梦。这确实意味着你的可能自我与你共享一套象征体系、背景和能力。梦境状态的多重结构允许出现可能自我参与其中的梦境戏剧。他们可能象征性地代表他们所专注的强烈特质——尽管你忽视了这些特质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 687
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (Intently:) I am saying that the individual self must become consciously aware of far more reality; that it must allow its recognition of identity to expand so that it includes previously unconscious knowledge. To do this you must understand, again, that man must move beyond the concepts of one god, one self, one body, one world, as these ideas are currently understood.5 You are now poised, in your terms, upon a threshold from which the race can go many ways. There are species of consciousness. Your species is in a time of change. There are potentials within the body's mechanisms, in your terms, not as yet used. Developed, they can immeasurably enrich the race, and bring it to levels of spiritual and psychic and physical fulfillment. If some changes are not made, the race as such will not endure.
quotes.translation: （专注地：）我说的是，个体自我必须有意识地觉察到远为更多的实相；它必须允许其对身份的认知扩展，使之包含先前无意识的知识。要做到这一点，你必须再次明白，人类必须超越单一神、单一自我、单一身体、单一世界的概念——正如这些观念目前被理解的那样。5 用你们的话来说，你们正站在一个门槛上，从这个门槛出发，人类可以走向许多方向。意识有不同种类。你们的物种正处于变革时期。用你们的话说，身体机制内存在着尚未被利用的潜能。如果这些潜能得到发展，它们将无可估量地丰富人类，并将其带到灵性、心灵和身体圆满的境界。如果不做出某些改变，人类这个物种将无法存续。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The CU's form all systems simultaneously. Having formed yours, and from their energy diversifying themselves into physical forms, they were aware of all of the probable variations from any given biological strain. There was never any straight line of development as, say, from reptiles to mammal, ape, and man. Instead there were great, still-continuing, infinitely rich parallel explosions of life forms and patterns in as many directions as possible. There were animal-men and man-animals, using your terms, that shared both time and space for many centuries.6 This is, as you all well know, a physical system in time. Here cells die and are replaced. Knowing their own indestructibility, the CU's within them simply change form, retaining however the identity of all the cells that they have been. (Intently:) While the cell dies physically, its inviolate nature is not betrayed. It is simply no longer physical.
quotes.translation: CU同时形成了所有系统。在形成了你们的系统，并从其能量中将自己多样化为物理形态之后，它们便觉察到了任何特定生物谱系的所有可能变异。从来没有任何直线式的发展，比如说，从爬行动物到哺乳动物、猿类再到人类。相反，存在着巨大的、仍在继续的、无限丰富的生命形式和模式的平行爆发，朝着尽可能多的方向展开。用你们的话说，存在着动物-人和人-动物，它们共享时间和空间长达数个世纪。6 正如你们所熟知的，这是一个时间中的物理系统。在这里，细胞会死亡并被替换。由于知道自身的不灭性，它们内部的CU只是改变形态，同时保留它们曾经所是的所有细胞的同一性。（专注地：）虽然细胞在物理上死亡，但其不可侵犯的本质并未被背叛。它只是不再具有物理形态。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Some individuals find themselves with memories of other lives, which are other days to the soul. Such persons then become aware of a greater consciousness reaching over those gaps, and realize that earthly experience can contain [among other things] a knowledge of existence in more than one body. Inherently then consciousness, affiliated with the flesh, can indeed carry such comprehensions. The mind of man as you know it shows at least the potential ability for handling a kind of memory with which you are usually not acquainted. This means that even biologically the species is equipped to deal with different sequences of time, while still manipulating within one particular time scheme. This also implies a far greater psychological richness -- quite possible, again, within corporal reality -- in which many levels of relationships can be handled. Such inner knowledge is inherent in the cells, and in ordinary terms of evolution is quite possible as a "future" development.
quotes.translation: 有些人发现自己拥有其他生命的记忆，这些生命对灵魂而言是其他的日子。这样的人于是意识到一种更伟大的意识跨越了那些间隙，并认识到尘世体验可以包含（除其他事物外）对不止一个身体中存在的认知。因此，与肉体相连的意识，本质上确实能够承载这样的理解。你们所知的人类心智至少显示出处理一种你们通常不熟悉的记忆的潜在能力。这意味着，即使在生物学上，这个物种也具备处理不同时间序列的能力，同时仍能在某一特定时间框架内运作。这也暗示了一种远为更大的心理丰富性——再次强调，这在肉体实相中是可能的——在这种丰富性中，许多层次的关系都可以被处理。这种内在知识是细胞固有的，并且用通常的进化术语来说，作为一种“未来”的发展是完全可能的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your experience of yourself marks the seeming boundaries of yourself. In a manner of speaking, I am one personality and one program or station. Ruburt is another. We have learned to be aware of each other* to communicate between stations, to affect each other's programs and to change each other's worlds. I do not speak alone to Ruburt and Joseph, for example, but my words go out to the world that you know. Still within your framework, Ruburt tunes in to another station, translates it and broadcasts the information. To do this, however, he has to alter his own consciousness, withdraw momentarily from the official station to bring in this one. That means tuning in to other portions of the psyche, as well as another kind of reality. The final translation of my material has to come through his organism, however, or it would be meaningless to you.
quotes.translation: 你对自己的体验标记了你自己的表面边界。打个比方说，我是一个人格和一个程序或电台。鲁柏是另一个。我们学会了彼此觉察*，在电台之间沟通，影响彼此的程序，并改变彼此的世界。例如，我并非只对鲁柏和约瑟说话，而是我的话传向你们所知的世界。然而，在你们的框架内，鲁柏调谐到另一个电台，翻译它，并广播这些信息。但要做到这一点，他必须改变自己的意识，暂时从官方电台抽身，以接入这个电台。这意味着要调谐到心灵的其他部分，以及另一种实相。然而，我资料的最终翻译必须通过他的有机体来完成，否则对你们来说将毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: (At a slower pace:) He is consciously entering into another room of the psyche, and also entering into the reality that corresponds to it. This brings the two experiences together so that they coincide. They are held, however, both separately and in joint focus. As a rule you use one particular level of awareness, and this correlates all of your conscious activities. I told you that the physical body itself was able to pick up other neurological messages beside those to which you usually react.8 Now let me add that when a certain proficiency is reached in alterations of consciousness, this allows you to become practically familiar with some of these other neurological messages. In such a way Ruburt is able to physically perceive what he is doing in his "library."
quotes.translation: （以较慢的语速：）他有意识地进入心灵的另一个房间，同时也进入与之对应的实相。这使两种体验结合在一起，使它们重合。然而，它们被同时分开和共同聚焦地保持着。通常，你使用一个特定的意识层面，这协调了你所有的有意识活动。我告诉过你，物理身体本身能够拾取除了你通常反应的那些神经信息之外的其他神经信息。8 现在让我补充一点：当意识改变达到一定熟练程度时，这允许你实际熟悉其中一些其他的神经信息。通过这种方式，鲁柏能够从物理上感知他在他的“图书馆”里所做的事情。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 715
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In a probable reality, a Ruburt and a Joseph now live there. In the world that you recognize as official, however, they moved into the hill house. To some extent both of them are aware of the inner processes involved in the final decision. I do not mean that they are simply familiar with the exterior thought processes involved, such as: "The hill house is better constructed," or "It has a fine view." I am speaking of deeper mechanisms of consideration (pause), in which correlations are made between interior and exterior realities. (Pause.) It is obvious that when you move from one place to another you make an alteration in space -- but you alter time as well, and you set into motion a certain psychological impetus that reaches out to affect everyone you know. (Long pause.) When a house is vacant all of the people in the neighborhood send out their own messages. To a certain extent any given inhabited area forms its own "entity." This applies to the smallest neighborhood4 and to the greatest nation. Such messages are often encountered in the dream state. Empty houses are psychic vacancies that yearn to be filled. When you move, you move into other portions of your own selfhood.5
quotes.translation: 在一个可能的实相中，一个鲁柏和一个约瑟现在住在那里。然而，在你们承认为官方的世界中，他们搬进了山丘上的房子。在某种程度上，他们两人都觉察到最终决定所涉及的内在过程。我并不是说他们仅仅熟悉所涉及的外在思维过程，例如：“山丘上的房子建造得更好，”或者“它有很好的视野。”我说的是更深层的考量机制（停顿），在这种机制中，内在实相与外在实相之间建立了关联。（停顿。）显然，当你从一个地方搬到另一个地方时，你改变了空间——但你也改变了时间，并且你启动了一种特定的心理动力，这种动力会向外延伸，影响你所认识的每一个人。（长停顿。）当一所房子空置时，附近的所有人都会发出他们自己的信息。在某种程度上，任何特定有人居住的区域都形成了它自己的“实体”。这适用于最小的社区4和最大的国家。这样的信息常常在梦境状态中被遇到。空房子是渴望被填满的心灵空缺。当你搬家时，你搬进了你自己存在中的其他部分。5
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 742
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In the same way you form events, often without being aware that you do so. It seems that events happen as it seems words are spoken. You were taught how to construct sentences in school, and you learned how to speak from your elders. You were involved with event-making before the time of your birth, however. The psyche forms events in the same way that the ocean forms waves -- except that the ocean's waves are confined to its surface or to its basin, while the psyche's events are instantly translated, and splash out into mass psychological reality. In waking life you meet the completed event, so to speak. You encounter events in the arena of waking consciousness. In the dream state, and at other levels of consciousness, you deal more directly with the formation of events. You are usually as unaware of this process as you are in normal practice of the ways in which you form your sentences, which seem to flow from you so automatically.
quotes.translation: 你们以同样的方式形成事件，却往往浑然不觉。事件的发生看似话语的说出那般自然。你们在学校被教导如何构建句子，从长辈那里学会说话。然而，在出生之前，你们就已参与事件的创造。心灵形成事件的方式，如同海洋形成波浪——只不过海洋的波浪局限于其表面或盆地，而心灵的事件则瞬间转化，飞溅入大众心理实相。在清醒生活中，你们可以说遭遇的是已完成的事件。你们在清醒意识的舞台上遇见事件。而在梦境状态及其他意识层面，你们更直接地处理事件的形成过程。你们通常对此过程毫无察觉，就像在日常实践中，你们对自己形成句子的方式——那些句子似乎自动从你们口中流出——也浑然不觉一样。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These are creative distortions on your part, directly related to specializations of consciousness that cut you off from the greater concourse existing at other levels between the species and the land. Again, consciousness everywhere pervades the universe, and is aware of all conditions. The balance of nature upon your planet is no chance occurrence, but the result of constant, instant computations on the part of each most minute consciousness, whether it forms part of a rock, a person, an animal, a plant. Each invisibly "holds space together," whatever its station. This is a cooperative venture. Your own consciousness has its particular unique qualities, in that like other comparatively long-lived species, you associate your identity with your form far more rigidly. Other kinds of consciousness "leap in and out of forms" with greatest leeway. There is a biological understanding that exists, for example, when one animal kills another one for food. The consciousness of the prey leaves its body under the impetus of a kind of stimulus unknown to you.
quotes.translation: 这些是你们自身创造性的扭曲，直接与意识的专门化有关，这种专门化切断了你们与物种和土地之间其他层面存在的更大交流。再次强调，意识无处不在，遍布宇宙，并知晓一切状况。你们星球上的自然平衡绝非偶然，而是每个最微小的意识——无论它构成岩石、人、动物还是植物的一部分——持续、即时计算的结果。每个意识都无形中"维系着空间"，无论其地位如何。这是一项合作事业。你们自己的意识有其独特的特质，与其他相对长寿的物种一样，你们更严格地将身份认同与形态绑定。其他类型的意识则能最大程度地自由"跃入跃出形态"。例如，当一种动物为了食物而杀死另一种动物时，存在着一种生物层面的理解。猎物的意识在一种你们未知的刺激推动下离开其身体。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I'm well aware of current scientific theories about the supposed separate functions of the two hemispheres of the brain: The left half is said to control logical activities like writing, while the right half is responsible for the intuitive artistic abilities. Perhaps -- but after all, writing can be intuitively based, and art can be logically produced. At least the whole brain (its hemispheres are connected deep within by the corpus callosum) must contain that necessary basic creative ability that may then be apportioned out -- but only to an extent, I think -- between the hemispheres. Barring physical injury/surgery, there must be more communication between its halves (via the corpus callosum) than the brain is given credit for. There's so much we don't know yet about the brain (let alone the mind!). What about telepathy between the hemispheres? I think the divisions charted for the brain so far may be too strict, that beliefs about such separations may get in the way of our perception of the brain's beautifully whole operation.
quotes.translation: 我很清楚当前关于大脑两个半球所谓独立功能的科学理论：据说左半球控制写作等逻辑活动，而右半球负责直觉艺术能力。也许吧——但毕竟，写作可以基于直觉，艺术也可以逻辑地产生。至少整个大脑（其半球通过深处的胼胝体相连）必定包含那种必要的基本创造能力，然后这种能力可能被分配——但我认为只是在一定程度上——到两个半球之间。除非有身体损伤或手术，否则两个半球之间（通过胼胝体）的交流一定比人们认为的要多得多。我们对大脑的了解还远远不够（更不用说心灵了！）。两个半球之间是否存在心灵感应？我认为目前为大脑划分的界限可能过于严格，关于这种分离的信念可能会妨碍我们感知大脑那美妙而完整的运作。

quotes.text: Actors visit casting agencies so that they know what plays need their services. In your dreams you visit "casting agencies." You are aware of the various plays being considered for physical production. In the dream state, then, often you familiarize yourself with dramas that are of a probable nature. If enough interest is shown, if enough actors apply, if enough resources are accumulated, the play will go on. When you are in other than your normally conscious state, you visit that creative inner agency in which all physical productions must have their beginning. You meet with others, who for their own reasons are interested in the same kind of drama. Following our analogy, the technicians, the actors, the writers all assemble -- only in this case the result will be a live event rather than a televised one. There are disaster films being planned, educational programs, religious dramas. All of these will be encountered in full-blown physical reality.
quotes.translation: 演员们会去试镜机构，以便了解哪些戏剧需要他们的服务。在梦中，你们也会去"试镜机构"。你们会了解到正在考虑进行物质制作的各种戏剧。因此，在梦境状态中，你们常常熟悉那些具有可能性质的戏剧。如果表现出足够的兴趣，如果有足够的演员申请，如果积累了足够的资源，这出戏就会上演。当你们处于正常意识状态之外时，你们会访问那个内在的创造性机构，所有物质制作都必须在那里开始。你们会与其他人会面，他们出于自己的原因对同一类型的戏剧感兴趣。按照我们的类比，技术人员、演员、作家都聚集在一起——只是在这种情况下，结果将是一个真实的事件，而不是一个电视节目。有灾难片在策划中，有教育节目，有宗教戏剧。所有这些都将在充分发展的物质实相中被遭遇。

quotes.text: It is obvious to most others that such paranoid views are not based on mass fact. (Pause.) Your President at that time, however, had at his command vast information, so that he was aware of many groups and organizations that did not agree with his policies. He used those as in other circumstances a paranoid might use the sight of a police car to convince himself that he was being pursued by the police, or the FBI or whatever. The President felt threatened -- and not only personally threatened, for he felt that the good for which he stood in his own mind was in peril (intently). And again, since the idealized good seemed too remote and difficult to achieve, any means was justified. Those who followed him, in the Cabinet and so forth, possessed the same kinds of characteristics to some degree or another.
quotes.translation: 对大多数人来说，这种偏执的观点显然并非基于大众事实。（停顿。）然而，你们当时的总统掌握着大量信息，因此他知道许多不赞同他政策的团体和组织。他利用这些，就像在其他情况下，一个偏执狂可能会利用看到警车来说服自己，他正被警察、联邦调查局或任何机构追捕。总统感到受到威胁——而且不仅仅是个人威胁，因为他觉得他所代表的美好事物正处于危险之中（专注地）。而且，再次强调，由于理想化的美好似乎过于遥远和难以实现，任何手段都被视为正当。那些追随他的人，在内阁等机构中，也在某种程度上拥有同样的特质。

quotes.text: Give us a moment.... You have taught yourselves to be aware of and to follow only certain portions of your own consciousnesses, so that mentally you consider certain subjects taboo. Thoughts of death and suffering are among those. In a species geared above all to the survival of the fittest, and the competition among species, then any touch of suffering or pain, or thoughts of death, become dishonorable, biologically shameful, cowardly, nearly insane. Life is to be pursued at all costs--not because it is innately meaningful, but because it is the only game going, and it is a game of chance at best. One life is all you have, and that one is everywhere beset by the threat of illness, disaster, and war--and if you escape such drastic circumstances, then you are still left with a life that is the result of no more than lifeless elements briefly coming into a consciousness and vitality that is bound to end.
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……你们已经教会自己只觉察和追随自己意识的某些部分，因此在心理上，你们认为某些主题是禁忌。死亡和痛苦的想法就在其中。在一个首要目标是适者生存、物种间竞争的物种中，任何对痛苦或疼痛的触碰，或死亡的想法，都变得不光彩、生物学上可耻、懦弱、近乎疯狂。生命要不惜一切代价去追求——不是因为生命本身有意义，而是因为它是唯一进行的游戏，而且充其量是一场机会游戏。你只有一次生命，而这一次生命处处受到疾病、灾难和战争的威胁——即使你逃脱了这些极端情况，你仍然只剩下一个生命，它不过是由无生命的元素短暂地组合成一种注定要终结的意识和活力。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: On a particular level however this makes little difference, because such communications are carried on constantly at subconscious levels, seldom reaching ego awareness, so that individuals are subconsciously conditioned--and underline subconsciously conditioned--therefore expecting, all unknown to the ego, such communications when certain chemical changes come about; since these chemical changes also occur for other reasons when these conditions occur, on a practical level communications will then most easily happen. These chemical changes without the proper subconscious focus point, will result in clairvoyance or telepathy strong enough on some occasions to be conscious. When the proper focus point is reached however, these communications will result in rapport between the living and that portion of personality essences, or so-called dead, who are still at least psychically connected with life on your field.
quotes.translation: 然而在某个特定层面上，这几乎无关紧要，因为这类沟通持续在潜意识层面进行，极少达到自我意识层面，因此个体在潜意识中被制约——强调潜意识中被制约——于是在自我全然不知的情况下，当某些化学变化发生时，便会期待这类沟通；由于这些化学变化在其他原因下也会发生，当这些条件出现时，在实际层面上，沟通便最容易发生。这些化学变化若缺乏适当的潜意识聚焦点，有时会导致足够强烈的通灵或心灵感应进入意识层面。然而当达到适当的聚焦点时，这些沟通将在生者与人格本质中仍与你场域的生命至少保持心灵联系的那部分（即所谓的死者）之间建立感应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （Seth said my special sensitivity to windy days during hay fever season, [and one I was well aware of], stemmed from an incident that took place while I was traveling to California with my parents when I was about three years old. [This would be about 1922.] On a windy day on the prairie, somewhere west of the Mississippi, but short of the West Coast, I stood by a hill with my parents. My mother and father were arguing loudly. Father threatened to leave my mother and my brother and me. My father also had hay fever. I had had attacks before, but after this incident I had hay fever each year. [I have always had it since I can consciously remember. ] When I remarked that my father had got rid of his hay fever, Seth said he gave it to me. Seth said this is a common occurrence in illnesses being passed about among a family group. I identified with my father out of fear, Seth went on, because he threatened to leave me and thus must be all powerful; and since my father had hay fever, I acquired hay fever as a mistaken sign of strength.
quotes.translation: （赛斯说我枯草热季节对刮风天的特殊敏感[我清楚意识到这一点]，源于我大约三岁时和父母去加利福尼亚旅行时发生的一件事。[大约是1922年。]在密西西比河以西但未到西海岸的某处草原上，一个刮风的日子，我和父母站在一座小山旁。我母亲和父亲大声争吵。父亲威胁要离开母亲、我和弟弟。我父亲也有枯草热。我之前发作过，但这件事之后我每年都患枯草热。[自从我有意识记忆以来就一直如此。]当我提到我父亲摆脱了枯草热时，赛斯说他把它给了我。赛斯说这在疾病在家庭群体中传递时很常见。赛斯继续说，出于恐惧我认同了父亲，因为他威胁要离开我，因此他必定是全能的；既然我父亲有枯草热，我便将枯草热作为力量的错误标志而获得。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These dreams go unrecognized by the conscious ego; but they do not go unrecorded by the inner self, and they therefore exist, and they form electromagnetic channels of their own to which--make that by which--the physical body itself is affected. The physical organism is constantly changed by all stimuli, whether or not the ego is aware of the stimuli. And it is affected by stimuli, whether or not science realizes that the particular stimuli even exists. Therefore, the physical organism reacts to this continuous unconscious Mental activity in the form of continuing dream experiences, whether or not the individual is awake or asleep. All of these realities go into the formation of the personality, and unless they are all understood the personality itself will remain a mystery.
quotes.translation: 这些梦不被意识自我所识别；但它们不会被内在自我所忽略，因此它们存在，并形成它们自己的电磁通道——通过这个通道——物质身体本身受到影响。无论自我是否意识到刺激，物质有机体都不断被所有刺激所改变。而且无论科学是否意识到特定刺激的存在，它都受到刺激的影响。因此，无论个体是醒着还是睡着，物质有机体都以持续梦体验的形式对这种持续的无意识心智活动做出反应。所有这些实相都参与人格的形成，除非它们全部被理解，否则人格本身将始终是个谜。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have told you that some portion of our sessions involves projection. The degree varies from session to session. There will be a time when Ruburt will project out of his body during sessions and remember what transpires while I speak through his body. When projections occur now he is not consciously aware of them. These things are not forced, you see. On other occasions we meet, so to speak. I will go into this perhaps soon, for there are the similarities here and significances, involving states of consciousness used by both Ruburt and myself, and the type of projection achieved. These have bearing on the clearness or undistorted nature of the material. Less satisfactory projections cause distortions, you see, that are characteristic features of this state of consciousness at that time.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你们，我们课程的部分内容涉及投射。投射程度因课程而异。会有那么一个时候，鲁柏会在课程期间投射出他的身体，并记住当我通过他的身体说话时所发生的事情。现在当投射发生时，他并没有有意识地意识到它们。你看，这些事情不是强求的。在其他场合，我们可以说会面。我可能很快会深入探讨这一点，因为这里存在相似性和重要性，涉及鲁柏和我所使用的意识状态，以及所达到的投射类型。这些与材料的清晰度或未扭曲性质有关。你看，不太令人满意的投射会导致扭曲，这是该意识状态在那个时期的特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There was a severe difficulty here. You were indeed conceived. There was a difficulty in the lung area. It had to do with a circulatory ailment that manifested later and should be checked. A circulatory trouble involving extremities. There was no awareness of this on the part of your mother, but the difficulty in her own condition partially caused it, a low blood count and circulatory difficulty in her own condition. She did not realize this had any effect on the child...a difficulty, minor enough, in the lumbar region and fourth vertebra. The condition would have recurring tendencies perhaps in February, April and September but would not be pleurisy. Warm salt pads applied to the extremities would be a benefit and also on the fourth vertebra. I will shortly leave you. I extend to you all my best wishes and if I sound severe it is only that I would wake you up to your full potentials and I speak to the part of yourself to which you are not listening.
quotes.translation: 这里有一个严重的困难。你确实被怀上了。肺部区域有一个困难。它与后来显现的循环系统疾病有关，应该检查一下。涉及四肢的循环系统问题。你母亲对此毫无察觉，但她自身状况中的困难部分导致了这个问题——她自身状况中的低血细胞计数和循环系统困难。她没有意识到这对孩子有任何影响……腰椎区域和第四节脊椎有一个足够轻微的困难。这种情况可能在二月、四月和九月有复发倾向，但不会是胸膜炎。在四肢上敷温盐包会有好处，在第四节脊椎上也是如此。我很快就要离开你们了。我向你们所有人致以最良好的祝愿，如果我听起来严厉，那只是因为我希望唤醒你们发挥全部潜能，而我在对你们自身中你们没有倾听的那部分说话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is simplified. Consciously you deal with those problems of one given physical life. Consciously you are not aware of what you call reincarnations, though these occur within your own system. Now these are not separate existences at all. They only appear so to you. Your earth identity (smile) in singular terms, is one existence. When you sleep at night and awaken, you do not suppose yourself a new personality, or imagine that you have died during the night. This is what you do when you imagine that you have several existences as different people. Your real existence, even within your system, is too much for you to deal with in conscious terms, therefore the seeming segments. You know you live these seemingly different lives simultaneously, as you gain development, but it is always you gaining development in a variety of roles. I stress therefore that unity. It is only because consciously you do not realize the unity that the various reincarnations seem so diverse and separate.
quotes.translation: 这是简化的说法。有意识层面，你处理某一特定物质生命的问题。有意识层面，你并不知道你所谓的转世，尽管这些发生在你自己的系统内。现在这些根本不是独立的存在。它们对你来说只是看起来如此。你的地球身份（微笑）以单数形式来说，是一个存在。当你晚上睡觉并醒来时，你不会认为自己是一个新的人格，或想象自己在夜间死去了。这就是当你想象自己作为不同的人拥有多个存在时所做的事情。你真实的存在，即使在你自己的系统内，也太多以至于你无法以有意识的术语来处理，因此才有了看似分割的部分。随着你获得发展，你知道自己同时经历这些看似不同的生命，但始终是你在各种角色中获得发展。因此我强调那个统一性。仅仅因为有意识层面你没有意识到这个统一性，各种转世才显得如此多样和分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You must become more aware of your inner selves.... They are not all that horrible. You still fear, as our Lady of Venice, that there is a cellar door... a cellar door to your mind--to your inner self. And, if you open it, all sorts of demons will emerge. And if there are any angels, the demons will gobble them up before you get to see them. Instead, I tell you, as I have told you before, you are more than you know. And it is up to you to find your own reality. I cannot give it to you. I can point you in the direction... but the experience is personal and the experience is subjective and the journey is one that you must make and that you must make alone. I cannot make it for you. I have my own journeys to make... and detours here. And any problems that you have I have had them... so look at me and know how indestructible you are!
quotes.translation: 你必须更加觉察自己的内在自我……它们并非那么可怕。你仍像我们的威尼斯女士那样，害怕有一扇地窖门——通往你心灵、通往你内在自我的地窖门。你若打开它，各种恶魔便会涌现。即便有天使存在，恶魔也会在你见到它们之前将其吞噬。相反，我告诉你，正如我先前告诉你的，你比你所知的更伟大。发现你自己的实相，取决于你。我无法将它赐予你。我可以为你指明方向……但体验是个人化的，体验是主观的，这段旅程必须由你亲自完成，而且必须独自完成。我无法代你完成。我有自己的旅程要走……以及此处的迂回之路。你所遇到的任何问题，我都曾经历过……所以看着我，明白你是多么坚不可摧！
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Many of the old ideas of precivilization come closer to anything near the truth. What you prefer to think of as God is basically and above all, indeed as I have said, an infinite energy gestalt: or pyramid consciousness. It is aware of itself as being, for example, you, Joseph. It is aware of itself as what seems to you as your own future and past selves.
quotes.translation: 许多前文明时期的古老观念更接近真相。你倾向于称之为神的东西，根本上且首要地，正如我所说，是一种无限能量完形：或金字塔意识。它觉察到自身即是，例如，你，约瑟夫。它觉察到自身即是那些在你看来属于你自己未来与过去自我的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Hypnotism is a safer method to begin with than drugs, but hypnotism itself is not necessary if there is an inner willingness to explore the inner universe. The main barrier is the ego's fear of being subjugated, even as it fears subjugation imagined in death. If the ego can be made to understand that inner awareness, exploration and investigation will actually enlarge its scope of awareness there will be little difficulty.
quotes.translation: 催眠是比药物更安全的入门方法，但若内心有探索内在宇宙的意愿，催眠本身并非必需。主要障碍在于自我害怕被征服，正如它害怕在死亡中想象出的被征服。若能让自我理解到，内在觉察、探索与调查实际上会扩展其觉察范围，那么便几乎不会遇到困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: What is required is a steady maintenance of identity, under conditions which will be new as far as your conscious awareness is concerned. In the cases about which we have been speaking, I cannot emphasize too strongly that actual projection into other dimensions occurs. Many such instances are often considered mad dreams, because there is no way to check against physical events. The events never happened in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 所需的是在意识觉察所面临的新条件下，稳定维持身份认同。在我们讨论的案例中，我无论如何强调都不为过：实际投射到其他维度确实发生。许多此类实例常被视为疯狂的梦境，因为无法对照物理事件进行验证。这些事件从未在物质层面发生过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: New paragraph: Consciousness then is not dependent upon physical perception, though this attribute does require an awareness immersed within a material form. While physical consciousness is sifted through the bodily apparatus, you are usually unaware of noncorporeal kinds because of that process. The general framework, properties and characteristics of the body exist, therefore, before its formation. In simple terms, you choose ahead of time the kind of body you will inhabit and impress. It may seem to you that you do not have any conscious control over your body's condition in life as you know it, much less before your birth. You have been taught that there is little connection between your thought and your body's activities.
quotes.translation: 新段落：意识并不依赖物质感知，尽管这一属性确实需要沉浸于物质形态中的觉察。当物质意识通过身体装置过滤时，你通常因这一过程而觉察不到非肉体的意识种类。因此，身体的一般框架、属性与特征在其形成之前就已存在。简单来说，你提前选择了你将居住并铭印的身体类型。在你所知的生命中，你或许觉得自己对身体状况没有任何有意识的控制，更不用说在出生之前了。你被教导说，你的思想与身体活动之间几乎没有关联。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Each character, however, or portion of a scene, would represent in fragmented form another quite valid program [or reality, in brackets]. In the dream state, then, you are sometimes aware of too many stations. When you try to make them fit into your recognized picture of reality, they may seem chaotic. There are ways to bring the picture into focus: There are ways to tune into those other quite-natural frequencies, so that they present you with a more expansive view both of the world as you define it, and of its greater aspects. Period. The psyche is not encased, in your case (amused), within a frame too fragile to express it. Only your beliefs about the psyche and about the body limit your experience to its present degree.
quotes.translation: 然而，每个角色或场景片段，都会以碎片化的形式代表另一个同样有效的程序[或实相，括号内]。因此，在梦境状态中，你有时会觉察到太多频道。当你试图让它们符合你认可的实相画面时，它们可能显得混乱。有方法能让画面聚焦：有方法能调谐到那些同样自然的频率，使它们为你呈现更广阔的视野，既包括你定义的世界，也包括其更宏大的面向。句号。就你而言（忍俊不禁），心灵并非被禁锢在过于脆弱而无法表达它的框架内。只有你对心灵和身体的信念，才将你的体验限制在目前的程度。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: Since suggestion is used constantly, and by every cell in your body, then it is not a question of whether or not you can use suggestion, but of how to use it more effectively. And this will involve a balanced personality, for in such a personality action will be allowed freedom of expression. The ego will gain and not lose in the process, but we will not have an autocratic and willful ego, but a reasonable and even disciplined ego that is aware of its position, aware of its own dependency, as well as of its own peculiar and unique perceptive apartness. For the apartness is dependent upon its being a part of the whole gestalt.
quotes.translation: 由于暗示被持续使用，且被你身体的每个细胞使用，因此问题不在于你是否能使用暗示，而在于如何更有效地使用它。这将涉及一个平衡的人格，因为在这种人格中，行动将被允许自由表达。自我在此过程中将获得而非失去，但我们不会拥有一个专横任性的自我，而是一个理性甚至自律的自我，它意识到自己的位置，意识到自己的依赖性，也意识到自己独特而与众不同的感知分离性。因为这种分离性依赖于它是整体完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If you remember that beneath all, each unit of consciousness is aware of the position of each other unit, and that these units form all physical matter, then perhaps you can intuitively follow what I mean, for whatever knowledge man attains, whatever experience any one person accumulates, whatever arts or sciences you produce, all such information is instantly perceived at other levels of activity by each of the other units of consciousness that compose physical reality--whether those units form the shape of a rock, a raindrop, an apple, a cat, a frog or a shoe. Manufactured products are also composed of atoms and molecules that ride upon units of consciousness transformed into EE units, and hence into physical elements.
quotes.translation: 如果你记得在一切之下，每个意识单位都知晓其他每个单位的位置，并且这些单位构成了所有物质，那么你或许能凭直觉理解我的意思。因为无论人类获得何种知识，无论任何人积累何种经验，无论你们创造何种艺术或科学，所有这些信息都会立即被构成物质实相的其他每个意识单位在其他活动层面所感知——无论这些单位是构成岩石、雨滴、苹果、猫、青蛙还是鞋子的形状。人造产品也由原子和分子组成，这些原子和分子承载着转化为EE单位的意识单位，进而转化为物理元素。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (To me, loudly:) "You are still learning. Your work is still developing. How truly unfortunate you would be if that were not the case! There is always a kind of artistic dissatisfaction that any true artist feels with work that is completed, for he is always aware of the tug and pull, and the tension, between the sensed ideal and its manifestation. In a certain fashion the artist is looking for a creative solution to a sensed but never clearly stated problem or challenge, and it is an adventure that is literally unending. It must be one that has no clearly stated destination, in usual terms. In the most basic of ways, the artist cannot say where he is going, for if he knows ahead of time he is not creating but copying.
quotes.translation: （对我，大声地：）“你仍在学习。你的工作仍在发展。如果情况并非如此，那该是多么不幸！任何真正的艺术家对已完成的作品总会感到一种艺术上的不满，因为他始终意识到感知到的理想与其显现之间的拉扯、牵引和张力。从某种方式来看，艺术家是在寻找一个创造性解决方案，以应对一个被感知但从未明确陈述的问题或挑战，这是一场永无止境的冒险。用通常的话说，它必须是一个没有明确陈述目的地的冒险。在最基本的方式上，艺术家无法说出他要去哪里，因为如果他事先知道，他就是在复制而非创造。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Throughout the ages some have recognized the fact that there is self consciousness and purpose in certain dream and sleep states, and have maintained, even in waking life, the sense of continuity of this inner self. To such people it is no longer possible to identify completely with the ego consciousness. They are too obviously aware of themselves as more. When such knowledge is gained, the ego can accept it, for it finds to its surprise that it is not less conscious, but more conscious, that its limitations are dissipated; now it is not true, and I emphasize this strongly, that so-called unconscious material, given any freedom, will draw energy away from the egotistically organized self in a normal personality.
quotes.translation: 自古以来，有些人已经认识到在某些梦境和睡眠状态中存在自我意识和目的，甚至在清醒生活中也保持了这种内在自我的连续性感。对这些人来说，完全认同自我意识已不再可能。他们太明显地意识到自己远不止于此。当获得这种知识时，自我能够接受它，因为它惊讶地发现，自己并非意识更少，而是意识更多，其局限性被消散；现在，我强烈强调这一点，所谓的无意识材料，如果被给予任何自由，并不会从正常人格中由自我组织起来的自我那里抽走能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: （I would like to note here that one night during the second week in December, possibly around the 11th or 12th, I awoke out of a sound sleep to become aware that both arms and hands were involved in my rather familiar sensation of enlargement and of elevation. The feeling of enlargement centers mainly on the tops of the limbs, as though they were swelling, and is not to be confused with the overall thrilling or tingling sensation I often refer to. I have now experienced both sensations many times. As far as I can consciously recall, this instances is the first I have experienced upon coming out of a sleep. I was lying upon my back at the time, and this is the position I use while trying psychological time.
quotes.translation: （我想在此注明，在十二月的第二周的一个晚上，可能是11日或12日左右，我从沉睡中醒来，意识到双臂和双手都卷入了我相当熟悉的膨胀和提升感中。膨胀感主要集中在四肢的顶端，仿佛它们在肿胀，不要与我常提到的整体震颤或刺痛感混淆。我现在多次体验过这两种感觉。就我有意识地回忆而言，这次是我从睡眠中醒来时第一次体验到。当时我仰卧着，这也是我尝试心理时间时使用的姿势。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego is not as a rule aware of this broader time experience. The subconscious however is so aware, and the associative processes of the mind can, and do, react to a future event, while the ego is closed off to it. Therefore it is possible for Frederick, this year, to become ill at the smell of a particular perfume because subconsciously he knows that in 1980 his mother will be wearing that perfume when she dies.
quotes.translation: 自我通常意识不到这种更广泛的时间体验。然而，潜意识是意识到的，心灵的联想过程能够并且确实会对未来事件做出反应，而自我对此是封闭的。因此，弗雷德里克今年有可能因为闻到某种特定香水的气味而生病，因为潜意识知道，在1980年，他母亲去世时会穿着那种香水。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You might feel as if you are crossing your wires, so to speak, or stretching vaguely sensed psychic muscles. The purpose is not so much the perfect execution of such exercises as it is to involve you in a different mode of experience and of awareness that comes into being as you perform in the ways suggested. You have been taught not to mix, say, waking and dreaming conditions, not to daydream. You have been taught to focus all of your attention clearly, ambitiously, energetically in a particular way -- so daydreaming, or mixing and matching modes of consciousness, appears passive in a derogatory fashion, or nonactive, or idle. (Louder:) "The devil finds work for idle hands" -- an old Christian dictum.
quotes.translation: 可以说，你可能会感觉像在交叉你的线路，或是在伸展模糊感知到的灵性肌肉。目的不在于完美执行这些练习，而在于让你在按建议方式行动时，进入一种不同的体验与觉知模式。你被教导不要混合清醒与做梦状态，不要做白日梦。你被教导要以特定方式清晰、进取、充满活力地集中所有注意力——因此，白日梦或混合搭配意识模式，在贬义上显得被动、不活跃或无所事事。（大声地：）“魔鬼为游手好闲者找事做”——一句古老的基督教格言。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This sort of experience involves a sudden psychic awareness, straight from the entity, that all boundaries are for practical purposes only. However, there are indeed many kinds of science. There are a number of sciences dealing just with locomotion. Had the human species gone into certain mental disciplines as thoroughly as it has explored technological disciplines, its practical transportation system would be vastly different, and yet by this time even more practical than it is now. (With amusement:) I am making this point because I want it made plain -- this, dear Joseph, is a pun -- that when I speak of science on another plane I may not speak of the plain old science that you know.
quotes.translation: 这类体验涉及一种来自存有的突然灵性觉知，即所有界限仅为实用目的而存在。然而，确实存在多种科学。有几种科学仅涉及运动。如果人类物种像探索技术学科那样彻底地投入某些心智训练，其实用交通系统将大不相同，但到此时甚至会比现在更实用。（带着幽默：）我提这一点是因为我想说清楚——亲爱的约瑟夫，这是个双关语——当我谈论另一层面的科学时，我可能不是在谈论你所知的普通旧科学。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now our friend here (Virginia) is telepathically aware of most of your inner activities, and it is in a large part through her also that there is an expansion of psychic activity from the two of you outward. This is not immediately obvious. She does not have her guard up as high. Also however she is not as adventurous, for it is after all your endeavor: you carry the main issues and personal involvement. The symbols will give way to other symbols. There are roads within the roads, and rooms within the rooms, and wholes within the wholes. But we do not want you to get lost within the mazes, and so we are giving you maps, and when you get where you are going you no longer need the maps.
quotes.translation: 现在，我们这位朋友（弗吉尼亚）通过心灵感应觉知到你们大部分内在活动，很大程度上也是通过她，你们两人的灵性活动得以向外扩展。这并非立即显而易见。她的防备没那么高。然而，她也不那么冒险，因为毕竟这是你们的努力：你们承担主要议题和个人参与。符号会让位于其他符号。路中有路，室中有室，整体中有整体。但我们不想让你们在迷宫中迷失，所以我们给你们地图，当你们到达目的地时，就不再需要地图了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: They were mine definitely. No control personality for example of any kind. But where I got the words; or what inner translations happened before I spoke them, I don't know. I wasn't aware of the original perceptions, in other words. There was no hesitancy and little groping around. Giving test data in the sessions, there are translations that I make and I am careful, trying to interpret what I get; here, the interpretations were already made; at a subconscious level? Presumably.
quotes.translation: 它们确实是我的。例如，没有任何控制人格。但我在说话前，这些词从何而来，或发生了何种内在翻译，我不知道。换句话说，我没有意识到原始感知。没有犹豫，也几乎无需摸索。在课程中提供测试数据时，我会进行翻译并小心翼翼，试图解读我得到的东西；而在这里，翻译已经完成；在潜意识层面？大概如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am a personified energy source -- but so are you. I have had many lives, in your terms, yet in other terms I have not lived physically, but rather lent or loaned my energy to lives that rose from my reality but were not me. In the same way you give birth to dream images of your own -- hardly aware that you have done so, unconscious of the fact that you have provided impetus for a kind of psychological reality that quite escapes your notice. The dream stories you begin continue on their own. No dream is stillborn. Each chapter of this book is written in such a way that the ideas presented will activate your own intuitions, and open pathways between your dreaming and waking states.
quotes.translation: 我是一个人格化的能量源——但你们也是。以你们的说法，我经历过许多世，但从其他角度，我并未以物质方式生活，而是将我的能量借出或贷给那些源于我的实相却非我本身的生命。同样，你们生出自己的梦境影像——几乎未意识到自己已这样做，未意识到你们为一种完全逃过你们注意的心理实相提供了动力。你们开始的梦境故事会自行继续。没有梦境是死产的。本书每一章的写作方式，旨在激活你们自己的直觉，并打开你们做梦与清醒状态之间的通道。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of this also applies to the animals to varying degrees. Even in animal groups, individuals are not only concerned with personal survival, but with the survival of "family" members. Each individual in an animal group is aware of the others' situations. The expression of love is not confined to your own species, therefore, nor is tenderness, loyalty, or concern. Love indeed does have its own language -- a basic nonverbal one with deep biological connotations. It is the initial basic language from which all others spring, for all languages' purposes rise from those qualities natural to love's expression -- the desire to communicate, create, explore, and to join with the beloved.
quotes.translation: 所有这些也适用于动物，程度不同。即使在动物群体中，个体不仅关心个人生存，也关心“家族”成员的生存。动物群体中的每个个体都意识到其他个体的状况。因此，爱的表达并不局限于你们自己的物种，温柔、忠诚或关怀亦然。爱确实有其自己的语言——一种具有深层生物学含义的基本非语言语言。它是所有其他语言从中涌现的初始基本语言，因为所有语言的目的都源于爱之表达的自然特质——渴望沟通、创造、探索，以及与所爱者结合。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The barrier, if it may be so called, is not so much in the nature of the two dimensions themselves, but in your own limitations, since presently you are focused mainly in one of these. Until a certain area of psychic development is attained, awareness, or rather direct awareness, is only possible in one dimension at a time, though experience in other dimensions in varying degrees may be received separately.
quotes.translation: 所谓屏障，与其说存在于两个维度本身的本质中，不如说存在于你自身的局限里——因为目前你主要聚焦于其中一个维度。在达到特定心灵发展阶段之前，觉知（或更确切地说，直接觉知）每次只能在一个维度中运作，尽管其他维度的体验可能以不同程度被分别接收。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The cells are not inferior as far as you are concerned, even though they form part of the structure of your physical being. They are not even less conscious. (Emphatically:) They are conscious in a different fashion. There is no need to "romanticize" them, or to think of them as little people, but each of them possesses a highly focused consciousness, and a consciousness of self. You like to think -- again -- that only your own species possesses an awareness of its own selfhood. There are different kinds of selfhood, and an infinite variety of ways to experience self-awareness.
quotes.translation: 就你而言，细胞并不低等，即便它们构成你物质身体结构的一部分。它们甚至并非更不具意识。（强调地：）它们以不同方式具有意识。无需"浪漫化"它们，或视其为小人儿，但每个细胞都拥有高度聚焦的意识，以及自我意识。你再次倾向于认为——只有人类物种才拥有对自身自我性的觉知。实则存在不同种类的自我性，以及体验自我觉知的无限多样方式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Emotions take up a certain amount of what we call psychic space within the personality's awareness. As the intensity of the emotion fades, so it seems to you that it recedes in time. But this is an illusion caused by the limitations of your outer senses. Now. In the dream state the outer senses are to a large degree restrained in their activity. Therefore the dream state more clearly represents the actual nature of time. Intense emotions within the dream state are experienced as present time, and the personality moves easily through these emotional intensities without experiencing the sense of passing time, although any given dream may contain within it its own time element.
quotes.translation: 情绪在人格觉知中占据特定量的所谓心灵空间。当情绪强度减弱时，你便觉得它随时间消退。但这只是由外在感官局限造成的幻象。现在。在梦境状态中，外在感官的活动受到极大限制。因此梦境状态更清晰地呈现时间的真实本质。梦境中的强烈情绪被体验为当下时刻，人格在这些情绪强度中自如移动，却感受不到时间流逝，尽管任何特定梦境都可能包含其自身的时间元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: One animal chasing and killing its prey serves the greater purpose of preserving the balance of nature, whether or not the animal is aware of this -- and again, the animal's intent is not evil. Man consumes ideas. In so doing he contributes to a different kind of balance, of which he is usually unaware. But no man truly acts out of the pure intent to do wrong, or to be vicious. Storms rend the summer sky, sending forth thunder and lightning. Earthquakes may ravage the countryside. You may deeply regret the havoc worked, knowing that neither the storm nor the earthquake is evil. Not only did they have no wrong intent, but the overall condition corrected the earth's balance.
quotes.translation: 动物追逐捕杀猎物，无论其是否意识到，都在服务维持自然平衡的更高目的——再次强调，动物的意图并非邪恶。人类消费思想。在此过程中，他们为另一种通常不自知的平衡做出贡献。但无人真正出于纯粹作恶或行凶的意图行事。暴风雨撕裂夏日天空，释放雷电。地震可能蹂躏乡野。你或许深憾其造成的破坏，却知暴风雨与地震皆非邪恶。它们不仅没有错误意图，而且整体状况修正了地球的平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am aware of you in many ways through Ruburt's nervous system. I am aware of you as human forms and physical entities. Through him I am aware of you as material three-dimensional forms. This is almost a second handed experience for me, however, and never too clear.
quotes.translation: 我通过鲁柏的神经系统以多种方式觉知你们。我觉知你们为人类形态与物质实体。通过他，我觉知你们为三维物质形态。然而这对我而言几乎是二手经验，且从未清晰过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Consciousness is not made up of balances so much as it is made up of exquisite imbalances, and the focus of awareness is to some degree the result of this state of excitability. In this state all elements are never known because new ones are always being created. I am not speaking of physical elements, but of the psychological characteristics of consciousness, for even those continually merge and change.
quotes.translation: 与其说意识由平衡构成，不如说它由精妙的不平衡构成，而觉知的焦点在某种程度上正是这种兴奋状态的结果。在此状态中，所有元素永不可知，因为新元素不断被创造。我并非指物质元素，而是指意识的心理特征——因为即便是这些特征也在持续融合与变化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Entities or souls, in other words, send out portions of themselves to open up avenues of reality that would not exist otherwise. (Long pause at 9:39.) The three-dimensional selves, in existing within these realities, must focus their attention there completely. An inner awareness gives them a source of energy and strength. They must, however, come to understand their roles as actors, "finally" from their roles, and through another act of comprehension, return to the entity.
quotes.translation: 换言之，存有或灵魂会派出自身的一部分，去开辟原本不存在的实相途径。（9点39分长停顿）三维自我在存在于这些实相中时，必须将注意力完全聚焦于此。内在觉知赋予它们能量与力量的源泉。然而，它们必须理解自己作为演员的角色，"最终"从角色中抽离，并通过另一层领悟，回归存有。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now your own physical image is the materialization of your idea of yourself within the properties of matter. Without the idea of yourself, your physical image would not be; yet often it is all you are aware of. The initial power and energy of that idea of yourself keeps your image alive. Ideas, then, are far more important than you realize. If you will try to accept the idea that your own existence is multidimensional, that you dwell within the medium of infinite probabilities, then you may catch a slight glimpse of the reality that is behind the word "god," and you may understand why it is almost impossible to capture a true understanding of that concept in words.
quotes.translation: 你当下的物质形象，是你对自己在物质属性中的概念的具体化。没有你对自己的概念，你的物质形象便不会存在；然而它往往是你唯一能觉察到的东西。你对自己概念的初始力量与能量，维持着你的形象鲜活。因此，概念远比你所认知的重要得多。如果你愿意接受"自身存在是多维的、你栖居于无限概率的媒介中"这一概念，那么你或许能略微窥见"神"字背后的实相，并理解为何几乎无法用语言捕捉对这一概念的真实领悟。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This sort of experience involves a sudden psychic awareness, straight from the entity, that all boundaries are for practical purposes only. However there are indeed many kinds of science. There are many sciences just dealing with locomotion. Had the human race for example gone into certain mental disciplines as thoroughly as it has explored technological disciplines, its practical transportation system would be vastly different, and yet by this time even more practical than it is now. I am making this point because I want it made plain--this, dear Joseph, is a pun--that when I speak of science on another plane I may not speak of the plain old science that you know.
quotes.translation: 这类体验涉及一种突如其来的心灵觉知——直接来自存有——让你明白所有界限仅为实用目的而设。然而，科学确实存在多种形式。仅就运动而言，就有许多科学分支。倘若人类曾像探索科技学科那样彻底投入某些心智训练，其实际交通系统将截然不同，甚至到此刻会比现有系统更实用。我强调这点是为了明确说明——亲爱的约瑟夫，这是个双关语——当我谈论另一层面的科学时，可能并非指你所熟知的寻常科学。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Such understanding simply cannot follow logical lines. The intellect may indeed grasp some of this understanding from the intuitions, but the intellect itself is aware of only minute portions of the whole personality. Again, this is not meant to minimize the value of the intellect. The fact remains that answers sought by a personality can only be found through a traveling within the actions that compose the self. Within our last session, I explained some of the basic psychological heritage that resides within the action makeup of the personality. There is no escaping this heritage, and it is so important that without it the personality system could not be built up.
quotes.translation: 这种领悟根本无法遵循逻辑脉络。理智或许能从直觉中捕捉部分理解，但理智本身仅能觉察整体人格的极小片段。再次强调，这并非贬低理智的价值。事实是，人格所寻求的答案，只能通过深入构成自我的行动内部才能找到。在上一节课中，我解释了存于人格行动构成中的部分基本心理传承。这种传承无法逃避，其重要性在于——没有它，人格系统便无法构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Each reader, therefore, has inner senses, and to some extent uses them constantly, though he is not aware of doing so at an egotistical level. Now, we use the inner senses quite freely and consciously. If you were to do so, then you would perceive the same kind of environment in which I have my existence. You would see an uncamouflaged situation, in which events and form were free and not stuck in a jellylike mold of time. You could see, for example, your present living room not only as a conglomeration of permanent-appearing furniture, but switch your focus and see the immense and constant dance of molecules and other particles that compose the various objects.
quotes.translation: 因此，每位读者都拥有内在感官，并在某种程度上持续运用它们，尽管在自我层面并未察觉。如今，我们自由而有意识地运用内在感官。若你也能如此，便会感知到我赖以存在的同类环境。你将看到未经伪装的景象——事件与形式自由流动，不再凝固于时间胶状模子中。例如，你不仅能看见客厅里看似恒久的家具组合，还能切换焦点，看见构成各种物体的分子与其他粒子那宏大而永恒的舞蹈。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you use psychological time as I have told you, you will get immediate firsthand experience of many facets of reality which take me pages to explain with the indirect use of words. All entities basically are self-aware portions of energy or vitality. They are self-generating and there is no possibility of thinking in terms of either beginning or end. Again, it is only your own camouflage- imprisoned data which makes you think that everything has a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 若你按我所教运用心理时间，便能直接亲身体验实相的诸多面向——这些面向需我用数页篇幅以间接文字解释。所有存有本质上是具有自我觉知的能量或活力片段。它们自我生成，根本不存在开端或终结的概念。再次强调，正是你自身被伪装禁锢的数据，让你认为万物皆有始有终。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your spirit joined itself with flesh, and in flesh, to experience a world of incredible richness, to help create a dimension of reality of colors and of form. Your spirit was born in flesh to enrich a marvelous area of sense awareness, to feel energy made into corporeal form. You are here to use, enjoy, and express yourself through the body. You are here to aid in the great expansion of consciousness. You are not here to cry about the miseries of the human condition, but to change them when you find them not to your liking through the joy, strength and vitality that is within you; to create the spirit as faithfully and beautifully as you can in flesh.
quotes.translation: 你的灵与肉身结合，在肉身中体验一个无比丰富的世界，协助创造充满色彩与形态的实相维度。你的灵诞生于肉身，为的是丰富感官觉知的奇妙领域，感受能量化为物质形态。你在此是为了通过身体去运用、享受并表达自己，协助意识进行伟大的扩展。你在此并非为人类处境的苦难哀叹，而是当你发现它们不合己意时，凭借内在的喜悦、力量与活力去改变它们；尽可能忠实而优美地在肉身中创造灵性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I am anxious to go into some further material, but I want to set your doubts at rest. When Ruburt is not aware of his surroundings during a session, he is still aware of his surroundings to some degree, and can return to them. Because you open a door, this does not mean that you cannot close it or open another door, nor does it mean that you cannot have two doors open at once, and that is my point.
quotes.translation: 我急于探讨更深入的资料，但想先让你安心。当鲁柏在课程中不觉察周遭环境时，他仍在一定程度上觉察着它们，并能返回其中。因为你打开一扇门，并不意味着你不能关上它或打开另一扇门，也不意味着你不能同时打开两扇门——这正是我的观点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Dogmas or systems of thought that tell you to rise above your emotions can be misleading -- even, in your terms, somewhat dangerous. Such theories are based upon the concept that there is something innately disruptive, base, or wrong in man's emotional nature, while the soul is always depicted as being calm, "perfect," passive and unfeeling. Only the most lofty, blissful awareness is allowed. Yet the soul is above all a fountain of energy, creativity, and action that shows its characteristics in life precisely through the ever-changing emotions.
quotes.translation: 那些告诉你要超越情绪的信条或思想体系可能具有误导性——甚至，用你们的话说，有些危险。这类理论基于这样的概念：人类情感本质中存在着某种天生具有破坏性、低劣或错误的东西，而灵魂则总被描绘成平静、"完美"、被动且无感。只允许最崇高、最喜悦的觉知存在。然而，灵魂首先是能量、创造力与行动的源泉，它正是通过不断变化的情绪来展现其生命特质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As a personality learns to use its abilities it becomes more aware of complexity, and able to operate as an identity within it. Since I have known your time it is meaningful for me, though it no longer hampers me. I merely understand its reality for you. Other psychological structures have not been initially aware of this peculiar relationship between your physical framework and your time concept.
quotes.translation: 当人格学会运用自身能力时，它会更加觉察到复杂性，并能作为身份在其中运作。既然我了解你们的时间，它对我便有意义，尽管它已不再束缚我。我只是理解它对你的实相。其他心理结构最初并未觉察到你们物质框架与时间概念之间的这种特殊关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In many cases he perceives in a dream a future physical event, and then within the dream situation acts out various possible solutions, until he hits upon the most agreeable one. In the dream state the personality actually has at its command a stupendous amount of subconscious information of which the ego is not aware. It is actually more practical therefore to seek the solution in the dreaming state, or in periods of dissociation if you prefer. The amount of data available to the subconscious is simply superior in quality and larger in quantity to that available to the ego, and this information can be used effectively through suggestion.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，他在梦中感知到未来的物质事件，然后在梦境情境中演练各种可能的解决方案，直到找到最合意的一个。在梦境状态中，人格实际上掌握着大量自我未曾觉察的潜意识信息。因此，在梦境状态或你们所说的解离时期寻求解决方案实际上更为实际。潜意识可获取的数据在质量上优于、在数量上多于自我可获取的数据，这些信息可通过暗示有效运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If there is, and there is, stupidity and ignorance and idiotic unfounded pride and rationalizations, nevertheless there is also, at least occasionally, good intent and appreciation. I know that you are aware of the dangers involved in projecting your own fears and irritations upon others. There is always and oftentimes a justifiable tendency to feel unappreciated, and therefore to look for chances to prove this lack of appreciation, so that it is often mistakenly projected on remarks or actions of others. Oftentimes such remarks and actions are the result of the other person's own ignorance, and actually not directed at you personally.
quotes.translation: 如果存在——确实存在——愚蠢、无知、荒谬无据的骄傲与合理化，那么至少偶尔也存在着善意与欣赏。我知道你意识到将自己的恐惧与恼怒投射到他人身上的危险。人们常常有合理的倾向感到不被欣赏，因此寻找机会证明这种不被欣赏，以至于常常错误地将它投射到他人的言语或行为上。很多时候，这些言语和行为是他人自身无知的结果，实际上并非针对你个人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: While there is a portion of All That Is, that is aware of itself as you, for example, a portion that is indeed focused within your existence, whose energy is directed within you, and to whom you can call for help when necessary, there is also an overall god-personality that is aware of itself also as something that is more than the sum of its creations. This is All That Is, in the deepest sense.
quotes.translation: 一切万有中有一部分以你为名觉察自身，例如，这部分确实聚焦于你的存在之中，其能量贯注于你体内，必要时你可向其求助；但同时也存在一个整体性的神格，它觉察到自身超越了所有造物的总和。这就是最深意义上的一切万有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your consciousness expands and develops according to its own abilities. Previous lives are handled in conscious terms when you are in existence between physical lives. When you are completed in those terms you may operate within a two reality field psychological pattern, in which you are consciously aware of existing in two systems at once, and able to manipulate with full awareness within each.
quotes.translation: 你的意识会依其自身能力扩展与成长。当你在物质生命之间的存在状态中时，前世的经历会以意识可理解的方式被处理。当你完成这些层面的课题后，便能在双重实相场域的心理模式中运作——你同时清醒地觉察到自己存在于两个系统之中，并能在每个系统内以全然觉知的状态进行操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Projection from a dream state is something else again, therefore, and when it is executed successfully then you have a fine example of the self as it changes the focus of its own awareness. Here the critical consciousness is quite apparent, while the body sleeps. Projections occur quite naturally under these conditions. For the development of the whole self however, and for the perfection of such experiences, it is beneficial that such projections be carried out by the conscious wish of the projector. You learn therefore to manipulate your own consciousness in different realities than the ones with which you are usually concerned.
quotes.translation: 因此，从梦境状态进行的投射又另当别论。当这种投射成功实现时，你便获得了一个绝佳范例，展示自我如何改变其觉知的焦点。在此过程中，当身体沉睡时，批判性意识反而格外清晰。在这种状态下，投射会自然发生。然而，为了完整自我的发展以及此类经验的完善，由投射者清醒意愿主导的投射更为有益。因此，你学会在不同实相中操控自己的意识——这些实相与你通常关注的领域截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Because of my own writing experience, I'm also well aware of the process involved in translating unconscious material into conscious reality. It's particularly obvious when I'm working on poetry. Whatever else is involved in Seth's book, certainly some kind of unconscious activity is operating at high gear. It was only natural, then, that I found myself comparing my own conscious creative experience with the trance procedure involved in Seth's book. I wanted to discover why I felt that Seth's book was his, as divorced from mine. If both were coming from the same unconscious, then why the subjective differences in my feelings?
quotes.translation: 基于我自身的写作经验，我深知将无意识素材转化为意识实相的过程。尤其在创作诗歌时，这种转化尤为明显。无论赛斯书中还涉及什么，某种无意识活动显然在高速运转。于是，我自然开始比较自己清醒的创作经验与赛斯书涉及的出神过程。我想探究为何我始终觉得赛斯书属于他而非我。若两者都源自同一无意识，为何我的主观感受存在差异？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: When women give birth in a crowded world they also know, and with a portion of their conscious minds, that a violation is involved. When your species sees that it is destroying other species and disrupting the natural balance, then it is consciously aware of its violation. When such natural guilt is not faced there are other mechanisms that must be employed. Again at the risk of repeating myself: Many of your problems result from the fact that you do not accept the responsibility of your own consciousness. It is meant to assess the reality that is unconsciously formed in direct replica of your thoughts and expectations.
quotes.translation: 当女性在拥挤的世界中分娩时，她们意识的一部分也明白这涉及某种侵犯。当人类物种目睹自身正在毁灭其他物种、破坏自然平衡时，便清醒意识到自身的侵犯行为。当这种自然的内疚未被正视时，就必须启用其他机制。容我再次强调：你们的许多问题源于不愿承担自身意识的责任。意识本应评估那些直接复制你们思想与期待的无意识形成的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The unknown reality: Much of that reality is unknown simply because your beliefs close you off from your own knowledge. The reaches of your own consciousness are not limited. Because you accept the idea of a straight-line movement of time, you cannot see before or after what you think of as your birth or death,* yet your greater consciousness is quite aware of such experience. Ideally it is possible not only to remember "past" lives, but to plan future ones now. In greater terms, all such lives happen at once. Your present neurological structure makes this seem impossible, yet your inner consciousness is not so impeded.
quotes.translation: 未知的实相：这部分实相之所以未知，纯粹因为你们的信念阻隔了自身知识。你们意识的疆域本无局限。由于接受时间线性运动的观念，你们无法看见所谓"出生"或"死亡"之前之后的存在——然而你们更宏大的意识完全知晓这类经验。理想状态下，不仅可能忆起"过去"世，更能在此刻规划未来世。从更宏大的视角看，所有此类生命同时发生。你们当前的神经结构使这看似不可能，但内在意识并不受此限制。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In the dream state the actors become aware to some extent of the parts they play, and sense the true personal identity that is behind the artist's craft. I have spoken of this before, but it is important to remember that you impose a certain kind of "artificial" sense of exaggerated continuity even to the self you know. Your experience changes constantly, and so does the intimate context of your life -- but you concentrate upon points of order, in your terms, that actually serve to scale down the context of your experience to make it more comprehensible. There are no such limits naturally set about your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态中，演员们会多少意识到自己所扮演的角色，并感知到艺术家技艺背后真正的个人身份。我之前曾提到过这一点，但重要的是要记住，即使对你所认知的自我，你也施加了某种“人为”的、夸张的连续性感觉。你的体验不断变化，你生活的内在脉络也随之改变——但按照你的说法，你专注于秩序点，这实际上缩小了你体验的脉络，使其更易于理解。你的意识并没有被自然设定这样的限制。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is not as far-fetched as it might seem, for again, you perceive now more than you realize; although you may not be consciously aware of this, it still falls within the framework of your associated experience. The mere shaking of a hand may be perceived by you as a simple action. You are not consciously aware of the million small actions which make up this seemingly insignificant act.
quotes.translation: 这并不像看起来那么牵强，因为再说一次，你现在感知到的比你意识到的要多；尽管你可能没有有意识地觉察到这一点，但它仍然属于你关联经验的框架。仅仅是一次握手，你可能将其视为一个简单的动作。你并没有有意识地觉察到构成这个看似微不足道的行为的百万个微小动作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dreams will be categorized in various ways when enough of them are gathered. You will find I believe that particular kinds of dreams occur with definite seasonal variations. Particular interest should be given to the space that you perceive within a dream. Are you, for example, aware only of the specific location in which the activities happen, or are you aware of a further space extent?
quotes.translation: 当收集到足够多的梦境时，它们将以各种方式被分类。我相信你会发现，特定类型的梦境会随着明确的季节性变化而出现。应特别关注你在梦中感知到的空间。例如，你是否只意识到活动发生的特定地点，还是意识到更广阔的空间范围？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: His change in attitude and performance in your personal areas, is a sign of this. You have also been of great help. Now I suggest that you playfully encourage him to increased motion. He is now aware for the first time clearly, of certain areas of rigidity, and realizes the fear behind them. Some of this is simply that he is afraid of pain if a muscle is suddenly let go. He knows this, but with your encouragement, active but playful, you can accomplish very much here. The body is quite ready to comply now, and he is mentally ready. It is a matter of taking advantage of the opportunity and good conditions.
quotes.translation: 他在你个人领域的态度和表现的变化，就是这一点的迹象。你也帮了大忙。现在我建议你以游戏的方式鼓励他增加活动。他现在第一次清晰地意识到某些僵硬的区域，并认识到它们背后的恐惧。其中一部分只是他害怕如果肌肉突然放松会疼痛。他知道这一点，但在你的鼓励下，积极而有趣，你们可以在这里取得很大进展。身体现在非常愿意配合，他在心理上也准备好了。这是一个利用机会和良好条件的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The material that I have given you concerning the nature of planes will be quite handy here. I have told you that a plane is not necessarily a planet, nor a place, but even a mere focus of awareness.
