A dream is an awareness of and existence in another plane, whereby the self changes focus to keep in touch with the various portions of itself so that inner communication can be maintained.
quotes.translation: 我给你的关于层面本质的材料在这里会非常有用。我告诉过你，层面不一定是一个行星，也不是一个地方，甚至只是一个意识的焦点。一个梦是在另一个层面上的意识和存在，自我通过改变焦点来与自身的各个部分保持联系，以便内在沟通得以维持。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you continue, you will indeed discover that you are aware of some future events, when such knowledge is not available in usual terms. If you persist, then over a period of time you will discover that you do very well in certain areas, while in others you may fail miserably. There will be associative patterns that you follow successfully, leading toward "correct" precognitions. You will also discover that the emotions are highly involved in such procedures: You will perceive information that is significant to you for some reason. That significance will act like a magnet, attracting those data to you.
quotes.translation: 如果你继续下去，你确实会发现，当这类知识在通常意义上不可得时，你会意识到一些未来事件。如果你坚持下去，那么在一段时间内，你会发现自己在某些领域做得很好，而在其他领域可能会惨败。会有一些你成功遵循的关联模式，导向“正确”的预知。你还会发现情绪在此类过程中高度参与：你会感知到因某种原因对你重要的信息。这种重要性会像磁铁一样，吸引那些数据到你身边。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:07.) You can learn to vastly enrich your own experience. Theoretically, you can even become aware of other existences to some degree. You can travel in the dream state into levels of reality separated from your own. You can learn to use and experience time in new fashions. You can obtain knowledge from other portions of your own being, and tap the psyche's resources. You can improve the world in which you live, and the quality of life. But while you are physical, you will still experience birth and death, dawn and dusk, and the privacy of the moments, for this is the experience you have chosen.
quotes.translation: (11点07分) 你可以学会大幅丰富自己的经验。理论上，你甚至能在某种程度上觉察到其他存在。你可以在梦境状态中旅行，进入与你自己实相分离的实相层面。你可以学会以新的方式运用和体验时间。你可以从自己存有的其他部分获取知识，并汲取心灵的能量。你可以改善你生活的世界以及生活的品质。但只要你还在肉身中，你仍会经历出生与死亡、黎明与黄昏，以及每个时刻的私密性，因为这就是你所选择体验的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Privately this is when human beings find themselves aware of greater illumination, when they make sudden decisions and experience new strengths. Now such a time is in the offing socially. This may be reflected in periods of seeming unrest in which, however, new creativity is looming. There will then be great planetary changes in terms of your organizations, but these will reflect private interior illuminations that become physically materialized. (More powerfully:) You do not trust your inner selves enough, or realize the creative ferment brewing. If you did you could save yourselves much trouble.
quotes.translation: 在私密层面，这正是人类发现自己觉察到更大光照的时刻，是他们做出突然决定并体验新力量的时刻。如今，这样的时刻在社会层面即将来临。这可能会反映在看似动荡的时期中，然而，新的创造力正在其中隐现。届时，你们的组织层面将发生巨大的行星变化，但这些变化将反映出那些私密的内在光照，并最终在物质世界中具体化。(更有力地:) 你们不够信任自己的内在自我，也没有意识到正在酝酿的创造性发酵。如果你们能信任，就能省去许多麻烦。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now in many ways this applies to Ruburt also. The two of you seek refreshment together, then plunge into your inner realities. He is more Emotionally attuned than you, in that it is easier for him, when coming out of his private world, to rush toward you with spontaneity. You are both equally dependent however, basically, on this necessary Emotional refreshment. You both drink it in, and it sustains you for some period. It is used in your work, and in your joint work. It forms an inner framework of which you are sometimes aware. (Smile.) Without your feeling toward Ruburt and the resulting urge to Emotionally actualize yourself to another personality, your background could have prevented even artistic development. (Pause.) Rather than serve as a springboard for creativity.
quotes.translation: 现在，这在许多方面也适用于鲁柏。你们俩一起寻求滋养，然后投入你们的内在实相。他在情感上比你更协调，因为当他走出自己的私人世界时，更容易自发地冲向你。然而，从根本上说，你们俩都同样依赖这种必要的情感滋养。你们俩都汲取它，它会在某段时间内支撑你们。它被用于你们各自的工作，以及你们共同的工作中。它形成了一个内在框架，你们有时会觉察到它。(微笑。) 如果没有你对鲁柏的感情以及随之而来的、在情感上向另一个人格实现自己的冲动，你的背景甚至可能阻碍艺术的发展。(停顿。) 而不是成为创造力的跳板。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Using your conscious mind as a threshold, however, you can discover still more. Figuratively speaking, stand where you are. Think of that moment of conscious awareness as a path. Imagine many other such paths, all converging; again, imaginatively take one of them in your mind and follow it. Accept what you experience uncritically. To some small extent you are "altering" your consciousness. (Half humorously:) Of course, you are not "altering" it at all. You are simply using it in a different fashion, and focusing it -- however briefly -- in another direction. This is the simplest of exercises.
quotes.translation: 然而，以你的意识心为门槛，你还能发现更多。打个比方说，站在你所在之处。将那个意识觉察的时刻视为一条路径。想象许多其他这样的路径，全都汇聚在一起；再次，在想象中，在你的脑海里选取其中一条并跟随它。不加评判地接受你所体验到的。在很小的程度上，你是在"改变"你的意识。(半开玩笑地:) 当然，你根本没有在"改变"它。你只是以不同的方式运用它，并将它聚焦——无论多么短暂——在另一个方向上。这是最简单的练习。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 701
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Much information does not even reach the brain (the mind is aware of such data, however). In man, the psychic-physical structure has at every moment a complete up-to-date picture of pertinent information about all events that will in any way affect the organism. All actions are taken with this information available. In the dream state such data becomes transformed, again, into pseudophysical pictures -- reflections of events that might occur, previews of probable sequences. These are flashed before a consciousness that momentarily focuses upon the inner rather than the outer arena of reality.
quotes.translation: 许多信息甚至没有到达大脑（然而，心智是觉察到这类数据的）。在人类身上，心灵-物质结构每时每刻都拥有关于所有会以任何方式影响有机体的事件的最新完整信息图景。所有行动都是在拥有这些信息的情况下采取的。在梦境状态中，这类数据再次被转化为准物质画面——可能发生的事件的反映，对可能序列的预演。这些画面在一个暂时聚焦于内在而非外在实相舞台的意识面前闪现。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I grinned. I wanted to. Yet after the two-month layoff I was nervous too; as I always was after any extended "trance vacation." Suppose -- just suppose -- I couldn't start up again or I lost the knack as suddenly as I'd acquired it (17 years before)? Or Seth spoke gibberish? I didn't really worry that such things might happen, but I was uneasily aware that they could. "Nonsense," I muttered, "it's the heat!" Because I knew that Seth would speak about the magical "connection." I managed another grin -- and who should know more about "magic" than Seth? Didn't he emerge magically to begin with?
quotes.translation: 我咧嘴笑了。我想笑。然而，在休息了两个月之后，我也很紧张；就像我在任何一次长时间的"出神假期"之后一样。万一——只是万一——我无法重新开始，或者我像17年前突然获得它一样突然失去了这个诀窍呢？或者赛斯说胡话？我并非真的担心这些事情会发生，但我隐隐不安地意识到它们可能发生。"胡说，"我咕哝道，"是天气太热了！"因为我知道赛斯会谈到那个神奇的"连接"。我勉强又挤出一个笑容——还有谁比赛斯更了解"魔法"呢？难道他不是一开始就神奇地出现的吗？
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For one thing, while pain is unpleasant it is also a method of familiarizing the self against the edges of quickened consciousness. Any heightened sensation, pleasant or unpleasant, has a stimulating effect upon a consciousness to some degree. It is a strong awareness of activity and life. Where the stimulus may be extremely annoying, and humiliatingly unpleasant, certain portions of the psychological framework accept it indiscriminatingly because it is a sensation, and a vivid one. This acquiescence to even painful stimuli is a basic part of the nature of consciousness, and a necessary one.
quotes.translation: 首先，痛苦虽令人不悦，却也是让自我熟悉意识锐化边缘的方法。任何强烈的感受，无论愉悦与否，都会在一定程度上刺激意识。这是对活动与生命的强烈觉知。当刺激可能极度恼人且令人难堪时，心理结构的某些部分会不加区分地接纳它，因为它是一种感受，且是鲜活的感受。这种对痛苦刺激的默许，是意识本质的基本组成部分，也是必要的组成部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It will manipulate those memories in its own way, and alter them, and add to the pool of energy from which it has emerged. It is quite familiar with me, now, through your experience. At this moment, in your terms, its view of reality is more pure than your own. It is aware of you both as psychic entities, and retains strong and unclouded perceptions of your past relationship. These connections must pass from its memory as it matures. The memories can be retained, but the primary focus of activity and the intensity must deal with this personality, and with this existence as you think of it.
quotes.translation: 它会以自己的方式处理那些记忆，加以改变，并为其所源自的能量池增添能量。通过你的经验，它现在对我相当熟悉。此刻，用你们的话来说，它对实相的看法比你们自己的更纯粹。它意识到你们俩都是灵性实体，并对你们过去的关系保持着清晰无碍的感知。随着它的成熟，这些联系必须从它的记忆中消逝。记忆可以保留，但活动的主要焦点和强度必须处理这个人格，以及你们所认为的这个存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I make these analogies because they are pertinent, yet I am aware that they can make you feel small or fear for your identity. You are more than a message, say, passing through the vast reaches of a superself. You are not lost in the universe. In a book we must use words, but such analogies can, if you let them, conjure up within your imagination some feeling of your intimate relationship with all other reality. To some extent, the feeling of grace is your emotional recognition of the necessity, purpose and freedom, the innate appreciation, of your rightness and your place in existence.
quotes.translation: 我作这些类比是因为它们切题，然而我意识到它们可能让你感到渺小，或为你的身份而担忧。你不仅仅是一个信息，比如说，穿过超我广阔领域的信息。你并未迷失在宇宙中。在一本书中，我们必须使用文字，但如果你允许，这些类比可以在你的想象中唤起你与所有其他实相亲密关系的感觉。在某种程度上，恩宠感是你对必要性、目的和自由的情感认同，是对你自身正当性及存在位置的内在欣赏。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You do exist therefore in both of these dimensions. The ego cannot participate directly in such experience. There is a compliance on the part of the ego, however, that allows it to step aside so that it does not block inner awareness of other-dimensional existence. It is difficult, but not impossible, for the ego to correlate the information gained. Dreams involve as you know several dimensions. The dream state itself is a very loose term, for there are several layers of consciousness within it, and there is no limit to the states of consciousness that can be achieved, ideally speaking.
quotes.translation: 因此，你确实存在于这两个维度中。自我无法直接参与这种体验。然而，自我方面有一种顺从，允许它退到一旁，以免阻碍对其他维度存在的内在觉知。对自我来说，整合所获得的信息是困难的，但并非不可能。如你所知，梦境涉及多个维度。梦境状态本身是一个非常宽泛的术语，因为其中有多个意识层次，而且理想情况下，可以达到的意识状态是没有限制的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Shadows can be pleasant and luxurious, and on a hot sunny day you are certainly aware of their beneficial nature. So some dream hallucinations are beautiful, comforting, refreshing. They can bring great peace and be sought after for themselves. You may believe that God exists as a kindly father, or you might personify him as Christ or Buddha. In your dreams you might then encounter such personages. They are quite valid, but they are also hallucinations cast by your own thoughts and feelings. Dreams of Heaven and Hell alike fall into the same category, in those terms, as hallucinations.
quotes.translation: 阴影可以是宜人而奢华的，在炎热的晴天你当然会意识到它们有益的特性。因此，一些梦的幻象是美丽、舒适、令人神清气爽的。它们能带来极大的平静，并因其本身而受到追求。你可能相信上帝以慈父般存在，或者你可能将他具象化为基督或佛陀。在你的梦中，你可能会遇到这样的人物。它们非常真实，但它们也是由你自己的思想和感受投射出的幻象。天堂和地狱的梦境同样属于同一类别，就这些术语而言，都是幻象。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: These dream personalities or fragments indeed have their own consciousness. They are as unaware, and as aware, of you as you are of them. They exist once you have created them. No action can be ？？2withdrawn. It must complete its nature according to the dimensions in which it exists, and so the dream personalities or fragments continue to exist whether or not you are aware of them.
quotes.translation: 这些梦的人格或片段确实拥有自己的意识。它们对你的不觉察和觉察，正如你对它们的不觉察和觉察一样。一旦你创造了它们，它们就存在了。没有任何行动可以被撤回。它必须根据其存在的维度完成其本性，因此无论你是否意识到它们，这些梦的人格或片段都会继续存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Again, it is important that you realize the initial nonphysical reaction to stimuli that sparks off all physical reactions. There is constant interplay and communication between the areas of consciousness that are connected to the brain and those that are not. The "deeper" purposes of the consciousness involved "circulate," sometimes arising in the awareness that is joined with the brain. Information coming from those deeper sources of the self, reaching the areas connected to the brain, will be interpreted according to the beliefs of that most physically focused segment of the self.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，重要的是要认识到，引发所有物质反应的初始非物质刺激反应。与大脑相连的意识领域和未与大脑相连的意识领域之间存在着持续的相互作用和交流。所涉及意识的"更深层"目的会"循环"，有时会出现在与大脑相连的觉知中。来自自我更深层来源的信息，到达与大脑相连的区域时，将根据自我中最专注于物质层面的那部分所持有的信念进行解读。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It was necessary for the ego, in its origins, to objectify itself as much as possible. Now however the stability of the ego, generally speaking, as a part of the human personality is established. It can now afford to be much more elastic, to include, in other words, more and more of reality within its awareness. Such an inclusion would be most beneficial. It would of course however to some extent change the ego, and any change is resisted by the ego.
quotes.translation: 自我在其起源时，有必要尽可能地将自身客观化。然而现在，一般来说，自我作为人类人格一部分的稳定性已经确立。它现在可以变得更加有弹性，换句话说，可以将越来越多的实相纳入其觉知之中。这样的纳入将极为有益。当然，这会在某种程度上改变自我，而任何改变都会遭到自我的抗拒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your own environment includes far more than you may have supposed. Earlier I referred to your environment in terms of the daily physical existence and surroundings with which you are currently connected. In actuality, you are aware of very little of your larger, more extensive environment. Consider your present self as an actor in a play; hardly a new analogy, but a suitable one. The scene is set in the twentieth century. You create the props, the settings, the themes; in fact you write, produce, and act in the entire production -- you and every other individual who takes part.
quotes.translation: 你自己的环境所包含的远比你想象的要多。早些时候，我提到你的环境时，指的是你当前与之相连的日常物质存在和周围环境。实际上，你对更广阔、更广泛的环境所知甚少。将你现在的自己视为一场戏剧中的演员——这算不上新颖的比喻，但很贴切。场景设定在二十世纪。你创造道具、布景、主题；事实上，你编写、制作并出演整部作品——你和每一个参与的个体都是如此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Quite simply, the self travels to levels of awareness, and to layers of the self that are far divorced from the physical areas of mobility. The muscles are lax because activity of a physical nature is not required for the physical organism. Actions are indeed being carried on, and actions which would be considered physical if the body was moving, and if the individual were awake. These actions, walking, talking, working, any conceivable dream action, these require energy. The energy that is not being expended within the physical system is used to sustain these mental actions.
quotes.translation: 简单来说，自我会旅行到觉知的层次，以及远离物质活动领域的自我层面。肌肉松弛，是因为物质有机体不需要物质性质的活动。然而，活动确实在进行，如果身体在移动，如果个体是清醒的，这些活动就会被视为物质活动。这些活动——行走、说话、工作，以及任何可想象的梦境活动——都需要能量。在物质系统内未被消耗的能量，被用来维持这些心智活动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In any state of dissociation any individual is more sensitive to inner data. This sensitivity varies in accordance to the ability of the individual in general in this line, which is why I make the point. In an intimate gathering of close friends, if a few glasses of wine are drunk, and if Ruburt happens to then be increasingly aware of inner data, there is not anything out of the way in holding a session, if this happens only occasionally. Indeed a judicious （underline judicious） use of wine is somewhat beneficial, but never to be overdone, and this is very important.
quotes.translation: 在任何解离状态中，任何个体都对内在数据更为敏感。这种敏感性通常因个体在这方面的能力而异，这就是我提出这一点的原因。在亲密朋友的小型聚会中，如果喝了几杯酒，而鲁柏恰好对内在数据变得更加觉知，那么偶尔举行一次课并无不妥——只要这只是偶尔发生。事实上，审慎（强调审慎）地使用酒类是有益的，但绝不能过度，这一点非常重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Man's consciousness, and to some extent that of the animals, is more specifically identified with form, however. In order to develop his own kind of individualized awareness, man had to consciously ignore for a while his own place within the structure of the earth. His experience of time would seem to be the experience of his identity. His consciousness would not seem to flow into his body before birth, and out of it after death. He would "forget" there was a time to die. He would forget that death meant new life. A natural message had to replace the old knowledge.
quotes.translation: 然而，人类的意识，以及某种程度上动物的意识，更具体地与形态相关联。为了发展自己那种个体化的觉知，人类不得不暂时有意识地忽略自己在地球结构中的位置。他对时间的体验似乎就是对他身份的体验。他的意识似乎不会在出生前流入他的身体，也不会在死后流出。他会"忘记"存在死亡之时。他会忘记死亡意味着新生。一种自然的信息必须取代旧有的知识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: They are aware of themselves as a part of action, and therefore through capsule comprehension, which we have discussed, the simple atoms and molecules are aware of their own basic immortality. All this is basic knowledge, if you would understand why the personality accepts even an impeding action, or pain or illness, as a part of itself, despite the ego's resistance to pain.
quotes.translation: 他们觉察到自己是行动的一部分，因此通过我们讨论过的胶囊式理解，简单的原子和分子也意识到自身基本的不朽性。若想理解为何人格会接受甚至阻碍性的行动、痛苦或疾病作为自身的一部分——尽管自我抗拒痛苦——这一切都是基础知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If it is physical effects you want then I will go along. After all, I must please Ruburt to some extent, since without him I could not speak. The reason that his paintings upset him is that they reflect his inner knowledge, of which he is well aware. It is true that his poetry does also, and over the years he has come to take this for granted. But the paintings, especially the late ones which are so much improved over his earlier efforts, are new to him. And since he is still a doubter of the material, he sees this inner knowledge in a new light, and is upset.
quotes.translation: 如果你想要的是物理效果，那我就配合。毕竟，我必须在某种程度上取悦鲁柏，因为没有他我就无法说话。他的画作令他不安的原因，在于这些画反映了他内心深知的内在知识。他的诗歌也确实如此，多年来他已对此习以为常。但那些画作——尤其是后期比早期作品大有进步的画作——对他而言是陌生的。由于他仍对物质存疑，他以新的视角看待这些内在知识，因而感到不安。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I will not endeavor to go into this in any detail at this time. We will work within these limitations and see what we can do. The human is not innately limited... the waking state, as I have said often, is as much a trance state as any other state. Here we merely switch the focus of attention to other channels. All that is required is that we switch the attention... consider merely that all types of awareness are trance states... consciousness is the direction in which the self looks.
quotes.translation: 我此刻不打算深入探讨细节。我们将在这些限制内运作，看看能有何作为。人类并非天生受限……清醒状态，正如我常说的，与其他状态一样是一种出神状态。此处我们只是将注意力焦点切换到其他通道。所需的一切只是转移注意力……只需考虑所有类型的觉察都是出神状态……意识是自我注视的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All matter is based upon the units mentioned, with their unpredictability and their propensity for exploring all probabilities. Even your atomic structure, then, is poised between probabilities. If this is true, then obviously "you" are aware of only one small probable portion of yourself -- and this portion you protect as your identity (underlined). If you think of it as simply a focus taken by "your" greater identity, then you will be able to follow what I am saying without feeling puny by contrast, or lost.6 The focus that you have is indeed inviolate.
quotes.translation: 所有物质都基于所提及的单位，它们具有不可预测性和探索所有可能性的倾向。就连你们的原子结构也悬于可能性之间。若果真如此，那么显然"你"只觉察到自身一个微小的可能部分——并将此部分保护为你的身份（强调）。若你将其视为"你"更宏大身份的一个简单焦点，便能理解我所说的话，而不会感到相比之下渺小或迷失。你所拥有的这个焦点确实神圣不可侵犯。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I have mentioned that what I call the dream universe is indeed composed of molecular structure, and that it is a continuing reality, even though your own awareness of it is most usually limited, for quite necessary reasons, to the hours of your own sleep. There is a give and take here, for if you give the dream universe much of its continuing energy, much of your own energy is derived from it. There is, between the physical field and the dream universe, an interdependence that is not at all unusual, for all fields are indeed dependent one upon the other.
quotes.translation: 我曾提及，我所谓的梦境宇宙确实由分子结构组成，且是一个持续存在的实相——尽管出于相当必要的理由，你们对其的觉察通常仅限于睡眠时段。此处存在一种交换：若你们赋予梦境宇宙持续存在的能量，你们自身的许多能量也源自于此。物理场域与梦境宇宙之间存在着一种毫不异常的相互依存关系，因为所有场域确实彼此依赖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Death simply does not exist to the whole personality. Only the physically oriented portions of the self accept this as a finality. (Long pause.) Whenever you use abilities that to you seem supernormal, you are drawing upon the ability of the supraself. It is the whole I and yet more than the sum of its parts. It is action highly aware, and quite able to change its components. It consists also of course of the probable selves of which we have spoken, and it unites and directs infinitely larger portions of action than possible for the physical personality.
quotes.translation: 死亡对整体人格而言根本不存在。只有自我中面向物理的部分才将其视为终结。（长停顿。）每当你们运用看似超常的能力时，你们都在调用超我（supraself）的能力。它是完整的"我"，却又大于各部分之和。它是高度觉察的行动，完全能够改变其组成部分。它当然也包含我们讨论过的可能自我，并统合与引导着远超物理人格所能掌控的、无限广大的行动部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In your daily physical life you are usually concerned simply with changing your beliefs about yourself, and then changing the beliefs others hold about you. You will find conflicting beliefs within yourself and you must become aware of these. As an example, you may believe that you want to understand the nature of your inner self -- you may tell yourself you want to remember your dreams, but at the same time still hold a belief in the basic unworthiness of the self, and be quite frightened of remembering your dreams because of what you might find there.
quotes.translation: 在你们的日常物质生活中，通常只关心改变自己对自身的信念，然后改变他人对你们的信念。你们会在自身发现相互矛盾的信念，必须觉察到这些信念。举例来说，你或许相信自己想要了解内在自我的本质——你或许告诉自己你想记住梦境，但同时又抱持着自我基本无价值的信念，并且相当害怕记住梦境，因为担心会在其中发现什么。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You are meant to understand the nature of your inner self, and to manifest it outward. As this is done, the exterior circumstances should change for the better as the inner self becomes more aware of its own nature and capabilities. Theoretically, then, in each life you would become stronger, healthier, wealthier, and wiser, but it does not work that way, for many reasons. As mentioned earlier, many personalities adopt different kinds of experiences, focusing upon development in certain specific areas, and ignoring others perhaps for a series of lives.
quotes.translation: 你们本应了解内在自我的本质，并将其向外彰显。当这实现时，随着内在自我更清楚地认识自身的本质与能力，外在境遇应当会向更好的方向转变。理论上，每一世你们都会变得更强壮、更健康、更富有、更智慧，但由于诸多原因，实际情况并非如此。如前所述，许多人格会采用不同种类的体验，专注于某些特定领域的发展，而可能忽略其他领域，甚至持续数世之久。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:59.) Because that state is also connected with waking life, you also take into it many of the elements of your daily existence, so that your recalled dreams are often cast in fairly conventionalized terms. As a rule you remember the dream's outer veneer, or what it turns into as you approach your usual level of consciousness. In a dream you are basically aware of so many facets of an event that many of them must necessarily escape your waking memory. Yet any real education must take into consideration the learning processes within dreams, and no one can hope to glimpse the nature of the psyche without encouraging dream experience, recall, and the creative use of dream education in waking life.
quotes.translation: （11:59）由于该状态也与清醒生活相连，你们会将日常存在的许多元素带入其中，因此你们回忆起的梦境往往以相当常规化的形式呈现。通常你们记住的是梦境的外层表象，或是当你们接近平常意识层次时梦境所转化成的形态。在梦境中，你们本质上能觉察到事件的如此多面向，以至于其中许多必然超出清醒记忆的范围。然而任何真正的教育都必须考虑梦境中的学习过程，没有人能在不鼓励梦境体验、回忆以及在清醒生活中创造性运用梦境教育的情况下，窥见心灵的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The natural contours of your psyche are quite aware of the inner sweep and flow of your life, and its relationship with every other creature alive. Intuitively, each person is born with the knowledge that he or she is not only worthwhile, but fits into the context of the universe in the most precise and beautiful of fashions. The most elegant timing is involved in each individual's birth and death. The exquisite play of your own inner nature in general -- and that identification leads you into the deeper knowledge of your own part in nature's source.
quotes.translation: 你们心灵的自然轮廓完全知晓内在生命的起伏流转，以及它与每个其他生灵的关系。直觉上，每个人生来就知晓自己不仅有价值，而且以最精确美妙的方式契合于宇宙的脉络。每个个体的出生与死亡都涉及最精妙的时机安排。你们内在本质的优雅运作——这种认同将引领你们更深入地认识自己在自然源头中的角色。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You could not be consciously aware of those other realities all of the time, and deal with the world that you know. You have several time and space tracks in operation at once, then, but you acknowledge only certain neurological messages physically. Yet there is more to the body than you perceive of it, and this is difficult to explain to you ... If you can think of a multidimensional body existing at one time in various realities, and appearing differently within each one while still being whole, then you can get some glimpse of what is involved.3
quotes.translation: 你们不可能始终有意识地觉察那些其他实相，同时处理你们所认知的世界。你们同时运作着多条时间与空间轨道，但只从物质层面承认某些神经信息。然而身体所包含的远超过你们所感知到的，这很难向你们解释……如果你们能想象一个多维身体同时存在于不同实相中，在每个实相中呈现不同样貌却仍保持完整，那么你们就能略微窥见其中所涉及的内容。

quotes.text: For now, consider a very simple act. You want to walk across the room and pick up a paper, for example. That purpose is simple and direct enough. It automatically propels your body in the proper fashions, even though you are not consciously aware of the inner mechanisms involved. You do not imagine the existence of blocks or impediments in your way, in the form of additional furniture placed in your path by accident, fate, or design. You make a simple straight path in the proper direction. The act has meaning because it is something you want to do.
quotes.translation: 现在，考虑一个非常简单的动作。例如，你想要穿过房间捡起一张纸。这个目的足够简单直接。它会自动以适当方式驱动你的身体，即使你并未有意识地觉察其中涉及的内在机制。你不会想象路径上存在障碍或阻碍——无论是意外、命运或设计在你途中放置的额外家具。你会在正确方向开辟一条简单的直线路径。这个行动具有意义，因为它是你想要做的事。

quotes.text: The self that you are aware of represents only one "position" in which those invisible particles happen to intersect, gain mass, build up form. Scientists can only perceive an electron as it is to them. They cannot really track it. They cannot be certain of its position and its speed at the same time, and to some extent the same applies to your consciousness. The speed of your own thoughts takes those thoughts away from you even as you think them--and you can never really examine a thought, but only the thought of a thought (with quiet amusement).
quotes.translation: 你所意识到的自我，只代表了那些不可见粒子偶然交汇、获得质量、构建形态的其中一个"位置"。科学家只能感知到电子相对于他们的存在。他们无法真正追踪它。他们无法同时确定它的位置和速度，在某种程度上，这同样适用于你的意识。你思想的速度使那些思想在你思考它们的同时就离你而去——你永远无法真正检视一个思想，只能检视关于思想的念头（带着安静的愉悦）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your universe is only one of many such universes. You are aware only of perceptions along the horizontal planes, and the more powerful your scientific instruments become the more you will be able to see. One universe does become another. However, the universes containing an almost infinite number of planes are therefore affected by the exchange of energies involved, and the interaction and continual movement even of one plane through another results in effects which will be perceived in various ways, again according to your own situation in them.
quotes.translation: 你的宇宙只是众多此类宇宙中的一个。你只能意识到水平层面的感知，而你的科学仪器越强大，你就能看到越多。一个宇宙确实会变成另一个宇宙。然而，包含近乎无限层面的宇宙因此受到所涉及能量交换的影响，即使一个层面穿过另一个层面的相互作用和持续运动也会产生各种方式被感知的效果，这同样取决于你在其中的位置。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Some portion of each individual is in direct contact with the very source of its own existence. Each individual is innately aware that help is available in every situation, and that information does not need to come through the physical senses alone. Many illnesses are cured, then, through quite natural methods that not only involve physical healings, but bring into play other events -- events that have great bearing on the psychological elements that may be involved behind the scenes. For those interactions we will have to look to Framework 2.
quotes.translation: 每个个体的某部分都与其自身存在的源头直接相连。每个个体天生就知道在任何情况下都能获得帮助，而且信息不必仅通过物质感官传递。因此，许多疾病通过相当自然的方法得以治愈，这些方法不仅涉及身体疗愈，还调动了其他事件——这些事件对可能隐藏在幕后的心理因素有重大影响。对于这些相互作用，我们必须看向架构二。

quotes.text: Now: This means that biologically the cell is aware of all of its probable variations, while in your time and structures it holds its unique position as a part, say, of any given organ in your body. (Pause.) In greater terms the cell is a huge physical universe, orbiting an invisible CU; and in your terms the CU will always be invisible -- beyond the smallest phenomenon that you can perceive with any kind of instrument. To some extent, however, its act can be indirectly apprehended through its effect upon the phenomenon that you can perceive.
quotes.translation: 现在：这意味着在生物学上，细胞知道它所有可能的变体，而在你们的时间和结构中，它作为你身体中某个特定器官的一部分，保持着独特的位置。（停顿。）从更宏观的角度看，细胞是一个巨大的物质宇宙，围绕着一个不可见的CU运行；而在你们的术语中，CU将永远不可见——超越你们能用任何仪器感知到的最小现象。然而，在某种程度上，它的行为可以通过它对你们能感知的现象的影响而被间接理解。

quotes.text: （I was still aware of the feeling of enlargement in my right hand. I was careful not to confuse this with any cramping effect from holding a pen for so long. However, the feeling now became more pronounced, so that when I made a fist my fingers felt thicker, against a thicker palm, giving a feeling of restricted movement. Usually such effects begin to wane as soon as a session ends, but in this instance the sensation was stronger than ever five minutes later. It lasted for some fifteen minutes or so, during which time it gradually declined.
quotes.translation: （我仍然感觉到右手有膨胀感。我小心地不把这与长时间握笔造成的任何抽筋效应混淆。然而，这种感觉现在变得更加明显，以至于当我握拳时，我的手指感觉更粗，抵着更厚的手掌，产生一种活动受限的感觉。通常这种效应在课程结束后就开始减弱，但在这个例子中，五分钟后感觉比以往任何时候都强烈。它持续了大约十五分钟，在此期间逐渐消退。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There are many more. It is known now that the physical organism exists as many things. It even exists as radio waves, and to creatures who cannot perceive matter but can perceive radio waves, your physical body appears quite differently than it does to you. The whole physical organism contains checks and balances of which your scientists are still not aware, and I must also mention that for all its mandy-pamby, astrology has a strong basis, although it is only one small portion of the whole story, and not indeed the whole kettle of tales.
quotes.translation: 还有更多。现在已知物质有机体以多种形式存在。它甚至以无线电波的形式存在，对于无法感知物质但能感知无线电波的生物来说，你的物质身体看起来与你自己所见完全不同。整个物质有机体包含你们科学家尚未意识到的制衡机制，我还必须提到，尽管占星术看似软弱无力，但它有坚实的基础，尽管它只是整个故事的一小部分，而且确实不是全部的故事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must remember, of course, that the use of clocks is a fairly recent phenomenon. (Pause.) Men thought in terms of rhythms of the time, or of flowing time, not of time in sections that were arbitrary. So as far as creaturehood is concerned, you have adapted to a time environment that you yourselves have formed. Creative people, again, are often aware of those connections, at least at certain levels, and Ruburt in particular has always felt that way to some extent. You have largely buried your own natural feelings in that direction.
quotes.translation: 你必须记住，当然，时钟的使用是相当晚近的现象。（停顿）人们过去以时间的韵律或流动的时间来思考，而非以任意分割的时间段落。因此就生物性而言，你们已经适应了自己所形成的时间环境。有创造力的人往往能察觉到这些关联——至少在某些层面上——而鲁柏尤其一直有这种感觉。你们在很大程度上埋没了自己在这方面的自然感受。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: When the inverted time system is understood for what it is, then the individual is in contact simultaneously with the experience gained in the so-called past, and is also able to take advantage of events which have not yet occurred within your present. This does not mean that he will be consciously aware of future events, for if you remember these events can be changed by him at any time. He is constantly making his own experience. He is constantly forming the events of the past, even as he forms the events of the present and future.
quotes.translation: 当倒转的时间系统被理解为其本来面目时，个体便能同时接触所谓"过去"中获得的经验，也能利用尚未在你们"现在"发生的事件。这并不意味着他会清醒地意识到未来事件，因为要记住这些事件随时可能被他改变。他不断创造自己的经验，不断形成过去的事件，正如他形成现在和未来的事件一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As a continent does not exist alone, but also in relationship to other physical formations, so in your terms you form events so that they fit into a mass framework. You form your own reality. You do not form it isolated and alone, however. You are aware of other events, and take them into consideration, for example, regardless of appearances. You cannot force another person to experience an event he or she rejects. Nor can anyone act in like manner against you. So-called good or bad events each faithfully follow the inner mechanics.
quotes.translation: 正如一块大陆并非孤立存在，而是与其他地理形态相关联，从你们的角度看，你们形成事件的方式使它们融入一个整体框架。你们创造自己的实相，但并非孤立地创造。你们会察觉其他事件并将其纳入考量——无论表面现象如何。你无法强迫他人经历其拒绝接受的事件，也没有人能违背你的意愿对你施加影响。所谓的好事或坏事都忠实地遵循内在机制。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It follows then that I am aware of the other Seth personality, and he of me. Because of your time misconceptions you make serious errors whenever you attempt any predictions into life after death, or life within other systems than your own. It is most difficult for you to conceive of an ego who experiences events not in serial form. When any contact is attempted in so-called mediumistic situations, then it is expected that the survival personality will "remember," in quotes, events as you do; but events no longer exist in that way.
quotes.translation: 由此可知，我能感知到另一个赛斯人格，他也能感知到我。由于你们对时间的误解，每当试图预测死后生命或自身系统之外的其他系统时，都会犯下严重错误。你们极难想象一个不以序列形式体验事件的自我。当在所谓通灵情境中进行接触时，人们期望存续人格会像你们一样"记住"（引号内）事件——但事件已不再以那种方式存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: That earth-god portion of yourself attempts to direct you through probabilities. Again, on deep biological levels beneath normal consciousness, and on psychic levels above normal consciousness, you are aware of the integrity of your being -- but also of your great connection, while living in flesh, with the natural environment of time and space. The earth-god concept can be consciously used, but only to your greatest advantage if you understand the purposes of your conscious mind and its relationship with your biological nature.
quotes.translation: 你内在的"大地之神"部分试图通过可能性引导你。再次强调，在正常意识之下的深层生物层面，以及正常意识之上的心灵层面，你都能意识到自己存有的完整性——同时也意识到在肉身中与时空自然环境的深刻联结。大地之神的概念可以有意识地运用，但只有当你理解意识心智的目的及其与生物本性的关系时，才能获得最大益处。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 691
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Consciousness forms the genes, and not the other way around, and the about-to-be-born infant is the agency that adds new material through the chromosomal structure.2 The child is from birth far more aware of all kinds of physical events than is realized also. But beside that, the child uses the early years to explore -- particularly in the dream state -- other kinds of material that suit its own fancies and intents, and it constantly receives a stream of information that is not at all dependent upon its heredity or environment.
quotes.translation: 意识形成基因，而非相反。即将出生的婴儿正是通过染色体结构添加新材料的媒介。婴儿从出生起对各种物理事件的觉察力远超人们所认知的程度。除此之外，婴儿利用早年时光——尤其在梦境状态——探索符合其自身喜好与意图的其他材料，并持续接收完全不依赖于遗传或环境的信息流。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 827, MARCH 13, 1978
9:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: So, while each action of your life is taken in context with all other actions of your life until your death, this does not mean that your death is predestined to occur at any given time. As you might change your sentence in the middle from one version to another without even being consciously aware of it, so as you live your life you also work with probabilities. You are the self who speaks the sentence, and you are the self who lives the life. You are larger than the sentence that you speak, and larger than the life you live.
quotes.translation: 因此，虽然你生命中的每个行动都与你直至死亡的所有其他行动相互关联，但这并不意味着你的死亡注定在某个特定时刻发生。正如你可能在句子中途无意识地将其从一种版本改为另一种，你在生活中也同时处理着或然率。你是说出句子的那个自己，也是活出人生的那个自己。你比你说出的句子更宏大，也比你所活的人生更宏大。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Even when you lost sight -- as you knew you would -- of those deep connections, they would continue to operate until, in its own way, man's consciousness could rediscover the knowledge and put it to use -- deliberately and willfully, thereby bringing that consciousness to flower. In your terms this would represent a great leap, for the egotistically aware individual would fully comprehend unconscious knowledge and act on his own, out of choice. He would become a conscious co-creator. Obviously, this has not as yet occurred.
quotes.translation: 即使当你——如你所知终将如此——失去对这些深层联系的视野时，它们仍会持续运作，直到人类意识能以自身方式重新发现这些知识并加以运用——有意识且主动地，从而使该意识绽放。以你们的说法，这将代表一次巨大飞跃，因为具有自我觉察力的个体将完全理解无意识知识，并出于选择自主行动。他将成为有意识的共同创造者。显然，这尚未发生。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: What gives life to chemicals now? That is the more proper question. All energy is (underlined) not only aware-ized but the source of all organizations of consciousness, and all physical forms. These represent frameworks of consciousness. (Long pause.) There was a day when the dreaming world, in your terms, suddenly awakened to full reality as far as physical materialization is concerned. The planet was visited by desire. There were ghost excursions there -- mental buildings, dream civilizations which then became actualized.
quotes.translation: 现在更恰当的问题是：是什么赋予了化学物质生命？所有能量不仅（强调）被觉察化，更是所有意识组织与所有物质形态的源头。这些代表着意识的框架。（长停顿。）以你们的说法，曾有那么一天，梦境世界就物质具体化而言突然觉醒为完整实相。欲望造访了这颗行星。那里曾有过幽灵漫游——心灵建筑、梦境文明，随后它们被具体化了。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The keystone here is that you are only aware of your own constructions. This is most important. You truly construct your own environment, and it in turn then has its influence upon you. When I speak of environment I include for simplicity's sake that which is close to the self in its nebulous form, but which is still called not-self. Theoretically, this even personal environment reaches indefinitely. However, we will speak of it usually as including those rather nebulous gradations that seem to be between self and not-self.
quotes.translation: 关键在于你只觉察到自己的建构。这点至关重要。你确实建构了自己的环境，而环境反过来又影响你。为简化起见，当我谈及环境时，包括那些以模糊形态贴近自我、却仍被称为非我的部分。理论上，即便是这种个人环境也无限延伸。不过我们通常将其视为包含那些介于自我与非我之间相当模糊的层级。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All of an individual's experiences, even those of which he is not aware on a conscious basis, therefore are part of the electromagnetic reality that forms this particular individual's electromagnetic identity. It exists within the physical matter of the organism during existence within the physical system. While the experiences which form this framework and compose this individual's identity are obtained through his interaction with the physical system, his electromagnetic identity is not dependent upon the physical field.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体所有经验——甚至那些他意识层面未觉察到的——都是构成这个特定个体电磁实相的一部分。在物理系统存在期间，它存在于有机体的物质之中。虽然构成此框架与个体身份的经验是通过与物理系统的互动获得的，但其电磁身份并不依赖于物理场域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The other exercises, in fact, will result in a clearer picture of the world, for they will facilitate the very motion of your perceptions, allowing you to perceive nuances in the physical situation that before would have escaped your notice. We will be dealing with practical direct experience. It will do you no good if you are simply intellectually aware of what I say, but practically ignorant. Period. Therefore the exercises will be important because they will offer you evidence of your own greater perceptive abilities.
quotes.translation: 事实上，其他练习将带来更清晰的世界图景，因为它们会促进你感知的运作，让你觉察到物理情境中那些先前会错过的细微差别。我们将处理实际的直接经验。若你仅理智上明白我所说，实际上却一无所知，那将毫无益处。句号。因此这些练习很重要，因为它们将为你提供自身更强大感知能力的证据。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These minds all work together to keep you alive through the physical structure of the brain. When you use all of these minds, then and only then do you become fully aware of your surroundings: You perceive reality more clearly than you do now, more sharply, brilliantly, and concisely. At the same time, however, you comprehend it directly. You comprehend what it is apart from your physical perception of it. You accept as yourself those other states of consciousness native to your other minds. You achieve true personhood.
quotes.translation: 这些心智共同运作，通过大脑的物理结构维持你的生命。当你运用所有这些心智时，唯有此时你才能完全觉察周遭环境：你感知现实的方式比现在更清晰、更锐利、更鲜明、更简洁。然而与此同时，你也能直接领悟它。你领悟到它超越你对其物理感知的本质。你将那些属于你其他心智的固有意识状态接纳为自我的一部分。你成就了真正的人格。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The earth then appeared as consciousness transformed itself into the many facets of nature. The atoms and molecules were alive, aware--they were no longer simply a part of a divine syntax, but they spoke themselves through the very nature of their being (gesturing). They became the living, aware vowels and syllables through which consciousness could form matter.
quotes.translation: 于是当意识将自己转化为自然的诸多面向时，大地便显现了。原子与分子是活生生的、具有觉知的——它们不再仅仅是神圣句法的一部分，而是通过自身存在的本质（以手势强调）言说自我。它们成为活生生的、具有觉知的元音与音节，意识借此得以形成物质。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I evolved to form my own entity. Ruburt will also, but he is not at that stage yet, in your terms. In another frame of reference he is, of course. He also contains those portions of himself that are less developed, for they all exist as one. All the parts of himself are aware of this correspondence. In your terms only, I could be referred to -- and I have told Ruburt this -- as a sixth self of his in his future; but this is only to get the idea across, for he will not become what I am. That is impossible. I am myself.
quotes.translation: 我进化形成了自己的存有。鲁柏也将如此，但以你们的说法，他尚未达到那个阶段。当然，在另一个参考架构中他已然达到。他也包含那些发展较不充分的自我部分，因为它们皆作为一体存在。他自身的所有部分都知晓这种对应关系。仅以你们的说法而言——我已告知鲁柏此事——我可被视为他未来中的第六个自己；但这只是为了传达概念，因为他不会成为我之所是。那是不可能的。我就是我自己。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that it ignores its earlier functions. In true expansion of consciousness then, you become more and more aware, more conscious, underlined, of inner realities that were previously never realized on a conscious level. Since the ego is presently your main vehicle of consciousness, it will not be obliterated. It will indeed be resurrected. It simply changes not only its form, but its inner core, accepting as a part of itself realities which it previously ignored out of fear, ignorance and insecurity.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着它忽视其早期功能。因此在意识的真正扩展中，你会越来越觉察、越来越有意识地（强调）认识到先前从未在意识层面实现的内在实相。由于自我目前是你主要的意识载体，它不会被抹除。它确实会复活。它改变的不仅是形式，更是内在核心，将先前因恐惧、无知与不安全感而忽视的实相接纳为自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am speaking of the portion of you who is taking part in this particular period piece, however; and that particular portion of your entire personality is so focused within this drama that you are not aware of the others in which you also play a role. You do not understand your own multidimensional reality; therefore it seems strange or unbelievable when I tell you that you live many existences at one time. It is difficult for you to imagine being in two places at once, much less in two or more times, or centuries.
quotes.translation: 然而，我指的是参与这出特定时代剧的你之部分；而你整体人格中那个特定部分如此专注于这出戏剧，以至于你未能觉察到你也扮演角色的其他戏剧。你不理解自己的多维实相；因此当我告诉你你同时经历多重存在时，这显得奇异或难以置信。你难以想象同时身处两地，更不用说同时存在于两个或更多时代、甚至不同世纪了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In a strange manner I am telling you that your "life" is simply the only portion of your existence of which you are presently aware. In greater terms, you are alive and dead at the same time, even as I am. My focus, however, is in an area that you do not perceive. Again: Existences are like notes played along certain frequencies. You are tuned in to an earth song, following this analogy, but you are only following your own melody, and usually you are unaware of the greater orchestration in which you also take part.
quotes.translation: 以一种奇特的方式，我是在告诉你：你的"生命"仅仅是你目前所觉察到的存在片段。从更宏大的角度来看，你同时活着又死去，正如我一样。然而我的焦点聚焦于你无法感知的领域。再次强调：存在如同沿着特定频率演奏的音符。依此比喻，你调频于一首地球之歌，但你只追随自己的旋律，通常未能觉察到你也参与其中的更宏大交响乐。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You must be aware of the contents of your own reasoning mind. Find the ambiguities. Regardless of the nature of your beliefs they are indeed made flesh and material. The miracle of your being cannot escape itself. Your thoughts blossom into events. If you think the world is evil, you will meet with events that seem evil. There are no accidents in cosmic terms, or in terms of the world as you know it. Your beliefs grow as surely in time and space as flowers do. When you realize this you can even feel their growing.
quotes.translation: 你必须觉察自己理性心智的内容。找出其中的矛盾之处。无论你的信念本质为何，它们确实会化为肉身与物质。你存在的奇迹无法逃避自身。你的思想绽放为事件。若你认为世界是邪恶的，便会遭遇看似邪恶的事件。就宇宙层面或你所知的世界而言，没有意外。你的信念在时空中的生长，正如花朵般确凿无疑。当你领悟这点时，甚至能感受到它们在生长。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Abilities unused by the waking personality are utilized in the dream state. A study of dream activities will often allow the waking personality to recognize abilities of which it is not aware, to discover talents that are not being used. Such a study can be most beneficial in allowing the personality to utilize all of its capabilities. There is no doubt that the whole self is a composite formed by the various aspects of the personality as it is seen in the waking and dream states, and at other levels of operation.
quotes.translation: 醒时人格未运用的能力会在梦境中被利用。研究梦境活动常能让醒时人格认识到自身未曾觉察的能力，发现未被使用的天赋。这类研究极有益处，能让人格运用其全部能力。毫无疑问，整体自己是由人格在醒时、梦境及其他运作层面的不同面向所构成的复合体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When the ego becomes a mere observer rather than a controller, and momentarily suspends its rigid judgments, then inner direct experience is given some freedom and yet the ego is still aware of it. When the ego is completely or nearly completely subjugated, as in sleep, then there is direct experience through the inner senses, but no conscious awareness of it.
quotes.translation: 当自我成为纯粹的观察者而非控制者，并暂时搁置其僵化的评判时，内在直接体验便获得某种自由，而自我仍能觉察到它。当自我完全或近乎完全被压制时（如在睡眠中），则通过内在感官获得直接体验，但对此并无意识觉察。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He (Ruburt) was bound and determined to explore the nature of reality.1 ... He wanted to protect himself until he had enough knowledge to know what he was doing. He fears for the gullibility of people, and is rightly appalled at their superstitions -- as you are, Joseph (as Seth calls me). Indeed, as Ruburt became aware of the little that is known, he wondered at his own daring. There was no one he could turn to for instruction. I could have helped him further, but I was [part of what he was investigating] ...
quotes.translation: 他（鲁柏）执意要探索实相的本质。……他想在获得足够知识以明白自身行为前保护自己。他担忧人们的轻信，并对他们的迷信感到合理震惊——正如你（约瑟，赛斯对我的称呼）一样。确实，当鲁柏意识到已知之知的微薄时，他对自己的胆大妄为感到惊异。他无人可求教。我本可进一步帮助他，但我[正是他所探究的一部分]……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 692)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: It should be obvious that there is nothing strange in the fact that the dreaming self and the waking self appear so unfamiliar to each other. The study of hypnotism will greatly enlarge man's understanding of human personality in general. These separate states of consciousness, these multiple levels of awareness, these seemingly unrelated personality aspects, are not unnatural artificial productions, brought about through hypnosis. Hypnotism is merely a method that allows you to study the personality directly.
quotes.translation: 梦中自我与醒时自我彼此如此陌生，这现象并无任何怪异之处。对催眠术的研究将极大拓展人类对人格整体的理解。这些分离的意识状态、多重觉察层次、看似无关的人格面向，并非通过催眠产生的非自然人为产物。催眠术仅是让你得以直接研究人格的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These "period pieces," overall, have a particular purpose. By the very nature of consciousness, it seeks to materialize itself in as many dimensions as possible -- to create from itself new levels of awareness, new offshoots. In doing so it creates all reality. Reality, therefore, is always in a state of becoming. The thoughts that you think, for example, in your actor's roles, are still completely unique and lead to new creativity. Certain aspects of your own consciousness could be fulfilled in no other way.
quotes.translation: 这些"时代剧"整体而言具有特定目的。意识的本性使其力求在尽可能多的维度中物质化自身——从自身创造出新的觉察层次、新的分支。在此过程中它创造了所有实相。因此实相始终处于"成为"的状态。例如，你在演员角色中所思的念头，仍完全独特并导向新的创造力。你意识的某些面向唯有通过这种方式才能得以实现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such states lead to a condition of mental, psychic and physical health and efficiency. The aware mind's great leeway through the intellect, and its connection with the senses, makes it possible for any singly insignificant event to trigger such experience. Intense focus is a characteristic of the conscious mind, and you can call it narrow because it includes only the physical dimension; but within the scope of that corporeal field it has great freedom to interpret the given dimension in any way it chooses.
quotes.translation: 这种状态会导向心智、心灵与身体的健康及效率。有觉知的心智通过智性获得极大的回旋余地，并与感官相连，这使得任何看似微不足道的事件都可能触发这种体验。专注是意识心的一大特征，你可以说它狭隘，因为它只包含了物质维度；但在这个肉体领域的范围内，它拥有极大的自由，能以任何它选择的方式来诠释这个既定维度。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I will indeed now close our session, the reason mainly being that Ruburt has been oriented in a quickened fashion toward our work since he began his book again, and he has used additional energy in doing so. I am always conscientiously aware of his condition at any time. It is only the transition here that has caused the additional use of energy, and he is readily adapting himself so that he will not be under strain. Our sessions have been highly compact as of late also, and intensified in energy content.
quotes.translation: 我现在确实要结束我们的课了，主要原因是，自从鲁柏重新开始写书以来，他以一种加速的方式专注于我们的工作，并为此消耗了额外的能量。我一直认真留意他任何时刻的状况。正是这里的过渡导致了额外的能量消耗，而他正在轻松地调整自己，以免承受压力。此外，我们近期的课也高度紧凑，能量内容也增强了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: So to rocks, say, you can be considered a portion of their environment, while you may consider them merely a portion of your environment. You simply do not tune into the range of rock consciousness. Actually (pause), many other kinds of consciousness, while focused in their own specific ways, are more aware than man is of earth's unified nature--but man, in following his own ways, also adds to the value fulfillment of all other consciousnesses in ways that are quite outside of usual systems of knowledge.
quotes.translation: 所以，对岩石来说，比如说，你可以被视为它们环境的一部分，而你可能只把它们视为你环境的一部分。你只是没有调准到岩石意识的频率。实际上（停顿），许多其他种类的意识，虽然以它们自己特定的方式聚焦，却比人类更觉知地球的统一本质——但人类，在遵循自己道路的同时，也以完全超出通常知识体系的方式，为所有其他意识的价值完成做出贡献。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now these same sort of emotional systems operate under all conditions, and they regulate the kinds of experience to which an individual is susceptible or open, and they close out from his awareness those experiences which he has already decided he will not accept. Again, the emotional attitudes have their own electromagnetic reality. This field or system will therefore attract certain experiences, close out others, allow others to come so close and no closer, as is the case with Marleno and our sessions.
quotes.translation: 现在，这些相同的情感系统在所有情况下运作，它们调节着个体容易接受或敞开的经验种类，并将那些个体已决定不接受的经验从他的觉知中排除。再次强调，情感态度有其自身的电磁实相。这个场或系统因此会吸引某些经验，排除其他经验，让另一些经验靠近到一定距离便不再靠近，就像马勒诺和我们课的情况那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Will it be possible, for example, to eliminate such causes to any astonishing degree, and therefore prolong mankind's individual existence within the physical field? This of course would lead to the further question: To what purpose would such elongation serve, in which direction would it tend? You are also aware that certain physical organisms seem to withstand this final dissolution, or hold it off for a greater period of your time. For this also there are reasons, which we will consider in due time.
quotes.translation: 例如，是否有可能将这类原因消除到惊人的程度，从而在物质领域内延长人类个体的存在？这当然会引出进一步的问题：这种延长会服务于什么目的，它会趋向哪个方向？你也知道，某些生物体似乎能抵抗这最终的解体，或在你的时间中将其推迟更久。这也有其原因，我们会在适当的时候加以探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. I have just told you that one thought must terminate before another thought can appear. Although this might sound as if I am speaking in terms of continuity, I am not. The action of our imaginary sphere upon and within itself is simultaneous, and in all directions. All actions occur basically within the spacious present, but all action cannot be aware of itself except as it attempts further action, i.e., materializations.
quotes.translation: 好了。我刚才告诉你，一个念头必须终止，另一个念头才能出现。虽然这听起来好像我在谈论连续性，但我并非如此。我们假想球体在自身之上和之内的行动是同时发生的，并且向所有方向进行。所有行动基本上都发生在广袤的当下，但除非它尝试进一步的行动，即物质化，否则所有行动都无法觉知自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: On cellular levels the body has a picture not only of its own present condition, but of all those aspects of the physical environment that affect its own condition. In its own codified fashion it is not only aware of local weather conditions, for example, but of all those world patterns of weather upon which the local area is dependent. It then prepares itself ahead of time to meet whatever challenges of adjustment will be necessary. It weighs probabilities; it reacts to pressures of various kinds.
quotes.translation: 在细胞层面上，身体不仅拥有自身当前状况的图像，还拥有所有影响其状况的物理环境方面的图像。例如，它以自身编码的方式，不仅意识到当地的天气状况，还意识到当地所依赖的所有全球天气模式。然后它提前做好准备，以应对任何必要的调整挑战。它权衡各种可能性；它对各种压力做出反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This process, you see, continues so smoothly that you are not aware of it. The pulses mentioned earlier are so short in duration that your consciousness skips over them merrily, yet your physical perception cannot seem to bridge the gap when the longer rhythm of pulsation occurs. And so this is the time that you perceive as death. What you want to know, therefore, is what happens when your consciousness is directed away from physical reality, and when momentarily it seems to have no image to wear.
quotes.translation: 你看，这个过程进行得如此顺畅，以至于你并未意识到它。前面提到的脉冲持续时间如此短暂，以至于你的意识愉快地跳过了它们，然而当较长的脉动节奏发生时，你的物理感知似乎无法跨越这个间隙。因此，这就是你感知为死亡的时间。所以，你想知道的是，当你的意识从物理现实中转移开，并且暂时似乎没有形象可穿戴时，会发生什么。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now it takes study, development, and experience before an identity can learn to hold its own stability in the face of such constant stimuli; and many of us have gotten lost, even forgetting who we were until we once more awakened to ourselves. Much of this is quite automatic to us now. In the infinite varieties of consciousness, we are still aware of a small percentage of the entire banks of personalities that exist. For our "vacations" we visit amid quite simple life forms, and blend with them.
quotes.translation: 现在，一个身份需要学习、发展和经验，才能学会在面对如此持续的刺激时保持自身的稳定性；我们中的许多人都曾迷失过，甚至忘记了自己是谁，直到我们再次觉醒。现在，这对我们来说大部分都是自动的。在意识的无限多样性中，我们仍然只意识到存在的整个个性库中的一小部分。为了我们的“假期”，我们访问简单的生命形式，并与它们融合。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As you have an ego, fully conscious, directed toward the physical world, you also have what I call an inner ego, directed toward inner reality. You have, in other words, a portion of yourself that is fully conscious in Framework 2. The ego in your ordinary world, which again we will call Framework 1, is uniquely equipped to deal with that environment. It manipulates with rules of cause and effect and consecutive moments. It deals with an objectified reality. It can stretch its capacities, becoming far more aware of inner events than it is normally allowed to do, but its main purpose is to deal with the world of effects, to encounter events.
quotes.translation: 正如你有一个完全有意识、面向物理世界的自我，你也有一个我称之为内在自我的部分，面向内在现实。换句话说，你有一部分自己在框架2中是完全有意识的。在你普通世界中的自我，我们再次称之为框架1，具有独特的装备来处理那个环境。它按照因果法则和连续时刻运作。它处理客观化的现实。它可以扩展其能力，比通常允许的更充分地意识到内在事件，但其主要目的是处理效果的世界，遭遇事件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 822, FEBRUARY 22, 1978
9:27 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: And while awareness of clairvoyance is fairly rare, it does exist; and though watered down in most instance, is a natural method of warning individuals of happenings with which their own outer senses would not be familiar. It is a natural method of protecting the individual by giving him an inner knowledge of events. Without constant clairvoyance on the part of every man and woman, existence on your plane would involve such inner, psychological insecurity that it would be completely unbearable.
quotes.translation: 虽然对千里眼的意识相当罕见，但它确实存在；尽管在大多数情况下被淡化，但它是一种自然的方法，用于警告个体那些他们外在感官不熟悉的事件。这是一种自然的方法，通过给予个体对事件的内在知识来保护他。如果没有每个男人和女人持续的千里眼，你们层面上的存在将涉及如此内在的心理不安全感，以至于完全无法忍受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These are not sharp images, but he already begins to build up ideas of shape and form. It goes without saying that the eyelids are also thus equipped. He can see through closed eyelids in other words. He is aware of light and shadow, of shape and form, though he must learn to distinguish those portions of the available field of reality that you accept as objects, from the available field that you do not accept as objects.
quotes.translation: 这些不是清晰的图像，但他已经开始构建形状和形式的观念。不用说，眼睑也具备这种能力。换句话说，他可以通过闭合的眼睑看东西。他意识到光和影、形状和形式，尽管他必须学会区分你们接受为物体的现实可用场域中的部分，与你们不接受为物体的可用场域中的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Consider this analogy. For one instant your consciousness is "alive," focused in physical reality. Now for the next instant it is focused somewhere else entirely, in a different system of reality. It is unalive, or "dead" to your way of thinking. The next instant it is "alive" again, focused in your reality, but you are not aware of the intervening instant of unaliveness. Your sense of continuity therefore is built up entirely on every other pulsation of consciousness. Is that clear to you?
quotes.translation: 请考虑这个类比。你的意识在一瞬间"活着"，聚焦于物质实相。下一瞬间它完全聚焦于别处，在另一个实相系统中。以你的思维方式来看，它"不活"或"死了"。再下一瞬间它又"活着"，聚焦于你的实相，但你并未意识到中间那个不活的瞬间。因此你的连续感完全建立在意识的每一次交替脉动上。你明白了吗？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now dolphins deal with an entirely different dimension of reality. There is as yet no method of communication that can allow you to perceive their concepts of selfhood, or their [collective] vision of existence. They are sensitive, self-aware individuals. They are altruistic. They understand the nature of relativity,6 and they have different ways of passing on information to their young. They are not higher or lower than your own species. They simply represent a different kind of selfhood.
quotes.translation: 海豚处理的是完全不同的实相维度。目前尚无任何沟通方法能让你感知它们对自我本体的概念，或它们对存在的[集体]视野。它们是敏感、具有自我意识的个体。它们利他。它们理解相对性的本质，并有不同方式将信息传递给后代。它们并不比人类物种更高或更低。它们只是代表了一种不同的自我本体。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Projections continue in the waking state, beneath it, as they continue beneath the dreaming state, you see. Now you have learned the methods at least that allow you to become aware of some projections that occur during the dream state. You realize that knowledge alone is not enough, that practice and ability play a considerable part. There are methods that will allow you to catch yourself in the middle of projections embarked upon from the waking state. This is considerably more difficult.
quotes.translation: 投射持续存在于清醒状态及其底层，正如它们持续存在于梦境状态之下。你已学会至少能让你意识到梦境状态中某些投射的方法。你明白仅有知识是不够的，实践与能力也扮演重要角色。有些方法能让你在清醒状态发起的投射中途觉察到自己。这要困难得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: [Each] cell, then, as I have often said, operates so well in time because it is, in those terms, precognitive. It is aware of the position, health, vitality, of all other cells on the face of the planet. It is aware of the position of each grain of sand on the shores of each ocean, and in those terms it forms a portion of the earth's consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，正如我常说的，每个细胞在时间中运作得如此完美，是因为用那些术语来说，它是预知的。它知道地球上所有其他细胞的位置、健康与活力。它知道每片海洋岸边每粒沙的位置，并且用那些术语来说，它构成了地球意识的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So if you want to know what my environment is like, you will have to understand what I am. In order to explain, I shall have to speak about the nature of consciousness in general. In doing so I shall end up telling you much about yourself. The inner portions of your identity are already aware of much that I will tell you. Part of my purpose is to acquaint your egotistical self with knowledge that is already known to a larger portion of your own consciousness, that you have long ignored.
quotes.translation: 所以，若你想知道我的环境是什么样子，就必须先理解我是什么。为了解释，我将不得不谈论意识的一般本质。这样做时，我最终会告诉你许多关于你自己的事。你身份的内在部分早已知晓我将告诉你的许多内容。我部分目的是让你那自我本位的自己认识你自身意识更大一部分早已知道、却长期忽视的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As you apprehend them through association you come quite close to examining the contents of your mind in a free fashion. But if you drop the time concept and then view the conscious content of your mind through other core ideas, you are still structuring. I am not saying that you should never organize those contents. I am saying that you must become aware of your own structures. Build them up or tear them down, but do not allow yourself to become blind to the furniture of your own mind.
quotes.translation: 当你通过联想来理解它们时，你相当接近以自由方式检视你心智的内容。但若你放下时间概念，再通过其他核心观念来审视心智的意识内容，你仍在构建结构。我并非说你永远不该组织那些内容。我是说你必须意识到自己的结构。建立它们或拆解它们，但不要让自己对你心智的家具视而不见。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The semitrance state does not allow a clear awareness in either world. It is passed through very quickly as a rule, both on the way into a trance and on the way out of one. It is of course a part of both realities. This goes without saying. It is true that there is much this evening that could be added to our previous discussions, but Ruburt, particularly after last nights session, should rest. And I would also suggest that he forget his psychological time experiments until next Monday.
quotes.translation: 半出神状态不允许在任何世界中拥有清晰的觉知。通常，无论是进入出神状态还是离开出神状态，都会很快地经过这个阶段。它当然属于两种现实的一部分。这是不言而喻的。今晚确实有很多内容可以补充到我们之前的讨论中，但鲁柏，特别是在昨晚的课程之后，应该休息。我也建议他暂时忘记他的心理时间实验，直到下周一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Many of you believe that it is safe to make a nuclear bomb, but that it is insane to use your dreams as another method of manipulating daily life; or that it is all right to be consciously aware of your viruses, wars, and disasters, but that it is not all right to be consciously aware of other portions of the self that could solve such problems.
quotes.translation: 你们许多人相信制造核弹是安全的，但认为利用梦境作为操控日常生活的另一种方法却是疯狂的；或者认为有意识地觉察你们的病毒、战争和灾难是可以的，但有意识地觉察能够解决这些问题的自我的其他部分却是不可以的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 这样的发展意味着将额外的能量释放并引入你们的场域中，这将带来各个方向上的无限可能性。思想和概念是非物质的实相，它们吸引未对齐的能量，引导并集中它。梦境世界更紧密地存在于那个内在自我如此觉知的广阔当下中。它不像你们自己的宇宙那样涉及伪装建构，其行动在其自身框架内也受到一定限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You will learn to take a certain portion of purpose with you through suggestion, so that you can attempt to enlarge the dream space of which you are first aware. You can extend it in other words. The investigation will always be concerned with the search for primaries and secondaries. On many occasions an apparent primary reality will later be seen to be secondary, as a result of experiments with the trance state.
quotes.translation: 你们将学会通过暗示带着一定的目的，以便尝试扩展你们最初觉知的梦境空间。换句话说，你们可以延伸它。调查将始终涉及寻找主要和次要实相。在许多情况下，一个看似主要的实相后来会被视为次要的，这是通过出神状态实验的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I would see nothing wrong, myself, with the transformation. Now: to some degree you see you are intuitively aware of Adam's true nature (to Eve here), and on an intuitive basis you even relate to the Adam you sensewithin Aerofranz, but you do not realize when you are doing this. Adam in this respect would be the superior qualities that you sometimes sensein him, the Aerofranz that you know... This does not mean that Aerofranz on his own does not have superior qualities. (Humorously.)
quotes.translation: 就我自己而言，我认为这种转变并无不妥。现在：在某种程度上，你们看到你们直觉地觉知到亚当的真实本质（对伊芙说），并且在直觉基础上，你们甚至与你们在埃罗弗朗兹内部感知到的亚当相关联，但你们在这样做时并未意识到。在这方面，亚当将是你们有时在他身上感知到的优越品质，你们所认识的埃罗弗朗兹……这并不意味着埃罗弗朗兹本身没有优越品质。（幽默地。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As soon as your focus of awareness is switched the physical symptoms will vanish. It requires a knack, but it is simpler than it sounds, and you can master it. This only requires that you give suggestions to your subconscious. Tell it that it knows how to perform this manipulation, and suggest that it do so the next time you are in difficulty.
quotes.translation: 一旦你们的觉知焦点被切换，身体症状就会消失。这需要一种技巧，但比听起来简单，你们可以掌握它。这只需要你们向潜意识下达暗示。告诉它它知道如何执行这种操控，并建议它在你们下次遇到困难时这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Genetic dreams of one kind or another continue throughout your lives, whether or not you are consciously aware of them. They were of prime importance in "man's evolution," as you think of it. They were the source of dreams, mentioned earlier, that sent man on migrations after food, that led him toward fertile land. Those dreams are most closely related to survival in physical existence, and whenever that survival seems threatened such dreams arise to consciousness whenever possible.
quotes.translation: 无论你是否清醒地意识到，各种基因梦境贯穿你的一生。在你所谓的"人类进化"中，它们具有首要重要性。它们是梦的源头——如前所述，这些梦驱使人类为寻找食物而迁徙，引领他们走向肥沃的土地。这些梦与物质生存最为密切相关，每当生存受到威胁时，这类梦便会尽可能进入意识层面。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here in Dreams Seth uses the uncertainty principle as an analogy (and an excellent one), meaning that as the positions and motions of elementary particles, say, cannot be simultaneously measured precisely, so our genetic qualities and their motions can not always be specifically determined. In Dreams he's already said (in Session 909) that the human species has an "amazing interplay between genetic preciseness and genetic freedom," and (in Session 910) that "your genetic structure reacts to each thought that you have, to the state of your emotions, to your psychological climate." Choices and probabilities apply. Thus do we avoid genetic rigidity.

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或存有始终处于流动、学习与发展的状态，这些发展关乎主观体验而非时间或空间。这并不像听起来那么神秘。我的每位读者都在玩一个游戏：自我意识假装不知道整体自我确实知道的事。既然自我绝对是整体自我的一部分，那么它必然在根本上知晓这类知识。然而，由于它极度聚焦于物质实相，便假装不知，直到它觉得能够以物质方式运用这些信息为止。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You have a greater identity outside of your context, yet a part of it is inside your context, as you. Your youness is your significance, a focus of awareness, conscious of itself, that seeks out and views experience with its own unique propensities. The existence of probable realities and probable selves in no way denies the validity of your own experience or individuality. That rides secure, choosing from unpredictable fields of actuality those that suit its own particular nature.
quotes.translation: 在你的背景之外存在一个更伟大的身份，但其一部分存在于你的背景之内，即作为你的存在。你的"你性"就是你的重要性——一个觉知的焦点，具有自我意识，以其独特倾向寻求并审视经验。可能实相与可能自我的存在，绝不否定你自身经验或个体性的有效性。这身份安然无恙，从不可预测的现实场域中选择适合其特定本性的那些。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: As I have mentioned many times, animals then dream, as do plants, insects, and all forms of life. All molecular constructions exhibit that certain kind of introspective activity, as if the inner working of some giant computer was intimately in touch not only with its own programming and the probabilities connected with it, but with a deep psychological awareness of the activities of the electrons and various visible and invisible particles that form its own physical construction.
quotes.translation: 如我多次提及，动物会做梦，植物、昆虫及所有生命形态亦然。所有分子结构都展现出那种特定的内省活动，仿佛某台巨型计算机的内部运作不仅密切关联着自身的程序及与之相关的可能性，还深刻心理觉知着构成其物质构造的电子及各种可见与不可见粒子的活动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is a sort of psychic focus, a concentration of awareness along certain lines.
