source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: In titling this chapter I used the word "mechanics," because mechanisms suggest smooth technological workings. While the world is not a machine -- its inner workings are such that no technology could ever copy them -- this involves a natural mechanics in which the inner dimensions of consciousness everywhere emerge to form a materialized, cohesive, physical existence. Again, your interpretations of identity teach you to focus awareness in such a way that you cannot follow the strands of consciousness that connect you with all portions of nature. In a way, the world is like a multidimensional, exotic plant growing in space and time, each thought, dream, imaginative encounter, hope or fear, growing naturally into its own bloom -- a plant of incredible variety, never for a moment the same, in which each smallest root, leaf, stem, or flower has a part to play and is connected with the whole.
quotes.translation: 在命名这一章时，我用了"机制"这个词，因为机制暗示着顺畅的技术运作。虽然世界不是一台机器——其内在运作是任何技术都无法复制的——但这涉及一种自然机制，其中意识的内在维度处处涌现，形成物质化的、凝聚的物理存在。再次强调，你们对身份的解读教导你们以某种方式聚焦觉知，以至于无法追踪将你们与自然所有部分相连的意识线索。从某种角度看，世界就像一株在时空里生长的多维异域植物，每个思想、梦境、想象际遇、希望或恐惧，都自然绽放成自己的花朵——一株不可思议的多样性的植物，从未有一刻相同，其中每个最微小的根、叶、茎或花都扮演着角色，并与整体相连。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Five weeks ago [in the notes leading off Session 821], I wrote that Jane could resume work on The Further Education of Oversoul Seven -- or Seven Two -- at any time. She finished her first novel about Seven in July 1972, and within a month, long before it was published, she wrote the first five chapters for Seven Two. Then we became involved in so many other projects that she laid it aside until August 1976, when she wrote two more chapters. The book has hovered in the back of her consciousness ever since, waiting until she focused her attention upon it once again. "Seven's got all the time in the world," she laughed more than once. But now that her editor, Tam Mossman, has scheduled a visit to us at the hill house in a couple of weeks [on April 10, to be exact], Jane feels that she wants to study what she's done on Seven Two, go over it with Tam, and perhaps take up work on it again.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You read your own consciousness now in a kind of vertical fashion, identifying only with certain portions of it, and it seems to you that any other organization of perception, any other recognition of identity, would quite necessarily negate your own or render it inoperable. In the beginning of the world there were numberless groupings, however, and affiliations of consciousness, many other organizations of identity that were recognized, as well as the kind of psychological orientation you have now--but [your] kind of orientation was not the paramount one. While, generally speaking, earth's species existed from the beginning in the forms by which you now know them, consciousness of species was quite different, and all species were much more intimately related through various kinds of identification that have since gone into the underground of awareness.
quotes.translation: 你们现在以一种垂直的方式阅读自己的意识，只认同其中的某些部分，似乎任何其他感知组织、任何其他身份认知，都必然会否定你们自己的身份或使其无法运作。然而在世界之初，存在着无数意识的分组和联结，许多其他身份组织被认知，还有你们现在拥有的这种心理取向——但你们这种取向并非首要的。虽然大体而言，地球物种从一开始就以你们现在所知的形式存在，但物种的意识却大不相同，所有物种通过各种后来沉入觉知地下的认同方式，彼此关系更为密切。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This tale, I admit, is far more difficult to understand than a simple story of God's creation of the world, or its actual production in a meaningless universe through the slippery hands of chance--and yet my story is more magnificent because elements of its truth will find resonance in the minds and hearts of those open enough to listen. For men's minds themselves are alive with the desire to read properly, and they are aware of their own vast heritage. It is not simply that man has a soul that is somehow blessed while the rest of him is not, but that in those terms everything [he knows], regardless of size or degree, is made of "soul stuff." Each portion has its own identity and validity--and no portion is ever annihilated or destroyed. The form may change.
quotes.translation: 我承认，这个故事比简单的上帝创造世界的故事，或世界在无意义宇宙中通过偶然之手实际产生的故事，要难理解得多——然而我的故事更为壮丽，因为其真理的元素会在那些足够开放去聆听的人的心灵中找到共鸣。因为人类的心灵本身充满正确解读的渴望，他们意识到自己庞大的遗产。并非简单地说人拥有灵魂而其他部分没有，而是用那些术语来说，他所知道的一切，无论大小或程度，都由"灵魂材料"构成。每个部分都有其自身的身份和有效性——没有任何部分会被消灭或摧毁。形式可能会改变。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are countless relationships between species that go unrecognized. The generations of all species interact. The genetic cues are not triggered on the proposition, obviously, that a species exists alone on the planet, but also in response to genetic sequences that operate in all of the species combined. The genetic system, again, is not closed nearly as much as supposed. That is, again, because the basic units of consciousness that build up matter--that form matter--are themselves endowed with a subjective acuteness. This also accounts for my earlier statement, that in usually understood terms the environment and its creatures "evolve" together. (Long pause.) Your position on the scale of awareness inclines you to categorize consciousnesses so that only your own familiar brand seems to fit the definition--so again here I remind you that consciousness is everywhere in the deepest terms, because All That Is disperses itself throughout physical reality. All portions of that reality have their own rights to existence, and purposes within it. So of course do all peoples, and the races.
quotes.translation: 物种之间存在无数未被认知的关系。所有物种的世代都在互动。基因线索显然不是基于物种单独存在于地球上的假设而被触发，而是也对所有物种组合中运作的基因序列做出回应。基因系统再次被证明远不如人们假设的那样封闭。这是因为构成物质——形成物质——的意识基本单位本身就被赋予了主观的敏锐性。这也解释了我之前的陈述：在通常理解的意义上，环境及其生物是"共同进化"的。（长停顿。）你们在觉知尺度上的位置使你们倾向于对意识进行分类，以至于只有你们自己熟悉的那种才符合定义——所以在此我再次提醒你们，在最深层的意义上，意识无处不在，因为一切万有将自己分散在整个物质现实中。该现实的所有部分都有其存在的权利和目的。当然，所有民族和种族也是如此。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I hope you see what I have done here. I have initiated the idea of motion, for true transparency is not the ability to see through but to move through. This is what I mean by fifth dimension. Now, remove the structure of the wires and cubes. Things behave as though the wires and cubes were there, but these were only constructions necessary even to those on my plane in order to make things comprehensible to our faculties, the faculties of any entity. We construct images consistent with the senses we happen to have at a particular time. I have more senses, so to speak, in operating use that is, than you have, because not only am I aware of my own plane but of yours and other parallel planes, even though I myself have not existed in some of those parallel planes.
quotes.translation: 我希望你们明白我在这里做了什么。我引入了运动的概念，因为真正的透明不是看穿的能力，而是穿越的能力。这就是我所说的第五维度。现在，移除电线和立方体的结构。事物表现得好像电线和立方体还在那里，但这些甚至对我所在层面的存在来说，也只是为了让事物对我们的官能——任何实体的官能——可理解而必要的建构。我们建构与我们在特定时刻所拥有的感官一致的意象。可以说，我在运作中使用的感官比你们多，因为我不仅意识到自己的层面，还意识到你们的层面和其他平行层面，即使我自己并未存在于某些平行层面中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Every thought in one way or another is constructed by you in physical terms. You cannot escape the result of one thought. Every thought is an actuality. It affects every action and it forms your physical environment. As you sit listening to my voice, you are all subconsciously forming the physical environment of your classroom. You are forming the physical chairs. You are forming the blackboard. You are all forming reality, as you know it. Then with your physical senses, you are perceiving that which you have already so created. If you do not like what you see, then who is to blame? For these are your own constructions , formed in faithful replica to your own thoughts. We do not have the time to explain now how this is done, but in the material we have explained it. Certain telepathic connections exist which are what we term root assumptions, of which you are all telepathically aware. Using these you form a physical environment that is cohesive enough so that you can all agree with what you see and feel and smell and touch.
quotes.translation: 每一个念头，无论以何种方式，都是由你以物质形式构建的。你无法逃脱任何一个念头的后果。每一个念头都是一个实相。它影响每一个行动，并塑造你的物质环境。当你坐着听我说话时，你们都在潜意识中构建着你们教室的物质环境。你们在构建物质性的椅子。你们在构建黑板。你们都在构建你们所知的实相。然后，你们用你们的物质感官，去感知你们已经创造出来的东西。如果你不喜欢你所看到的，那么该怪谁呢？因为这些都是你自己的构建，忠实地复制了你自己的念头。我们现在没有时间解释这是如何做到的，但在资料中我们已经解释过了。存在某些心灵感应上的联系，我们称之为根本假设，你们所有人都能通过心灵感应意识到它们。利用这些，你们构建了一个足够连贯的物质环境，这样你们都能对所见、所感、所闻、所触达成一致。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: And good evening to our friend. I do have some remarks for you and I hope that they will be helpful. You must remember to hold your head up. You should know better than to cower when you come here. I have no whip; and I would not use one if I had one. You are not sure enough of your own abilities or of your own worth. You cannot drive through physical life in the same way that you drive your car down the highway. You shall indeed, get traffic tickets and of a different kind, only you yourself give yourself tickets. You cannot force reality to give you what you want. You cannot manipulate events for egotistical purposes. You can manipulate events and you can manipulate them for your own egotistical purposes; but when you do so, you give yourself a traffic ticket. You must want what is best for your own development and the development of others rather than specifically determining what you think consciously is better for you and then trying to force or coerce fate to get this for you. If you want what is best for your own development and what is best for the development of others, then you shall attain it. It shall come to you effortlessly. I am leading up to certain issues here. You are not always aware of what is best for you on a conscious level. Often the person that you think you want or need is not the person you want or need on other levels. When you drive your car you often attempt to speed through reality as quickly as you can, and you are pleased with yourself as the driver of the vehicle. You like driving because you feel that it gets you where you want to go and quickly, and you do not mind breaking a few small rules of the road in the process. Now the small rules that you break, are indeed, minute ones. It is not that you break a specific rule; it is the attitude that allows you to break the rule; and this applies to other roads beside the physical highway. You want to get to your destination too quickly. The destination is within you. You do not have to go any place to get that destination; and it is only when you think that that destination lies elsewhere that you allow yourself to go astray. Your identity is within you and do not look for it in others. This is perhaps the strongest point of my message to you this evening, the one I would have you take to heart. When you realize that your own identity is within you will not spend energy seeking to find yourself in others. Others cannot give you a sense of worth; this is your own. Any lack is your own lack. I may perhaps deal with more specific issues this evening. But I will not discuss them until these points have been made.
quotes.translation: 晚上好，我们的朋友。我确实有些话要对你说，希望它们能有所帮助。你必须记住要抬起头来。你来这里时，应该知道不该畏缩。我没有鞭子；就算有，我也不会用。你对自己的能力或价值不够确信。你不能像在高速公路上开车那样，强行穿越物质生命。你确实会收到交通罚单，而且是另一种类型的，只是这些罚单是你自己开给自己的。你不能强迫实相给你想要的东西。你不能为了自我中心的目的而操纵事件。你可以操纵事件，也可以为了自我中心的目的而操纵它们；但当你这样做时，你就给自己开了一张交通罚单。你必须想要对你自身发展以及他人发展最有利的东西，而不是具体地决定你意识上认为什么对你更好，然后试图强迫或胁迫命运为你得到它。如果你想要对你自身发展最有利的东西，以及对他人发展最有利的东西，那么你就会得到它。它会毫不费力地来到你身边。我在这里要引出某些议题。你在意识层面并不总是知道什么对你最有利。通常，你认为你想要或需要的那个人，并非你在其他层面上想要或需要的那个人。当你开车时，你常常试图尽可能快地穿越实相，并且你作为车辆的驾驶者，对自己感到满意。你喜欢开车，因为你感觉它能让你快速到达想去的地方，并且在这个过程中，你并不介意违反一些小的交通规则。现在，你违反的那些小规则，确实是很小的。问题不在于你违反了某个具体规则；而在于允许你违反规则的那种态度；这同样适用于物质高速公路以外的其他道路。你太急于到达你的目的地。目的地就在你之内。你不需要去任何地方就能到达那个目的地；只有当你认为那个目的地存在于别处时，你才会让自己误入歧途。你的身份认同就在你之内，不要到别人那里去寻找它。这或许是我今晚对你传达的信息中最强有力的一点，也是我希望你铭记于心的一点。当你意识到你自己的身份认同就在你之内时，你就不会花费精力去试图在别人身上找到自己。别人无法给你一种价值感；这是你自己的。任何匮乏都是你自己的匮乏。我今晚或许会处理一些更具体的问题。但在这些要点被阐明之前，我不会讨论它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Now you have indeed been doing well. And I do congratulate you. You are too impatient both with your own development and the development of others. You want your destination now and you want to get to that destination as quickly as possible, 8595 miles a minute, you see. You have given yourself several traffic tickets. Now, you have learned a good deal, and I know that you have tried. It does no good to understand issues intellectually, however, or even to understand them intuitively unless you understand them so thoroughly that they become a part of your daily life. Much that you know you have made a part of your life, but you still wish to use your knowledge for your own conscious purposes. You are still not willing to say let me develop as I should develop. You are still saying let me develop as I think I should develop. The I being a highly egotistical I. You are still saying, let me develop as I want to develop. You are still saying I want this person or I want that person or that thing. Therefore shall I use this ability and this knowledge to gai，，n it. And that is why you have given yourself a traffic ticket now and then。What you are learning is a technique for self development. You cannot use it, therefore, to attain those things that do not pertain to your own self development and the techniques will not help you get something that you were not meant to have nor that you have before decided as an entity that you should not have. I will leave specifics for later. Nevertheless, the facts remain that your own inner self and your own entity have given you challenges that you have accepted. Now you know these challenges; subconsciously you are aware of them. Consciously you do not want to accept them and this is one reason why you have had difficulty with the pendulum. This is not out of the ordinary. This happens to many personalities. It is nothing to blame yourself for. You are certainly in the midst of a certain line of development. You cannot blame yourself for not being further along the line. The very fact that you are here this evening, the very fact that you are trying as hard as you have been shows that you are indeed developing and that you are indeed learning. There must be an open-minded, an openhearted attitude here. You must not try to use what you have learned in a narrow, limiting way. This hampers your own development. It closes your eyes to many possibilities that will be important to you. It is natural, perhaps, to want to use what you have learned, this information, as a technique to achieve what you at any particular time think desirable, a particular person, a particular thing. But what is important is the inner development. If this is taken care of, it will automatically lead you to the person that is best for you and to the circumstances that will help you develop. To insist that a specific individual or a specific goal be attained through these methods is limiting. There must always be the acknowledgement that you do not consciously as yet realize the depths of yourself, the goals you have set and the challenges, and this material should be used to open up your inner horizons and to lead you in those directions toward which your inner self has already set you. If you then egotistically, say--No--this particular situation is what I want, then you may be blocking the inner direction which has been meant for you. I said I would discuss some particular material and so I shall shortly. But the inner attitude is far more important. I suggest, Joseph, that you take a break and I shall continue.
quotes.translation: 现在，你确实做得不错。我确实要祝贺你。你对自己和他人的发展都太缺乏耐心了。你现在就想要你的目的地，并且想以最快速度到达那个目的地，每分钟8595英里，你看。你给自己开了好几张交通罚单。现在，你已经学到了很多东西，我知道你已经努力了。然而，仅仅在理智上理解问题是没有用的，甚至直觉上理解它们也没有用，除非你理解得如此透彻，以至于它们成为你日常生活的一部分。你所知道的很多东西，你已经让它们成为了你生活的一部分，但你仍然希望为了自己有意识的目的而使用你的知识。你仍然不愿意说，让我按照我应该发展的方式发展。你仍然在说，让我按照我认为我应该发展的方式发展。这个“我”是一个高度自我中心的“我”。你仍然在说，让我按照我想要的方式发展。你仍然在说，我想要这个人，或者我想要那个人，或者那件事。因此，我要用这种能力和知识去得到它。这就是为什么你时不时给自己开一张交通罚单。你正在学习的是自我发展的技巧。因此，你不能用它来获得那些与你自身自我发展无关的东西，这些技巧也不会帮助你得到那些你本不该拥有、或者你作为存有之前已经决定不该拥有的东西。具体的细节我稍后再谈。然而，事实仍然是，你内在的自己和你的存有给了你一些你已经接受的挑战。现在你知道这些挑战；你在潜意识中意识到它们。在意识上你不想接受它们，这就是你在使用摆锤时遇到困难的原因之一。这并不反常。这种情况发生在许多人格身上。这没什么好自责的。你当然正处在某条特定的发展路线之中。你不能因为自己还没有在这条路上走得更远而自责。你今晚在这里的事实，你一直如此努力尝试的事实，都表明你确实在发展，确实在学习。这里必须有一种开放的心态，一种开放的心胸。你不能试图以狭隘、限制的方式使用你所学到的东西。这会阻碍你自己的发展。它会让你对许多对你来说很重要的可能性视而不见。想要把你所学到的这些信息作为一种技巧，用来获得你在任何特定时间认为可取的东西——某个特定的人、某个特定的事物——这或许是自然的。但重要的是内在的发展。如果这一点处理好了，它会自动引导你找到最适合你的人，以及有助于你发展的环境。坚持要通过这些方法达到某个特定的个体或特定的目标是有限制性的。必须始终承认，你尚未有意识地认识到你自己的深度、你设定的目标和挑战，而这些资料应该被用来打开你内在的视野，并引导你走向你的内在自我已经为你设定的那些方向。如果你随后以自我中心的方式说——不——这个特定的情况就是我想要的，那么你可能就在阻碍为你设定的内在方向。我说过我会讨论一些具体的资料，我很快就会说。但内在的态度要重要得多。我建议，约瑟夫，你休息一下，我稍后再继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: He did voluntarily choose to be born as a son in this existence. Now he rationalizes on a conscious level his reasons for remaining home. You said earlier that around the school there was the expression he "loves them and leaves them". You see, a very cruel interpretation and a very literal interpretation of his action in a past life, this coming through in an entirely different situation in this life. He is, of course, aware subconsciously of this and acts in such a way for he feels more honest. Through his actions in this life he is trying to make an honest statement about actions in the past. There is, of course, no punishment involved. His secrecy also is a direct result of these past existences, for once he spoke too much and betrayed too much, so now he remains secretive about matters that he considers important. The two brothers never did hold him responsible, however. They understood the situation. They knew that the girl had been terrified and spoke only out of fear and did not mean to betray them. In this life, then, the parents do not mean to hold him. They are not subconsciously trying to chain him; they are not subconsciously trying to bind him. He has chosen to act in this particular manner. He would be much freer if he'd realize that the brothers do not hold him responsible. And the betrayal, while a betrayal, was understandable, and that he spoke out of fear and did not intend to betray. If you will forgive me, I do not think we should use time in the session with your question about your friends poetry. It is not important in comparison to other information, nor is it important to the man's development, nor to your own. Now I know that you speak of me highly; and if I wore a hat, I would tip it to you. You are helping other people and you will continue to do so. Now that you have some insight into the reasons for certain difficulties, you can begin to do something about them. Your problem is not with your Mr. Reed. Your problem is to rid yourself of the image that you have that you project upon him.
quotes.translation: 他确实是自愿选择在这一世出生为儿子的。现在他在意识层面合理化他留在家里的理由。你之前说过，在学校里流传着关于他“爱他们然后离开他们”的说法。你看，这是对他前世行为的一种非常残酷且非常字面的解释，这一世以一种完全不同的情境表现出来。他当然在潜意识中意识到了这一点，并以这种方式行事，因为他觉得这样更诚实。通过他这一世的行为，他试图对过去的行为做出一个诚实的声明。当然，这其中不涉及惩罚。他的保密行为也是这些过去存在的直接结果，因为他曾经话太多，泄露了太多，所以现在他对自认为重要的事情保持缄默。然而，那两个兄弟从未让他承担责任。他们理解当时的情况。他们知道那个女孩被吓坏了，只是出于恐惧才说出来，并非有意背叛他们。那么在这一世，父母也并非有意要束缚他。他们并非在潜意识中试图用锁链锁住他；他们并非在潜意识中试图捆绑他。是他自己选择了以这种特定的方式行事。如果他意识到那两个兄弟并没有让他承担责任，他会自由得多。而且那次背叛，虽然是背叛，但也是可以理解的，他是出于恐惧才说出来，并非有意背叛。如果你原谅我，我不认为我们应该用这次课程的时间来处理你关于朋友诗歌的问题。与其他信息相比，它并不重要，对那个人的发展不重要，对你自己的发展也不重要。现在，我知道你对我评价很高；如果我戴帽子的话，我会向你脱帽致敬。你正在帮助其他人，并且你会继续这样做。既然你对某些困难的原因有了一些洞察，你就可以开始着手处理它们了。你的问题不在于你的里德先生。你的问题在于摆脱你投射在他身上的那个形象。

quotes.text: You spoke earlier of tragedies, and I do not understand you. Great work stands alone. It is a triumph of the human spirit, and it always grows out of experience. As an egotistical creature, alone, you would not choose the experience, even though great work resulted from it. (Smile, and intent delivery.) Learning involves your whole being. Great work is a result of great learning. It is not the result of seeing easy answers scribbled magically upon a blackboard. The flowers thrust themselves up through soil, but they hardly consider the soil or thrusting a tragedy, nor resent the time spent in the frozen earth, for they realize the frozen earth is a condition of their blossoming--a challenge that is an aid, not a hindrance. The light does not resent the darkness which it illuminates, you see? Your inner self is aware of this.
quotes.translation: 你之前谈到悲剧，我不理解你。伟大的作品是独立的。它是人类精神的胜利，并且总是源于经验。作为一个孤立的、自我中心的生物，你不会选择那种经验，即使伟大的作品由此而生。（微笑，并专注地传达。）学习涉及你的整个存在。伟大的作品是伟大学习的结果。它不是看到轻易的答案被神奇地涂写在黑板上的结果。花朵奋力穿过泥土，但它们几乎不认为泥土或奋力是悲剧，也不怨恨在冰冻的泥土中度过的时光，因为它们意识到冰冻的泥土是它们绽放的条件——一个挑战，是助力而非阻碍。光明不会怨恨它所照亮的黑暗，你明白吗？你的内在自我是知道这一点的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now there is a reason why these lessons must be learned in just this way. Elementally there is only creativity. Destruction is merely the changing of form. A cloudburst or a tornado knows nothing of destruction. This same energy encased within a human form is something else. There are different kinds of creativity, then, to learn, and a specialization in energy is focus and feelings that emerge; elemental energy becoming conscious of itself, and aware of issues that did not exist for it earlier; millions of molecules momentarily united with the living consciousness (Pause), filled with primal energy, now learning love, and forming highly sensitive psychic patterns, electrical charges that now form emotions instead of clouds; the innocent chaos of undifferentiated personality that exists behind the highly specified and truly sophisticated mechanism of one thought. And all of this before an individual is born within your system. In terms of time this is behind us all.
quotes.translation: 这些课程必须以这种方式来学习，是有原因的。在元素层面，只有创造力。毁灭仅仅是形式的改变。一场暴雨或龙卷风对毁灭一无所知。同样的能量包裹在人类形态中，则是另一回事。因此，有不同类型的创造力需要学习，而能量的专门化是焦点和涌现的情感；元素能量开始意识到自身，并意识到之前对它来说并不存在的议题；数百万个分子瞬间与活生生的意识结合（停顿），充满了原始能量，现在正在学习爱，并形成高度敏感的心灵模式，这些电荷现在形成情感而非云朵；存在于一个高度专门化且真正复杂的念头机制背后的、未分化的、天真混沌的人格。而所有这一切，都发生在一个个体诞生于你的系统之前。从时间角度来看，这一切都在我们所有人的背后。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The portrait is of Joseph and Ruburt. These are not portraits of yourselves as past personalities in your terms, or of particular re-incarnational selves. They are pictorial representatives of the whole selves that you are. In your terms the selves that are the sum of your re-incarnational personalities. These whole selves then are a part of your entity. Your probable selves are also a part of your entity, however. If you want to think in terms of guides, in quotes "angels," then you have the reality behind those terms. Ruburt and Joseph are the names I use for you, for these names themselves imply your greater goals. These personalities are aware of your present existence, and give you advice when you are in the sleep state. They are a source of strength. You can draw upon their knowledge, and you can also draw upon the knowledge of your own re-incarnational selves, past, in quotes, and future.
quotes.translation: 这幅肖像是约瑟和鲁柏。这些并非你们所谓过去人格的肖像，也不是特定转世自我的肖像。它们是你们所是的整体自我的图像化呈现。用你们的话说，这些自我是你们所有转世人格的总和。这些整体自我是你们存有的一部分。然而，你们的可能性自我也是存有的一部分。如果你们想用指导者、所谓的"天使"来思考，那么这些术语背后确实存在实相。鲁柏和约瑟是我对你们使用的名字，因为这些名字本身就暗示了你们更伟大的目标。这些人格知晓你们当前的存在，并在你们处于睡眠状态时给予建议。他们是力量的源泉。你们可以汲取他们的知识，也可以汲取你们自己所谓"过去"和"未来"转世自我的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In your terms, the person at birth is affected by multidimensional conditions, and the collective position of the planets is but one very minute indication of the other realities involved. Ruburt is correct: Even in conventional terms a true horoscope would have to involve the time of death in your temporal reality, as well [as that of birth]. Your focus of attention forms boundaries that predispose you to believe in a point at which your consciousness emerges, as you understand it, and a point when it is no longer effective, or dies. Your beliefs in such concepts limit your perception, for by altering the focus of your attention you can to some extent become aware of perception before and after the recognized points of birth and death.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话说，出生时的人受到多维条件的影响，而行星的集体位置只是所涉及的其他实相中一个极其微小的指示。鲁柏是正确的：即使按照传统说法，真正的星盘也必须涉及你们时间实相中的死亡时间，以及出生时间。你们的注意力焦点形成了界限，使你们倾向于相信有一个你们所理解的意识出现的时刻，以及一个它不再有效或死亡的时刻。你们对这些概念的信念限制了你们的感知，因为通过改变注意力的焦点，你们可以在某种程度上意识到公认的出生和死亡点之前和之后的感知。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A bond of hate will unite you, but the bond was originally based upon love. In this case however you aggravate and exaggerate all those differences from the ideal, and focus upon them predominantly. In any given case all of this is consciously available to you. It requires only an honest and determined attempt to become aware of your own feelings and beliefs. Even your hateful fantasies, left alone, will return you to a reconciliation and release love.
quotes.translation: 仇恨的纽带会将你们联结，但这纽带最初是基于爱。然而在这种情况下，你们会加剧并夸大所有与理想之间的差异，并主要聚焦于这些差异。在任何特定情况下，所有这些你们都可以有意识地获得。只需要诚实而坚定的尝试，去觉察自己的感受和信念。即使你们充满仇恨的幻想，如果任其自然，也会将你们带回和解并释放爱。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The outer ego is not continuously, in your terms, aware of anything. It frequently forgets itself. When it becomes swept up in a strong emotion it seems to lose itself. There is unity then but no sense of apartness. When it most vigorously maintains its sense of individuality it is no longer aware of unity-with.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话说，外在自我并非持续地觉察任何事物。它经常忘记自己。当它被强烈情绪席卷时，似乎会迷失自我。那时存在统一性，但没有分离感。当它最强烈地维持个体感时，就不再觉察与整体的合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Before children are acquainted with conventional ideas of guilt and punishment, they realize that it is easier to bring about good events, through wishing, than it is to bring about unhappy ones. The child carries with him [or her] the impetus and supporting energy provided him at birth from Framework 2, and he knows intuitively that desires conducive to his development "happen" easier than those that are not. His natural impulses naturally lead him toward the development of his body and mind, and he is aware of a cushioning effect and support as he acts in accordance with those inner impulses. The child is innately honest. When he gets sick he intuitively knows the reason why, and he knows quite well that he brought about the illness.
quotes.translation: 在孩子们熟悉传统的罪恶与惩罚观念之前，他们意识到通过愿望带来好事比带来坏事更容易。孩子带着框架二在出生时提供的动力和支持能量，并且直觉地知道有利于其发展的愿望比那些不利的愿望"更容易发生"。他们的自然冲动自然引导他们发展身心，并且当他们按照这些内在冲动行动时，会意识到一种缓冲效应和支持。孩子天生诚实。当他们生病时，他们直觉地知道原因，并且很清楚是自己导致了疾病。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 824, MARCH 1, 1978
9:40 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: As temperatures in various depths of ocean change, and as even the color of the water and of the flora and fauna change, so too in our value climate there are quality changes, and senses equipped to project and perceive the changes. There are distortions because of the limitations of the outer senses, but the inner senses do not distort. The inner senses inhabit directly the atmosphere of our value climate; and they see through the ever varying camouflage patterns, and the flux and flow of apparent change. In our sessions to some small degree you plunge into this ocean of value climate, and to the extent that you are able to divest yourselves of the clothes of camouflage, to that extent can you truly be aware of this climate.
quotes.translation: 正如海洋不同深度的温度变化，甚至水色及动植物颜色变化一样，在我们的价值气候中也有品质的变化，以及配备来投射和感知这些变化的感官。由于外在感官的限制存在扭曲，但内在感官不会扭曲。内在感官直接栖息于我们价值气候的氛围中；它们看穿不断变化的伪装模式，以及表面变化的流动与变迁。在我们的课程中，你们在一定程度上潜入这个价值气候的海洋，而你们能够脱去伪装衣物的程度，就是你们真正能觉察这个气候的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In your terms, obviously, atoms do not dream of cats chasing dogs, yet (intently) there are indeed "lapses" from physical focus that are analogous to your dreaming state. Give us a moment ... In those conditions the atoms pursue their own probable activities, and indeed make astounding calculations, bringing into your actuality the necessary probable actions to insure official life forms. But neither are they limited otherwise, for their other probable directions are also actualized. Period. On different levels in the dream state, then, you are also subjectively aware of other probable realities. Your conscious intent is unconsciously brought into the dreaming condition, and that intent helps you sort the data. (See Note 4.)
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，显然原子不会梦见猫追狗，但（专注地）确实存在与你们做梦状态类似的"脱离"物理焦点的情况。请稍等片刻……在这些状态下，原子会追寻它们自身的可能活动，并确实进行惊人的计算，将必要的可能行动带入你们的现实，以确保官方生命形态的存续。但它们也并非仅受此限制，因为它们的其他可能方向同样被实现了。句号。因此在梦境状态的不同层次中，你们也主观地意识到其他可能实相。你们有意识的意图会无意识地被带入做梦状态，而该意图会帮助你们筛选数据。（见注4）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 699
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I am not saying that words cannot be used to describe the psyche, but they cannot define it. It is futile to question: "What is the difference between my psyche and my soul, my entity and my greater being?" for all of these are terms used in an effort to express the greater portions of your own experience that you sense within yourself. Your use of language may make you impatient for definitions, however. Hopefully this book will allow you some intimate awareness, some definite experience, that will acquaint you with the nature of your own psyche, and then you will see that its reality escapes all definitions, defies all categorizing, and shoves aside with exuberant creativity all attempts to wrap it up in a neat package.
quotes.translation: 我并非说无法用语言描述心灵，但语言无法定义它。追问"我的心灵与我的灵魂、我的存有与我的更大存在之间有何区别？"是徒劳的——所有这些术语都试图表达你们在自身内部感知到的更广大经验。然而，你们对语言的使用可能使你们急于寻求定义。希望本书能让你们获得某种亲密觉知、某种明确体验，使你们熟悉自身心灵的本质，届时你们将明白，它的实相超越一切定义，抗拒所有分类，并以蓬勃的创造力将所有试图将其包裹成整洁包裹的尝试推至一旁。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner self is always aware of the hidden mechanisms of these family gestalts. Those who have been closely bound through emotional ties often prefer to remain in closely tied or loosely tied physical relationships that continue through many lifetimes. New relationships are always encouraged however, for you can have ingrown reincarnational "families." Many of these form physical organizations that are actually manifestations of inner groupings.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终觉知这些家族完形的隐藏机制。那些通过情感纽带紧密相连的人，往往倾向于维持松散或紧密的物理关系，这些关系会延续许多世。然而，新关系始终受到鼓励，因为你们可能形成内向的转世"家族"。其中许多家族会形成物理组织，这些组织实际上是内在群体的显化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As temperatures in various depths of ocean change, and as even the color of the water and of the flora and fauna change, so too in our value climate there are quality changes, and senses equipped to project and perceive the changes. There are distortions because of the limitations of the outer senses, but the inner senses1 do not distort. The inner senses inhabit directly the atmosphere of our value climate; they see through the ever-varying camouflage (physical) patterns, and the flux and flow of apparent change. To some small degree in our sessions you plunge into this ocean of value climate, and to the extent that you are able to divest yourselves of the clothes of camouflage, you can be truly aware of this climate.
quotes.translation: 正如海洋不同深度的温度会变化，甚至海水及动植物的颜色也会变化，同样地，在我们的价值气候中存在着品质变化，以及配备来投射和感知这些变化的感官。由于外在感官的限制会产生扭曲，但内在感官不会扭曲。内在感官直接栖居于我们价值气候的氛围中；它们看穿不断变化的伪装（物理）模式，以及表面变化的流动与变迁。在我们的课程中，你们会小程度地潜入这个价值气候的海洋，而你们若能卸下伪装的外衣，便能真正觉知这种气候。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: At another meeting some other aspects were made known to you, Philip, of which you may not be consciously aware. A vague but definite connection to Dayton, OH, here. A man with connections with Dayton, OH will be involved with a change in your company. We speak in terms of probabilities. Nevertheless no actions thus far have occurred to drastically change any of the predicted events, and unless actions are so initiated events will occur as given.
quotes.translation: 在另一次会面中，菲利普，你被告知了其他一些方面，这些方面你可能并未有意识地察觉。此处与俄亥俄州代顿市存在模糊但明确的关联。一位与代顿市有联系的人将参与你公司的一项变革。我们以可能性的方式谈论。然而，迄今为止尚未发生任何会大幅改变任何预测事件的行为，除非这些行为被启动，否则事件将如所述般发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Putting this as simply as possible, your actual experience is far too vast for you to physically follow. Your particular kind of consciousness is the result of specialized focus within a particular area. You imagine it to be "absolute," in that it seems to involve an all-exclusive state that includes your identity as you think of it -- only you give it boundaries like a kingdom. It is, instead, a certain kind of organization that is indeed inviolate even while it is itself a portion of other kinds of consciousnesses, with their own points of focus. Your body itself is composed of self-aware organizations of consciousness that escape your notice and deal with perceptual material utterly alien to your own ways.
quotes.translation: 尽可能简单地说明：你们的实际经验过于浩瀚，以至于无法以物理方式追随。你们特定类型的意识是特定领域内专注聚焦的结果。你们将其想象为"绝对的"，因为它似乎涉及一种包含你们所认为的自我身份的全包性状态——你们只给它划定了如王国般的边界。然而，它实际上是一种特定的组织，即使它本身是其他类型意识（各有其焦点）的一部分，这种组织也确实是不可侵犯的。你们的身体本身由自我觉知的意识组织构成，这些组织逃过你们的注意，处理着与你们自身方式完全陌生的感知材料。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt knew that Helper could be sent out to others, to their advantage, and in that regard the form stood for the great power of natural, positive desire and thought patterns. (To me:) You have the same kind of "form." These represent the greater source-selves out of which your present persons spring. I told you that you possessed far more knowledge about your own lives, and the lives of others, than you were intellectually aware of.2 You act on that knowledge, for one thing, when you are born physically, when you grow. The squirrel acts on that kind of knowledge when it buries nuts--as you saw, again, on a recent TV program--and the squirrel's greater knowledge includes the knowledge of its species as well.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏知道"帮手"可以被派往他人处，对他们有益，就此而言，这个形态代表了自然、积极欲望与思维模式的强大力量。（对我而言：）你拥有同样类型的"形态"。这些代表着更大的源头自己，你们当前的人格从中涌现。我告诉过你，你对自己生命及他人生命所拥有的知识，远比你理智上意识到的要多得多。你依据这些知识行动——举例而言，当你肉身出生、成长时便是如此。松鼠埋藏坚果时也依据这类知识行动（正如你最近在电视节目中所见），而松鼠的更大知识还包括了对其物种的知识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You construct your own camouflage existence as the spider constructs his web, but you are not aware of the threads. You do not understand that they originate within yourself, although it is very simple to smile as the lowly spider weaves its web. The spiders construction is severely limited to one plane, but this is not the case with your constructions, which may have reality on many planes at once, and in ways with which you are not familiar.
quotes.translation: 你构建自己的伪装实相，如同蜘蛛编织它的网，但你并未意识到那些丝线。你不明白它们源于你自身，尽管看着卑微的蜘蛛织网时微笑是件简单的事。蜘蛛的构造严格局限于单一平面，但你的构造并非如此——它们可能同时在许多平面上具有实相，且以你不熟悉的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The imagination can vaguely perceive, of course, some probabilities, but the physical organism can directly experience but one of these within physical time, and in terms of continuity. The probable events however are precisely as real as that one event which is chosen from them to be a physical experience. And these events therefore become "real", in quotes, within other dimensions. As a sideline here, there are some interesting episodes, not at all understood, when a severe psychological shock, or even a deep sense of unendurable futility, will cause a short circuit, so to speak, so that one portion of the self becomes aware, and begins to experience reality as it exists for another portion of the self.
quotes.translation: 想象力当然能模糊地感知某些可能性，但肉体组织在物理时间内，只能以连续性的方式直接体验其中一种可能性。然而，那些可能事件与被选中成为物理体验的那一事件同样真实。因此，这些事件在其他维度中变成了"真实"（带引号）。作为旁注，存在一些有趣的插曲——当严重的心理冲击或甚至深沉的、无法忍受的徒劳感造成所谓"短路"时，自我的一部分会开始觉察并体验另一部分自我所存在的实相——这些现象完全未被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is no reason why mankind cannot be aware of this transformation, if once he admits into existence the whole self which makes this possible. As I mentioned earlier the process of breathing seems automatic, and yet some part of you is aware of the most minute portions of air that inflate the lungs.
quotes.translation: 人类没有理由不能意识到这种转化——只要他肯承认使这成为可能的整体自己的存在。如我之前所述，呼吸过程看似自动，但你某部分自己却觉察着充盈肺部的每一丝最细微空气。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ego consciousness must now be familiarized with its roots, or it will turn into something else. You are in a position where your private experience of yourself does not correlate with what you are told by your societies, churches, sciences, archaeologies, or other disciplines. Man's "unconscious" knowledge is becoming more and more consciously apparent. This will be done under and with the direction of an enlightened and expanding egotistical awareness (much louder), that can organize the hereto neglected knowledge -- or it will be done at the expense of the reasoning intellect (again louder), leading to a rebirth of superstition, chaos, and the unnecessary war between reason and intuitive knowledge.
quotes.translation: 自我意识现在必须熟悉其根源，否则它将蜕变为别的东西。你正处于这样的境地：你对自己的私人经验与社会、教会、科学、考古学或其他学科告诉你的内容并不相符。人类的"无意识"知识正越来越有意识地显现。这将在开明且扩展的自我觉察（更大声）指导下完成——它能组织起迄今被忽视的知识；否则，这将牺牲理性智性（再次更大声）为代价，导致迷信重生、混乱，以及理性与直觉知识间不必要的战争。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I am aware of a different kind of experience, not linear, and can focus upon and react to an infinite variety of simultaneous events. Ruburt could not express them, and so they must be leveled out into linear expression if they are to be communicated. This ability to perceive and react to unlimited simultaneous events is a basic characteristic of each whole self or entity. Therefore, I do not claim it as some feat that is exclusively my own.
quotes.translation: 我觉察到一种非线性的不同经验，能聚焦并回应无限多样的同步事件。鲁柏无法表达它们，因此若要沟通，它们必须被拉平为线性表达。这种感知并回应无限同步事件的能力，是每个整体自己或存有的基本特性。因此，我并不声称这是独属于我的某种绝技。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As there are portions of reality that you do not consciously perceive, and other systems of probability of which you are not consciously aware, so also are there aspects of primary godhood that you cannot at this moment comprehend. There are, therefore, probable gods, each one reflecting in its way the multidimensional aspects of a prime identity so great and dazzling that no one reality form or particular kind of existence could contain it.
quotes.translation: 既然实相中有你们尚未有意识地感知的部分，也有你们尚未有意识地觉察的其他可能性系统，那么同样地，神性本源中也有你们此刻无法理解的面向。因此存在着各种可能的神祇，每一位都以自己的方式映照出那无比浩瀚耀眼的本源身份的多维面向——没有任何单一实相形态或特定存在形式能够容纳它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （l have long been aware that the yoga exercises have a powerful effect on me personally, and that I evidently end up in a dissociated state at times after doing them. I have neither encouraged or discouraged this effect. I have had the experience of hearing voices before but have not asked Seth to comment. He did mention my hearing music recently. The last time I heard voices they chattered away at a great rate, like a tape played too fast.
quotes.translation: （我早已觉察瑜伽练习对我个人有强烈影响，显然有时做完后我会进入一种分离状态。我既未鼓励也未阻止这种效果。我曾有过听见声音的经历，但未请赛斯评论。他最近确实提到我听见音乐的事。上次我听见声音时，它们像快放的磁带般急速喋喋不休。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In the beginning of our relationship our communication was somewhat less smooth. Ruburt was aware of uneven moments as certain transitions took place. He kindly allows me to use, or rather operate his vocal cords. And yet even this involves automatic translations of which he is not consciously aware.
quotes.translation: 在我们关系之初，沟通并不那么顺畅。当某些转变发生时，鲁柏觉察到不连贯的时刻。他善意地允许我使用——更确切地说是运作——他的声带。然而即便如此，这仍涉及他未曾有意识觉察的自动翻译过程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (12:02.) In a very limited and fumbling manner this is hinted at through the use of computers, where you try to assess "future probabilities" and act accordingly in your present. The mind can do this far better than any computer. If it believed this, then certain portions of the brain would be activated. The brain would become aware of more of the mind's knowledge, and the probabilities of future events would be made consciously available.
quotes.translation: （12:02）通过计算机的使用，你们试图评估"未来可能性"并在当下采取相应行动——这以极其有限而笨拙的方式暗示了这一点。心智比任何计算机都更擅长此道。若它相信这一点，大脑的某些部分就会被激活。大脑将能觉察更多心智的知识，未来事件的概率也将被有意识地获取。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The only way out of it is to become aware of your beliefs, aware of your own conscious thought, and to change your beliefs so that you bring them more in line with the kind of reality you want to experience. Imagination and emotion will then automatically come into play to reinforce the new beliefs.
quotes.translation: 唯一的出路是觉察你的信念，觉察你自己有意识的思想，并改变你的信念，使之更符合你想要体验的那种实相。想象力和情感随后会自动发挥作用，强化这些新信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: To the entity, your own consciousness could be likened to one stream of consciousness, in your terms. The greater part of your own identity, then, is completely aware of all of your conscious and unconscious living material. It is also aware of the same kind of data from all of (its and your) parts.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，对存有而言，你自身的意识可比作一股意识流。因此，你身份中更伟大的部分完全觉察着你所有有意识与无意识的生命素材。它也觉察着来自（它和你）所有部分同类资料。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Such encounters also occur during waking hours, but the ego is not aware of them. I will have some comments later in the session that may enable you to become more aware of other realities beside your own, and also some advice that will enable you to operate within your own system more effectively.
quotes.translation: 此类相遇在清醒时也会发生，但自我并未察觉。稍后课程中我会提出一些评论，或许能让你更意识到自身现实之外的其他实相，同时也会提供一些建议，使你能更有效地在自己的系统内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The inner senses deal with what actually is. The inner senses are the carriers of our fuel, that is, they can be likened to the various cars of our imaginary train. It takes some doing to be aware of this fuel, since it is so instantly transformed by the outer senses into the stuff of camouflage. The process involved is subconscious. You can hardly catch yourself at it, and yet with training you will be able to catch yourself in the act.
quotes.translation: 内在感官处理的是实际存在之物。内在感官是我们燃料的载体，也就是说，它们可以比作我们想象中火车的各个车厢。要意识到这种燃料需要费些功夫，因为它会立即被外在感官转化为伪装物质。这个过程是潜意识的。你几乎无法捕捉到自己在进行这个过程，但经过训练，你将能够当场捕捉到自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Inherent, and I repeat inherent in the spider as in man, is the complete comprehension, or rather comprehension through direct experience, of the universe as a whole. In its particular existence the spider is not aware of all this knowledge, but it uses what is necessary of it to construct its web. It experiences directly. There is of course no "I" consciousness, but there is direct consciousness, nevertheless, of the most intimate kind.
quotes.translation: 蜘蛛与人类一样，天生就具备对宇宙整体的完全理解，更确切地说，是通过直接体验的理解。蜘蛛在其特定存在中并未意识到所有这些知识，但它会运用其中必要的部分来织网。它直接体验。当然没有"我"的意识，但确实存在着最亲密的直接意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You would find it difficult to attend to or be aware of regular outer stimuli while you dealt with the ordinary function of daily life. Is it then any wonder that the outer ego leaves the inner data to the safekeeping of the inner ego? You are truly babes in the woods, having enough trouble getting along in your own universe. And do not get your feelings hurt, I am not referring to either of you in particular, as you should know by now.
quotes.translation: 当你处理日常生活的普通功能时，你会发现很难关注或意识到常规的外在刺激。那么外在自我将内在数据交由内在自我保管，又有什么好奇怪的呢？你们真是林中的婴儿，在自己的宇宙中生存已经够困难了。别觉得受伤，你们应该已经知道，我并非特指你们中的任何一位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Today at 9.40 AM a telegram from Anne Healy informed me that Blanche Price died early today. I quit work at 10, did psy-time, trying to contact Blanche with no results. Then tried to sleep, thinking that it might be easier for her if I were in a dream state. Had difficulty falling asleep, wasn't sleepy and at 11 decided to forget about it. Instead fell to sleep at once to have the following strange dream. I think it is a therapeutic one; I have been requesting one from the subconscious. It involves some projection, I think, and is one of those dreams where I was now and then aware of my dreaming condition. I've forgotten some of it, and am not sure of some of the early sequence.
quotes.translation: 今天上午9点40分，安妮·希利的电报通知我布兰奇·普莱斯今晨去世。我10点停止工作，进行心理时间练习，试图联系布兰奇但无结果。然后尝试入睡，心想如果我在梦境状态或许对她更容易些。难以入睡，毫无睡意，11点决定不再理会。反而立刻入睡，做了以下这个奇怪的梦。我认为这是一个疗愈性的梦；我一直向潜意识请求这样的梦。我想其中涉及一些投射，这是那种我时不时意识到自己做梦状态的梦之一。我忘记了一部分内容，对早期的一些顺序也不太确定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The child is not born a sponge, however, empty but ready to soak up knowledge. It is already soaked in knowledge. Some will come to the surface, so to speak, and be used consciously. Some will not. I am saying here that to some extent the child in the womb is aware of the mother's beliefs and information, and that to some extent (underlined) it is "programmed" to behave in a certain fashion, or to grow in a certain fashion as a result.
quotes.translation: 然而，孩子并非生来就是一块海绵，空无一物却准备吸收知识。它已经浸透了知识。可以说，有些知识会浮到表面并被有意识地使用，有些则不会。我在此要说的是，子宫中的孩子在某种程度上意识到母亲的信念和信息，并且在一定程度上（加了下划线）因此被"编程"以某种方式行事，或以某种方式成长。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Despite this, I'm aware of the fact that I was necessary to the production of Seth's book. He needs my ability with words; even, I think, my turn of mind. Certainly my writing training aids in the translation of his material and helps give it form, no matter how unconsciously this is done. Certain personality characteristics are important too, I imagine -- the agility with which I can switch the focus of my consciousness, for example.
quotes.translation: 尽管如此，我意识到自己对于赛斯书的产生是必要的。他需要我的语言能力；甚至我认为，还需要我的思维方式。当然，我的写作训练有助于翻译他的资料并赋予其形式——无论这个过程多么无意识。某些人格特质也很重要，比如我能够灵活转换意识焦点的能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: You are as a rule aware of one system only and not generally conscious of yourself as anything but a creature of that system. I refer here to humanity at this time. These psychological structures through value fulfillment, ever enlarge their abilities to form new realities and to act within them. It should not be forgotten that these environmental systems are directly created by those who dwell within them, and this includes your own.
quotes.translation: 通常你们只意识到一个系统，一般不会意识到自己除了是该系统的生物之外还有其他身份。我在此指的是现阶段的人类。这些心理结构通过价值完成不断扩展能力，以形成新的实相并在其中运作。不应忘记，这些环境系统直接由栖居其中的生灵创造——这包括你们自己的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You, or the part of you that you are pleased to call yourself, refuse to admit as part of yourself the "I" that is aware of every breath you breathe, every move you make, and every dream that you dream. In other words breathing and dreaming are not automatic, nor do they operate without your knowledge. Mankind simply refuses to admit the breather and the dreamer.
quotes.translation: 你，或者你乐于称之为自我的那部分，拒绝承认那个觉察你每次呼吸、每个动作、每个梦境的"我"是你的一部分。换言之，呼吸与做梦并非自动进行，也并非在你不知情的情况下运作。人类只是拒绝承认那个呼吸者与做梦者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: To pursue certain goals, you pretended that they did not exist. Now, however, your global situation as a race requires the new acquisition of some "ancient arts." These can help you become aware again of those inner idealizations that form your private reality and your mass world. They can permit you to become acquainted with other inward orders of events, and the rich bed of probabilities from which your physical existence emerges.
quotes.translation: 为了追求某些目标，你们假装它们不存在。然而现在，你们种族所处的全球局势要求重新习得某些"古老技艺"。这些技艺能帮助你们重新觉察那些构成个人实相与集体世界的内在理想化形态。它们能让你们熟悉其他内在事件秩序，以及孕育物质存在的丰饶概率之床。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 698
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now, so do the cells in your own body have self-consciousness and individuality to some extent, and so on a different scale entirely do they make decisions. Their decisions affect you, though they have but vague awareness that you exist as a whole at all. Their decisions indirectly affect your manipulations of camouflage, and of course directly influence your whole state of being. The cells are developed to the fullest at this time.
quotes.translation: 同样，你体内的细胞在某种程度上也拥有自我意识与个体性，并且以完全不同的尺度做出决定。它们的决定会影响你，尽管它们对你作为整体存在的认知极其模糊。这些决定间接影响你对伪装的处理，当然也直接影响你的整体存在状态。此刻细胞已发展到最充分状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is therefore with the second alternating group of characteristics that most such problems arise. An ego who can, and has at one time or another accepted as part of itself a violent and unruly desire to kill, for example, will not automatically reject the emotion of hatred. He may dislike it, but he will recognize it as a part of himself during whatever period it is assimilated. An ego which once accepted such an idea of violence, and knew it as a possibility of action, such an ego, if he then rejects the conception, can no longer afford, ever, to recognize this once acceptable emotion, for he is only too aware of the action that could have at one time developed.
quotes.translation: 因此，大多数此类问题都源于第二组交替特征。例如，一个曾经接受过暴力杀戮欲望作为自身一部分的自我，不会自动排斥仇恨情绪。他可能不喜欢它，但在其被同化的任何阶段都会承认它是自身的一部分。一个曾接受过这种暴力概念并知晓其作为行动可能性的自我，若后来拒绝这个观念，便再也无法承认这个曾经可接受的情绪——因为他太清楚这种情绪曾可能发展出的行动了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Therefore, you have greater use of symbolism in the dream state, for you are aware of past and future symbols. These vary in intensity; often they cluster together. Such multidimensional symbols will appear then in many ways, not simply visually. They will affect not only your own physical reality, but all realities in which you are involved. In a manner of speaking the symbols that you know are but the tail end of greater symbols.
quotes.translation: 因此，你在梦境状态中对象征符号的运用更为广泛，因为你能够觉察到过去与未来的象征符号。这些符号的强度各不相同，且常会聚集在一起。这种多维度的象征符号会以多种方式显现，而不仅限于视觉形式。它们不仅会影响你自己的物质实相，还会影响你所涉足的所有实相。从某种意义上说，你所认知的象征符号只是更宏大象征的末端。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Guilt is the other side of compassion. Its original purpose was to enable you to empathize on an aware level with yourselves and other members of creaturehood, so that you could consciously control what was previously handled on a biological level alone. Guilt in that respect therefore has a strong natural basis, and when it is perverted, misused or misunderstood, it has that great terrifying energy of any runaway basic phenomenon.
quotes.translation: 愧疚是慈悲的另一面。其原始目的是让你在有意识的层面上与自己和众生共情，从而能够有意识地控制那些原本仅在生物层面处理的事物。因此，愧疚在这方面具有强烈的自然基础，而当它被扭曲、误用或误解时，就会像任何失控的基本现象一样，拥有巨大的恐怖能量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I mentioned that the inhabitant of the other system with whom you made contact perceived your existence in both the future and the past. He also was aware however of your own comparative imprisonment in a limited present. For the present as you know it is very limited indeed. He realized therefore, when the incident occurred, how it would end. He can relive the incident at his leisure, and experience it as present if he so chooses.
quotes.translation: 我曾提到，与你接触的那个其他系统的居民，同时感知到了你在未来和过去的存在。然而，他也意识到你相对被困在有限的当下之中。因为正如你所知，当下确实非常有限。因此，当事件发生时，他已然知晓其结局。他可以随意重温这一事件，若他选择如此，便能将其体验为当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The whole self as you know has its existence in uncamouflaged energy, and is therefore capable of the assimilation of knowledge in so far as it can, if it chooses, be basically unaffiliated to any one camouflage dimension or perspective. In actual practice this takes a supreme development, but even for general purposes the inner self retains a freedom from camouflage perspectives, and is aware in varying degrees of other perspectives, and of its existence outside of them.
quotes.translation: 你所认知的整体自性存在于未经伪装的能量之中，因此它能够吸收知识——只要它选择如此，就能基本上不受任何单一伪装维度或视角的束缚。在实际操作中，这需要极高的发展，但即便为了一般目的，内在自性也保持着脱离伪装视角的自由，并能不同程度地觉察到其他视角，以及自身在这些视角之外的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The smallest blade of grass, or flower, is aware of this connection, and without reasoning comprehends its position, its uniqueness and its source of vitality. The atoms and molecules that compose all objects, whether it be the body of a person, a table, a stone or a frog, know the great passive thrust of creativity that lies beneath their own existence, and upon which their individuality floats, distinct, clear and unassailable.
quotes.translation: 最微小的草叶或花朵，都觉察到这种联系，无需推理便能理解自身的位置、独特性以及生命力的源泉。构成所有物体的原子和分子——无论是人的身体、桌子、石头还是青蛙——都知晓那潜藏于自身存在之下的伟大创造力之被动推力，而它们的个体性便在这推力之上漂浮，清晰、独特且不可侵犯。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As far as self and not-self are concerned, the unit of self is organized, as you know, by the inner ego, which directs the whole energy field. The outer ego directs the manipulation of this gestalt in the physical universe. The outer ego is rather more tied to physical properties, and yet it can directly experience inner reality by a change of focus through aligning itself with the inner ego, focusing its energies with the inner rather than the outer senses. This is by far the most advantageous method of experiencing inner reality, because the outer ego is therefore consciously aware of what has been going on, and can use such knowledge in its own sphere.
quotes.translation: 就自性与非自性而言，自性单位是由内在自我组织的，正如你所知，内在自我引导着整个能量场。外在自我则负责在物质宇宙中操控这一完形。外在自我更受限于物质属性，然而它可以通过调整焦点，与内在自我对齐，将能量聚焦于内在感官而非外在感官，从而直接体验内在实相。这无疑是体验内在实相最有利的方法，因为外在自我因此能有意识地觉察到所发生的一切，并能在其自身领域运用这些知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: An awareness of the existence of the supraselfis in itself of great benefit. The author of Ruburt's new book calls this God, and I am simply telling you what it is. The supraselfis indeed a portion of a higher gestalt, which is part of yet another higher consciousness-gestalt. This is true. But this supraselfis you in a highly personal way, and it is superior in many aspects. It controls and organizes larger portions of action.
quotes.translation: 觉察到超我（supraself）的存在本身就有极大益处。鲁柏新书的作者称之为神，而我不过是在告诉你它究竟是什么。超我确实是更高层完形的一部分，而这完形又隶属于另一个更高层的意识完形。事实确实如此。但这个超我以高度个人化的方式呈现为你自身，并在诸多方面更为优越。它掌控并组织着更大范围的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now: This is a personal god, in your terms. It is a personal god because this god represents the part of that which is, which is yourself, you see. No one else can speak to this particular portion of this god. You are your own entity. The part of you that is formed from All That Is, is this god; is aware of all your needs because god is also, in this respect, yourself. Though hardly the self that you will recognize in a mirror.
quotes.translation: 现在：用你们的说法，这是个位格神。之所以说它是位格神，是因为这个神代表了一切万有中属于你自身的那部分，你明白吗？没有人能与神的这个特定部分对话。你就是自己的存有。你身上由一切万有所塑造的那部分，就是这个神；它知晓你所有的需求，因为在这个层面上，神就是你自己。尽管这绝非你在镜中能认出的那个自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The dreamer is not aware of the actual passing of physical hours. He is only aware of the interior time element as it appears within the framework of his dream. The personality will be seen to operate in some manners that would be considered quite normal, if he were in the waking state.
quotes.translation: 做梦者并不觉察物理时间的实际流逝。他只觉察到梦境框架内呈现的内在时间元素。人格的运作方式若放在清醒状态下，会被视为相当正常。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: This inner ego knows the outer ego well. The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego. The outer ego as a rule is not aware of what you may think of for now as the thoughts or communications of the inner ego; but the inner ego knows every step you take, every particle of air you breathe, every dream you have; and it is the source of your own personality and is the representative of the entity of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我对外在自我了如指掌。外在自我不过是内在自我的仿冒影像。外在自我通常觉察不到你们此刻可能视为内在自我思想或沟通的内容；但内在自我知晓你迈出的每一步、吸入的每一粒空气分子、做过的每一个梦；它是你人格的源头，也是它所隶属的存有的代表。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 这是向外看的自我。这是你们称之为自我觉察的那个自我。内在自我变成了我所谓的内在自我。它向内审视那个内在实相，那个意识的心理维度——你自身的意识与身体意识皆由此而生。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt has allowed a portion of his this-life consciousness to go off on a tangent, so to speak, on another path into another system of actuality (i.e., into his psychic library). His life there is as valid as his existence in your world. In the waking state he is able, now, to alter the direction of his focus precisely enough to bring about a condition in which he perceives both realities simultaneously. He is just beginning, so as yet he is only occasionally conscious of that other experience. He is, however, aware of it now in the back of his mind more or less constantly. It does not intrude upon the world that he knows, but enriches it.
quotes.translation: 鲁伯允许他此生意识的一部分偏离正轨，可以这么说，踏上了另一条通往另一个实相系统（即他的心灵图书馆）的路径。他在那里的生活与他在你们世界的存在同样真实。在清醒状态下，他现在能够足够精确地调整焦点方向，创造出同时感知两种实相的状态。他刚刚起步，因此目前只是偶尔意识到那种另类体验。不过，他现在或多或少持续地在意识深处觉察到它。这并不侵扰他所知的世界，反而丰富了它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 715
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: This is extremely important, since the dream world operates within the dimensions of your own psychic field, but utterly divorced from both space-time continuum and physical construction. Here you see the self truly spills over, not only into what you would call not-self, but into areas with which the conscious self is barely familiar. On an unconscious level however the self is very aware of the progress of these secondary personalities, and indeed uses this plane itself for the fulfillment and development of qualities originally attached to it, but incompatible with its main intents. The two planes constantly enrich and affect each other.
quotes.translation: 这一点极为重要，因为梦境世界运作于你们自身心灵场的维度之内，却完全脱离了时空连续体与物质建构。在此，你们看到自我真正地溢散开来，不仅进入你们所谓的非我领域，更进入意识自我几乎陌生的区域。然而在无意识层面，自我对这些次级人格的进展了如指掌，甚至利用这个层面本身来完成和发展那些原本附属于它、却与其主要意图不相容的特质。这两个层面不断相互滋养、彼此影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now: All of this sounds very complicated. Yet in a different way the same processes occur at other levels, as in its way cellular consciousness perceives all of the probabilities concerned with physical survival in its most far-reaching complications. At this moment the cells within your body know the life conditions of any place on the planet, and compute these, ascertaining the ways in which they require action on the body's part. Your cells are aware of the motion of the planets and of all circumstances regarding the body's equilibrium, stability, and survival. The body is then formed constantly as the result of these computations.
quotes.translation: 现在：这一切听起来非常复杂。然而以不同方式，相同的过程也发生在其他层面——正如细胞意识以其自身方式，感知到与物质生存相关的所有可能性，及其最深远复杂的牵连。此刻，你们体内的细胞知晓地球上任何地方的生命条件，并计算这些条件，确定它们需要身体采取何种行动。你们的细胞觉察行星的运行，以及关乎身体平衡、稳定与生存的一切状况。身体正是这些计算的结果，持续不断地被形塑而成。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Television interacts with your lives, but it does not cause your lives. It does not cause the events that it depicts. With your great belief in technology, it often seems to many people that television causes violence, for example, or that it causes a love of overmaterialism, or that it causes "loose morals." Television reflects. In a manner of speaking it does not even distort, though it may reflect distortions. The writers and actors of television dramas are attuned to the "mass mind." They are not leaders or followers. They are creative reflectors, acutely aware of the overall, generalized emotional and psychic patterns of the age.
quotes.translation: 电视与你们的生活互动，但它并不引发你们的生活。它不引发它所描绘的事件。由于你们对科技的强烈信念，许多人常认为电视引发暴力，或引发过度物质主义的爱好，或引发"道德沦丧"。电视是反映者。从某种角度说，它甚至不扭曲，尽管它可能反映扭曲。电视剧的编剧和演员与"大众心灵"相调谐。他们既非领导者也非追随者。他们是创造性的反映者，敏锐地觉察着这个时代整体而普遍的情感与心灵模式。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now because your conscious mind, as you think of it, is not aware of these activities, you do not identify with this inner portion of yourselves. You prefer to identify with the part of you who watches television or cooks or works -- the part you think knows what it is doing. But this seemingly unconscious portion of yourself is far more knowledgeable, and upon its smooth functioning your entire physical existence depends.
quotes.translation: 现在，因为你们所认为的意识心智并不觉察这些活动，你们便不认同自己的这个内在部分。你们更愿意认同那个看电视、做饭或工作的部分——那个你们认为知道自己正在做什么的部分。但你们这个看似无意识的部分却远为博学，而你们整个物质存在都依赖于它的顺畅运作。

quotes.text: （Before this evenings session I was at work typing up the envelope data for last Monday's session. I stopped at 8:30 PM to get ready for this session at 9 PM. I began to be aware of a rather stiff pain growing in the back of my neck. By 8:45 it was quite bothersome, so I returned to the studio in the back of the apartment, to use the pendulum for a quick check to see if I could learn the cause. I did not think it physical.
quotes.translation: （今晚课程前，我正在打字整理上周一课程的信封数据。我于晚上8:30停止工作，为晚上9点的课程做准备。我开始觉察到后颈逐渐出现一种僵硬的疼痛。到8:45时已相当烦人，于是我回到公寓后方的书房，用摆锤快速检测，想看看能否找出原因。我认为这不是生理性的。）

quotes.text: The first Seth excerpt is in keeping with the idea of creating bridges between the two volumes of "Unknown" Reality by lifting something out of one for inclusion in the other. Once more from the 743rd session in Volume 2: "No book entitled The "Unknown" Reality can hope to make that reality entirely known. It remains nebulous because it is consciously unrealized. The best I can do is to point out areas that have been relatively invisible, to help you explore, actually, different facets of your own consciousness ... I am well aware that the book raises many more questions than it presents answers for, and this has been my intent...."
quotes.translation: 第一段赛斯摘录符合这样的理念：通过从《未知的实相》两卷中提取内容纳入彼此，在两卷之间搭建桥梁。再次引自第二卷第743节："任何题为《未知的实相》的书，都不能指望让那实相完全为人所知。它依然朦胧，因为它在意识层面尚未被实现。我所能做的最好的事，是指出那些相对不可见的领域，实际上帮助你们探索自己意识的不同面向……我很清楚，这本书提出的问题远多于它给出的答案，而这正是我的意图……"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: These fields or planes are more various than you can imagine, and they are formed in the same manner, basically, as your own universe was formed, and many of those inhabitants tune in on your universe spontaneously and quite accidentally. But the inhabitants of most such planes are no more aware of your actual existence than you are of their existence.
quotes.translation: 这些场域或层面比你能想象的更为多样，它们基本上以与你自己的宇宙相同的方式形成，许多那些层面的居民会自发且相当偶然地调频到你的宇宙。但大多数这类层面的居民并不比你意识到他们的存在更了解你的实际存在。

quotes.text: For all of this, however, inner portions of each individual's being are not touched by those beliefs. The ideas will be reflected in their daily experience, certainly, and seem to be justified. Yet beneath, the inner self is quite aware of the great thrusting creativity that occurs in dreams, and realizes that the source of individual energy has nothing to do with such superficial concepts as the nature of good and evil.
quotes.translation: 然而，尽管如此，每个个体存在的内在部分并不受那些信念的影响。这些想法当然会反映在他们的日常经验中，并似乎得到证实。但在表面之下，内在自我非常清楚梦境中发生的巨大创造力，并意识到个体能量的来源与诸如善恶本质这类肤浅概念毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The whole psychological structure is therefore entirely different. It is also more demanding. The emotions and intuitions are the basis of experience, and the means of getting knowledge in most other systems. They have their own in quotes "reasoning processes" of which you are little aware, since at your point of development you use the intellect as a rule in its place, and make a clear distinction between the two areas.
quotes.translation: 因此，整个心理结构完全不同。它也更具挑战性。情感和直觉是经验的基础，也是大多数其他系统中获取知识的手段。它们有自己所谓的“推理过程”，你对此几乎毫无察觉，因为在你目前的发展阶段，你通常用理智取代它们的位置，并将这两个领域明确区分开来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is equipped, as an animal is, to perform beautifully in its environment. You would call it mindless, since it would seem not to reason. For the purpose of this discussion alone, imagine a body with a fully operating body consciousness, not diseased for any reason or defective by birth, but one without the overriding ego-directed consciousness that you have. There have been species of such a nature. In your terms they would seem to be like sleepwalkers, yet their physical abilities surpassed yours. They were indeed as agile as animals -- nor were they unconscious.10 They simply dealt with a different kind of awareness.
quotes.translation: 它像动物一样，被装备得能在其环境中完美运作。你会称它为无意识的，因为它似乎不会推理。仅为了本次讨论的目的，想象一个拥有完全运作的身体意识的身体，没有任何疾病或先天缺陷，但没有你所拥有的那种主导性的自我导向意识。曾经存在过这种性质的物种。用你的话说，它们看起来像梦游者，然而它们的身体能力超越了你。它们确实像动物一样敏捷——而且它们并非无意识。它们只是处理着一种不同的觉知。

quotes.text: The events themselves discussed in the newspaper article point up the same kind of magical affiliations. The c-e-l-l-s (spelled) of the young men in question were always in communication, and all of those elements needed to bring about such a reunion took place at that magical level of activity. Consciously, intellectually, the boys had no idea they were triplets. You live personally in a world of lush creative ideas. Your intellect is aware of that. (Pause.) It is used to working creatively. The focused intellect can indeed activate the intuitive abilities -- and the healing abilities. You get what you concentrate upon.
quotes.translation: 报纸文章中讨论的事件本身也指向了同样神奇的关联。那些年轻人的细胞（拼写）始终在沟通，所有促成这种重聚所需的元素都在那种神奇的活动层面上发生。从意识上和理智上讲，这些男孩并不知道他们是三胞胎。你个人生活在一个充满丰富创意的世界中。你的理智意识到了这一点。（停顿。）它习惯于创造性地工作。专注的理智确实能激活直觉能力——以及疗愈能力。你得到你所专注的东西。

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: To some extent, however, you form physical events while you are dreaming. Then, freed from waking limitations, you process your experience, weigh it according to your own intents and purposes, correlate it with information so vast you could not be consciously aware of it. In most dreams you do not simply think of a situation. You imaginatively become part of it. It is real in every fashion except that of physical fact.
quotes.translation: 然而，在一定程度上，你在做梦时也在形成物理事件。然后，从清醒的限制中解放出来，你处理你的经验，根据你自己的意图和目的来权衡它，并将其与如此庞大的信息相关联，以至于你无法有意识地意识到它。在大多数梦中，你不仅仅是思考一个情境。你想象性地成为它的一部分。它在除了物理事实之外的每一个方面都是真实的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Following our analogy, you will be his guest and from his rooms look down into your own with some greater objectivity. This is possible, feasible, since you are all portions, in our analogy, of this same inner self who maintains all of the rooms. While each of you are egotistically focused within your own reality, the deeper layers of the self are aware of the quote "family" relationship. Now give me a moment. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 依循我们的比喻，你将成为他的访客，从他的房间俯瞰你自己的房间，带着更大的客观性。这是可能且可行的，因为在我们比喻中，你们都是维持所有房间的那个内在自体的部分。当你们每个人以自我为中心聚焦于自己的实相时，自体的更深层却知晓所谓的"家族"关系。现在请稍等片刻。（停顿）
