quotes.text: There are other much easier methods. I have explained to some degree the way images are constructed out of an available field of energy. You perceive only your own constructions. If a "ghost" wants to contact you therefore, he can do so through telepathy, and you can yourself construct the corresponding image if you desire. Or the individual might send you a thought-form at the same time that he telepathically communicates with you. Your rooms are full now of thought-forms that you do not perceive; and again, you are as much a ghostly phenomenon now as you will be after death. You are simply not aware of the fact.
quotes.translation: 还有其他更简单的方法。我已在一定程度上解释过，意象是如何从可用的能量场中构建出来的。你只感知到自己的建构。因此，若"鬼魂"想与你联系，他可以通过心电感应做到，而如果你愿意，也可以自行构建相应的意象。或者，个体可能在与你进行心电感应沟通的同时，向你发送一个思想形相。你的房间里现在充满了你未感知到的思想形相；再次强调，你现在与死后一样，都是一种幽灵现象。你只是没有意识到这个事实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The consciousness of each reader of this book existed before the universe was formed--in parentheses: (in your terms)--but that consciousness was unmanifest. Your closest approximation--and it is an approximation only--of the state of being that existed before the universe was formed is the dream state. (Long pause.) In that state before the beginning, your consciousness existed free of space and time, aware of immense probabilities. This is extremely difficult to verbalize, yet it is very important that such an attempt be made. (Long pause.) Your consciousness is a part of an infinitely original creative process.
quotes.translation: 本书每位读者的意识在宇宙形成之前就已存在——括号内：（以你们的时间而言）——但那意识是未显化的。你们对宇宙形成前存在状态最接近的近似——且仅仅是近似——是梦境状态。（长停顿）在那初始前的状态中，你的意识不受时空束缚，知晓浩瀚的可能性。这极难用言语表达，但进行这样的尝试非常重要。（长停顿）你的意识是无限原创创造过程的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You often excel in situations that utterly escape you at a physical level. These accomplishments still operate through the focus of your present, since you are physically aware of but one line of probable events, so the meaning of many dream events escapes you. But in dreams you often do work quite as valid as any performed in the day, and in the dream state you meet and interact with your own reincarnational selves.
quotes.translation: 你们常常在物理层面完全无法理解的情况下表现出色。这些成就仍通过你当下的焦点运作，因为你物理上只意识到一条可能性事件线，所以许多梦境事件的意义对你而言是隐晦的。但在梦中，你常从事与白天同样有效的工作，并在梦境状态中遇见并互动于你自己的转世自我。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Another one-minute pause.) Give us a moment ... The "unknown" reality sustains you and the web of life as you understand it. Your conscious concepts must enlarge so that the conscious self can understand its true nature. As you think of it, consciousness is barely -- barely -- half developed. It has learned to identify with one small group of neurologically accepted responses. Portions of the brain not used lie latent, waiting for the recognition that will trigger them into activity (intently). When this happens, the mind will become aware of the rich bed of probabilities upon which the ego now rides so blindly.
quotes.translation: （又停顿一分钟）请稍等……"未知"实相支撑着你以及你所理解的生命之网。你的意识概念必须扩展，以便意识自我能理解其真实本质。就你所想，意识几乎——几乎——只开发了一半。它已学会认同于一小群神经学上被接受的反应。大脑未使用的部分处于潜伏状态，等待着能触发它们活动的认知（专注地）。当这发生时，心智将意识到自我如今如此盲目驾驭的丰富可能性之床。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: All That Is is itself evolving. It is not aware of all of its own purposes, for some of these are ever new. In some respects therefore, there are no cut and dried answers. As far as your own system is concerned, I have told you that the past ever changes, and here we enter the realm of probabilities; for at any point in any man's life, where a decision was made, the other probable alternative actions were also taken.
quotes.translation: 一切万有本身也在演化中。它并非知晓自己所有的目的，因为其中一些永远是崭新的。因此就某些方面而言，没有一成不变的答案。就你们自己的系统而言，我曾告诉过你过去永远在改变，而在此我们进入了可能性的领域；因为在任何人生命中的任何决策点上，其他可能的选择行动也同样被采取了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The body's main purpose is not only to survive but to maintain a quality of existence at certain levels, and that quality itself promotes health and fulfillment. A definite, biologically pertinent fear alerts the body, and allows it to react completely and naturally. You might be reading a newspaper headline, for example, as you cross a busy street. Long before you are consciously aware of the circumstances, your body might leap out of the path of an approaching car. The body is doing what it is supposed to do. Though consciously you were not afraid, there was a biologically pertinent fear that was acted upon.
quotes.translation: 身体的主要目的不仅是生存，还要在特定层面上维持存在品质，而这种品质本身会促进健康与圆满。明确的、与生物学相关的恐惧会警示身体，使其能够完全自然地做出反应。例如，当你穿过繁忙街道时，可能正在阅读报纸标题。远在你意识层面察觉状况之前，你的身体可能已经跃离了迎面驶来的车辆。身体正在执行其本应履行的职责。虽然意识层面你并未感到恐惧，但确实存在着一种被付诸行动的生物学相关恐惧。

quotes.text: It is turned inward mainly in terms of the ego. There is awareness here of the inner self, but the main energy is knotted in tensions and exhaustions. At the same time the personality does not refresh its energies. If the energies of the personality were turned further inward, or on the other hand turned further outward toward the outside world, there would be an improvement in terms of additional, recharged energy.
quotes.translation: 它主要以内我为导向，就自我而言。这里存在着对内我的觉知，但主要能量却纠结于紧张与耗竭之中。与此同时，人格并未更新其能量。如果人格的能量进一步向内转向，或者反之进一步向外转向外部世界，那么就会在额外充能方面获得改善。

quotes.text: This is done automatically. The data is not radioed back (gesture, eyes closed) to the physical body, so to speak, for interpretation. Consciousness can adapt physical methods of procedure even when separated from the body. It forms its own pseudo physical apparatus, even as it originally forms the physical image itself. The consciousness is aware of seeing and observing more or less in physical terms, and so it is.
quotes.translation: 这是自动完成的。数据并不会（手势，闭眼）被传回给肉体进行解读。意识即使与身体分离，也能适应物质性的运作方式。它会形成自己的伪物质装置，就像它最初形成物质形象本身一样。意识或多或少以物质术语觉知到自己在观看和观察，事实也确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It operates within you and for you in any case. The awareness of its existence however has strong reassuring elements on a conscious level. You see you are not the low man on the totem pole however. There are lesser, so to speak, personalities within every dominant physical personality, and lesser identities quite independent within each personal system. To these the physical personality would seem like a supraself.
quotes.translation: 无论如何，它都在你之内并为你运作。然而，对其存在的觉知在意识层面具有强烈的安抚元素。你看，你并非图腾柱上地位最低者。可以说，在每个主导性的物质人格之内，都存在着更次级的、相当独立的人格。对这些次级人格而言，物质人格就如同一个超我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are also what I will call body dreams. No consciousness, to whatever degree, is fully manifested in matter. There is always constant communication between all portions of the body, but when the conscious mind is diverted that activity often increases. Cellular consciousness at its own level then forms a body dream. These do not involve pictures or words, but are rather like the formations of electromagnetic intent, anticipating action to be taken, and these may then serve as initiators of therapeutic dreams, in which "higher" levels of consciousness are psychologically made aware of certain conditions.
quotes.translation: 还有我称之为身体梦的现象。任何意识，无论其程度如何，都无法完全显化于物质中。身体各部分之间始终存在着持续的沟通，但当意识心智被转移时，这种活动往往会增强。细胞意识在其自身层面会形成一个身体梦。这些梦不涉及图像或文字，而更像是电磁意图的成形，预判着将要采取的行动，这些意图随后可能成为疗愈性梦境的启动器，使"更高"层面的意识在心理上觉知到某些状况。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: The personality structure can be studied from many viewpoints. We are now studying it in relation to its basic reality as action. While it may seem that the personality would be a result of a series of actions, this is not basically the case. The personality in actuality is simultaneous action, that is composed of actions within actions. Portions of it are conscious of its awareness as a part of action, and portions of it attempt to stand aside from action.
quotes.translation: 人格结构可以从许多角度来研究。我们现在正研究其作为行动的基本实相。虽然人格看似是一系列行动的结果，但本质上并非如此。人格实际上是同时性的行动，由行动中的行动所组成。其部分觉知到自身作为行动的一部分，而部分则试图置身于行动之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your cats are as alive in all ways inside of the house as out. They understand their relationship with your human reality. They enjoy contributing in your life as much as any wild animal enjoys being a part of its group. Their consciousnesses lean in a new direction, feel about the edges of concepts, sense openings of awareness of a different kind, and form alliances of consciousness quite as natural as any other.
quotes.translation: 你们的猫在屋内和屋外一样充满活力。它们理解与你们人类实相的关系。它们享受为你们的生活做出贡献，就像任何野生动物享受成为群体一员那样。它们的意识正转向新的方向，摸索概念边缘，感知不同种类的觉知开启，并形成与其他任何意识联盟同样自然的意识联盟。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: And from Session 613 for September 11, 1972: "Interactions with others do occur, of course, yet there are none that you do not accept or draw to you by your thoughts, attitudes, or emotions. This applies in each area of life. In your terms, it applies both before life and after it. In the most miraculous fashion you are given the gift of creating your experience."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The various levels of consciousness discussed here may appear to be very divorced from ordinary waking ones. The divisions are quite arbitrary. These various stages all represent different attributes and directions inherent within your own soul; clues and hints of them, shadows and reflections appear even in the consciousness that you know. Even normal waking consciousness, then, is not innocent of all other traces of existence, or devoid of other kinds of awareness. It is only because you usually use your waking consciousness in limited ways that you do not encounter these clues with any regularity.
quotes.translation: 此处讨论的各种意识层次，看似与寻常清醒意识相去甚远。这些划分相当武断。这些不同阶段都代表你们灵魂内在固有的不同属性与方向；其线索与暗示、阴影与倒影，甚至出现在你们所知的意识中。因此，即便正常的清醒意识，也并非全然不染其他存在的痕迹，或缺乏其他种类的觉知。只因你们通常以有限方式运用清醒意识，才未能规律性地遇见这些线索。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Try to experience all of your present sense data as fully as you can. This tones your entire physical and psychic organism, bringing all of your perceptions together so that your awareness opens fully. Body and mind operate together. You experience an immediate sense of power because your abilities are directed to the fullest of their capacities. In a physical moment you can act directly on the spot, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 试着尽可能充分地体验你们当前所有的感官数据。这会调谐你们整个身体与心灵有机体，汇聚所有感知，使你们的觉知全然敞开。身体与心智协同运作。你们会立即体验到力量感，因为你们的能力被导向其最大潜能。可以说，在物理瞬间，你们能当场直接行动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You may say if you wish that I am a dream image lacking even an image -- but if so, then each individual whose life is changed by my words must question: "What is a dream?" In the same way that my personality exists without physical manifestation, so does your own. Your dreaming and waking experience has a direct effect upon the entire universe. The difference is that you are not consciously aware of what you are doing, but I am. I change a world to some extent, though in your terms I will not actually sit in a chair or walk the streets, or shake your hand, or see the twilight come, or the sunrise.
quotes.translation: 若你们愿意，可以说我是个连影像都算不上的梦境影像——但若如此，每个因我话语而改变生命的人必须追问："梦是什么？"正如我的人格无需物质显化而存在，你们的人格亦然。你们的梦境与清醒体验直接影响整个宇宙。区别在于你们并未有意识地觉察自己在做什么，而我却觉察。我在某种程度上改变世界，尽管按你们的说法，我并不会真正坐在椅子上、走在街上、与你们握手，或目睹暮色降临、日出东方。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What you will be, Joseph, what Mark and Philip and Ruburt will be, you all are now, not in some misty half-real form, but in the most real sense. You simply are not aware of these selves anymore on a conscious level than you are aware of what you refer to as past selves.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你们未来将成为的——马克、菲利普与鲁柏未来将成为的——你们此刻已是，并非以某种朦胧半实的形式，而是以最真实的意义存在。你们只是不再于意识层面觉察这些自我，正如你们不再觉察所谓的过去自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For now consider this blocked energy. Consciously, most people are already afraid of it -- they did not repress it because they considered it good. When I use the word "repressed" I do not mean forgotten, or shoved into the unconscious, or beyond reach. You may pretend that such material is hidden but it is quite within your conscious awareness. You have only to honestly look for it and organize what you find.
quotes.translation: 暂且将此视为阻塞的能量。有意识地，多数人已对其心生畏惧——他们压抑它，并非因其被视为善。当我使用"压抑"一词时，并非指遗忘、推入潜意识或遥不可及。你们或许假装此类材料被隐藏，但它完全处于你们清醒觉知范围内。你们只需诚实地寻找它，并组织所发现之物。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It could still do this and retain its own nature, merely by allowing into its awareness the reality of other actions as a part of its self-image. There is for example no basic reason why the subconscious and the ego cannot communicate to a much larger extent than is now usual. Such communication would result in the acceptance of additional energy and action by the ego, and an expansion of the ego's self-image.
quotes.translation: 它仍可做到这一点并保持自身本质，只需允许其他行动的现实作为其自我形象的一部分进入觉知。例如，潜意识与自我之间本无根本理由不能进行比现今更广泛的沟通。这种沟通将导致自我接纳额外的能量与行动，并扩展自我的自我形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The Fox experiments are quite valid, with some changes that you will make, I imagine. At one level of the dreaming state it is possible for you to recognize and align yourself with that portion of yourself that is aware of itself within fourth-dimensional reality. You have both occasionally learned to take our waking consciousness into the dream state, and here Fox is correct, for you must start at this point.
quotes.translation: 福克斯实验相当有效，不过我想你们会做些调整。在梦境状态的某个层次，你有可能认出并校准自身与第四维现实中觉知自身的那部分自己。你们两人都曾偶尔学会将清醒意识带入梦境状态，福克斯在此是正确的，因为你们必须从这个起点开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It may or it may not. It does not have to. It may project to other areas entirely, while Sue is somewhere else in her astral form. There is at this time however a very strong connection between the two. On a deeper level they are aware of their locations. The mother knows where the child is, even though she is not conscious of this. The mother may even go out after the child in a projection, and bring it home.
quotes.translation: 它可能如此，也可能不如此。它并非必须如此。它可能完全投射到其他领域，而苏则以星光体形态身处别处。不过此刻两者之间存在非常强烈的连接。在更深层次上，它们知晓彼此的位置。母亲知道孩子在哪里，即使她并未意识到这一点。母亲甚至可能在投射中追随孩子外出，并将其带回家。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The legs run, and leap over areas of ground. They cannot themselves interpret the reality beneath them. The feet are not aware of the ants they crush. They may feel the grass or sidewalk or the road, but the peculiar individual sensate life of the grass itself, or of the ant, escapes the feet, which are involved in their own reality and concerned with these other things only in their relationship to feethood.
quotes.translation: 双腿奔跑，跃过一片片地面。它们自身无法诠释脚下的现实。双脚并不知晓它们碾碎的蚂蚁。它们可能感受到草地、人行道或道路，但草地或蚂蚁那独特的个体感知生命，却逃过了双脚的注意——双脚沉浸于自身的现实，只在与"脚性"相关的层面关注这些他物。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the dream state these reactions are more easily triggered. This is the result of a lowering of egotistic guards, for the ego sets up controls that act as resistance to various channels, so that many connections are closed. All of these systems are interconnected. They all operate simultaneously. However, the personality is certainly not aware of their existence on a conscious level a good deal of the time.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态中，这些反应更容易被触发。这是自我防卫降低的结果，因为自我设置了作为各通道阻力的控制机制，导致许多连接被关闭。所有这些系统相互关联，同时运作。然而，人格在清醒层面的大部分时间里，显然并未意识到它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The freedom will also show in our sessions, and rather obviously, within a very brief time. It is already apparent. To become aware of other individuals who are not within your system will be good for him. It will also help him to understand and appreciate my own unique reality, and this now-growing belief should result in a greater familiarity. He should be able to perceive me to some degree before too long.
quotes.translation: 这种自由也将显现在我们的课程中，且相当明显，在极短时间内即可见。它已初露端倪。让他意识到你们系统之外的其他个体，对他有益。这也有助于他理解并欣赏我独特的现实，而这一日益增长的信念应能带来更深的熟悉感。他应能在不久后，在一定程度上感知到我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are intuitively aware that you form your image, and that you are independent of it. You do not realize that you create your larger environment and the physical world as you know it by propelling your thoughts and emotions into matter -- a breakthrough into three-dimensional life. The inner self, therefore, individually and en masse, sends its psychic energy out, forming tentacles that coalesce into form.
quotes.translation: 你直觉地意识到你形成了自己的形象，并且你独立于它。你并未意识到，你通过将自己的思想和情感推进物质——一次突破进入三维生命的飞跃——创造了你所知的更大环境和物质世界。因此，内在自体，无论是单独还是集体，向外发送其心灵能量，形成触须，这些触须凝聚成形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You do indeed give them energy, as they also give you energy. Dreams, or the dream universe, exists even while you wake, and you only become aware of certain portions of it even while you sleep. You do create it, but it is also to some degree independent of you. As your ego experiences changes in its relationship with the physical world, so do you change aspects of the dream world accordingly, and enrich it.
quotes.translation: 你确实给予它们能量，正如它们也给予你能量。梦境，或梦的宇宙，甚至在你清醒时也存在，而即使在睡眠中，你也只意识到其中的某些部分。你确实创造了它，但它在某种程度上也独立于你。正如自我在与物质世界的关系中经历变化，你也相应地改变梦世界的各个方面，并丰富它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Human personality will reap benefits that now would seem unbelievable. An open-ended consciousness will imply far greater freedom. From birth, children will be taught that basic identity is not dependent upon the body, and that time as you know it is an illusion. The child will be aware of many of its past existences, and will be able to identify with the old man or woman that in your terms it will become.
quotes.translation: 人类人格将收获现在看似不可思议的益处。开放式的意识将意味着远为更大的自由。从出生起，孩子们将被教导基本身份不依赖于身体，而你所知的时间是一种幻象。孩子将意识到其许多过去的存在，并能认同于按你们说法它将变成的老男人或老女人。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One point before I close for this evening: He was quite correct in his interpretation as he watched your expression one evening while you slept--and it was no coincidence that he awakened to see it. You were deeply involved in overall healing processes of your own, in which certain comprehensions on your part were conveyed to the various organs of your body, so that your body came into a far better overall relationship. That relationship was also responsible for [your] eye improvements, and Ruburt was able to perceive differences in you before you were aware of them at all.
quotes.translation: 在我今晚结束前有一点：他在你某晚睡觉时观察你的表情，他的解读非常正确——而他醒来看到它并非巧合。你当时深陷于自己整体的疗愈过程中，在此过程中，你部分的领悟被传达给你身体的各个器官，使你的身体进入远为更好的整体关系。这种关系也导致了[你的]眼睛改善，而鲁柏在你完全意识到之前就能察觉到你的不同。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You know then from past discussions that the dream world as you know it is the result of your awareness of a plane of existence which you help create, and in which you manipulate. In other words, on an unconscious level you here manipulate in another plane of existence entirely, one in which your conscious camouflage ego may not enter.
quotes.translation: 那么，从过去的讨论中你知道，你所知的梦世界是你对一个存在层面的意识的结果，你帮助创造了这个层面，并在其中运作。换句话说，在无意识层面，你在此完全在另一个存在层面中运作，一个你的意识伪装自我无法进入的层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Each layer, or each area of the whole self, imagines that it is the center of awareness, and that the whole self revolves about it. So far you have had little experience with these other "centers"--you may put that in quotation marks--but before too long we shall give you some ideas so that you may become at least slightly acquainted. Initially this will be done through suggestion on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 整个自体的每一层或每一区域都想象自己是意识的中心，而整个自体围绕它旋转。到目前为止，你对这些其他"中心"——你可以加上引号——经验甚少，但不久我们将给你一些概念，以便你至少能稍作了解。起初，这将通过潜意识层面的暗示来完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is impossible to tell you of the emotional reality of such an experience. You will have to discover it for yourself. Such bridge beliefs often allow you to perceive the "invisible" beliefs mentioned this evening, and these can then appear to you as a revelation. On second thought, however, you will realize that another belief blocked that one from your view, but that you were always aware of it; and that in a strange way it was also invisible because you took it for granted. You did not consider it a belief about reality but as reality itself, and never questioned it.
quotes.translation: 我无法向你描述这种体验的情感实相。你必须自己去发现它。这类桥梁信念常能让你感知今晚提到的"隐形"信念，而这些信念会以启示的形式呈现。但细想之下，你会意识到是另一个信念遮蔽了它，而你其实一直觉察到它的存在；奇怪的是，它之所以隐形，是因为你视其为理所当然。你并未将其视为关于实相的信念，而是当作实相本身，从未质疑过。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Again, it may not involve motion in terms with which you usually refer. There are many kinds of motion, for example, that you do not perceive as motion within the physical field. Action tampers with identity, yet were it not for action identity would be impossible. It may, here, sound like a contradiction; but to remain an identity, an identity must completely renew itself, and each renewal is indeed a termination. Yet without the termination no new action on the part of the identity would be possible. And without action no identity can be aware of its own existence.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，它可能不涉及你通常所指的运动形式。例如，有许多种运动在物质场域中并不被你感知为运动。行动会篡改身份，但若没有行动，身份便不可能存在。这听起来像矛盾：要维持身份，身份必须彻底更新自身，而每次更新确实是一次终结。然而没有终结，身份便无法产生新行动。没有行动，身份也无法觉察自身存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (11:01.) Those selves are not dead, in other words. Your understanding of this must be limited because you automatically think in terms of one life experience at a time, and in linear patterns of development. In your terms, a reincarnational self can be aware of your environment, and interact sometimes through your own relationships.
quotes.translation: （11:01）换言之，那些自我并未死亡。你对这点的理解必然受限，因为你自动以单次生命经验、线性发展模式思考。用你的话说，转世自我能觉察你的环境，有时通过你的人际关系产生互动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consciousness is not dependent upon form, as I have said, and yet it always seeks to create form. We do not exist in any time framework as you know it. Minutes, hours, or years have lost both their meaning and their fascination. We are quite aware of the time situations within other systems, however, and we must take them into account in our communications. Otherwise what we say would not be understood.
quotes.translation: 意识不依赖形态，如我所言，但它始终寻求创造形态。我们不存在于你所知的任何时间框架中。分钟、小时或年份已失去意义与魅力。但我们清楚其他系统内的时间状况，在沟通时必须将其纳入考量。否则我们所说的话将无法被理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For one thing, you are dealing with different kinds of consciousness than your own. They are focused consciousnesses, surely, each one feeling itself at life's center. While this is the case, however, these other forms of consciousness also identify then with the source of nature from which they emerge. In a way impossible to explain, the fly and the spider are connected, and aware of the connection. Not as hunter and prey, but as individual participants in deeper processes. Together they work toward a joint kind of value fulfillment, in which both are fulfilled.
quotes.translation: 首先，你面对的是不同于自身意识的各类意识。它们无疑是聚焦的意识，每个都自感处于生命中心。尽管如此，这些其他意识形态也认同于它们所源出的自然本源。以无法解释的方式，苍蝇与蜘蛛相互关联，并觉察到这种关联——并非作为猎手与猎物，而是作为更深层进程中的个体参与者。它们共同致力于一种联合的价值完成，使双方都得以圆满。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, for ourselves: Ruburt must work some things through on his own, as he knows. There is no doubt that the whole affair still seems strange to him, and he is acclimating himself to new conditions as they arise. It is understandable that he becomes uneasy at times under such circumstances. It is an excellent idea that he has taken up his painting again, for this turns his awareness to other matters. We shall endeavor to handle our relationships with the outside world in such a way that your private situations are not bothered any more than absolutely necessary.
quotes.translation: 至于我们这边：如鲁柏所知，他必须自行处理某些课题。毫无疑问，整件事对他而言仍显陌生，他正随着新状况的出现而调适自己。在此情境下他偶尔感到不安是可以理解的。他重拾绘画是绝佳主意，因为这能将他的觉察转向其他事物。我们将尽力以这样的方式处理与外界的关系，使你们的私人状况尽可能不受干扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This is the dilemma of the ego, particularly in its early states. It looks outward for answers because this is its nature: to manipulate within physical reality. It also senses, however, a deep and abiding connection that it does not understand, with other portions of the self that are not under its domain. It is also aware that this inner self possesses knowledge upon which its own existence is based.
quotes.translation: 这是自我的困境，尤其在早期阶段。它向外寻求答案，因为这是它的本性：在物质实相中运作。然而，它也感受到一种深刻而持久的联系——它无法理解这种联系——与自身其他不受其管辖的部分。它也知道，这个内在自我拥有其自身存在所依赖的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: They serve quite clearly as human representatives of All That Is. Now since each individual is a part of All That Is, to some extent each of you serve in that same role. In such a religious drama however (long pause), the main personality is much more conscious of his inner knowledge, more aware of his abilities, far better able to use them, and exultantly familiar with his relationship to all of life.
quotes.translation: 它们显然作为一切万有的人类代表。既然每个个体都是一切万有的一部分，在某种程度上，你们每个人都扮演着同样的角色。然而，在这样一个宗教戏剧中（长停顿），主要人格更清楚地意识到自己的内在知识，更了解自己的能力，更能善用它们，并欣喜地熟悉自己与所有生命的关系。

quotes.text: （The new family is large. The members operate an excellent clothing store inside the apartment, in the center. There is a staircase leading down to a side street. Clothing is arranged on shelves, and so forth. A sale is planned. Then I realize that I did know the people who lived in this apartment before also, and had forgotten. I am aware that I knew them in a dream, rather than in normal waking life.
quotes.translation: （新家庭很大。成员们在公寓中央经营一家极好的服装店。有楼梯通向一条小巷。衣服陈列在架子上等等。计划进行一次促销。然后我意识到，我以前也认识住在这间公寓里的人，但忘记了。我意识到我是在梦中认识他们的，而不是在正常的清醒生活中。

quotes.text: It is in the nature of an integration, an integrating reorganization in which insights and knowledge usually hidden in the main from conscious awareness, can now be effectively used and recognized. This integration naturally enough will rather vastly increase the physical performance. However in this period of its initial phases there is bound to be some physical effect as the system stabilizes itself.
quotes.translation: 这本质上是一种整合，一种重新组织的整合过程，其中通常隐藏于意识觉察之外的真知灼见与知识，现在可以被有效运用和认知。这种整合自然会相当大幅度地提升身体表现。然而，在这个初始阶段，随着系统稳定自身，必然会产生一些身体效应。

quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The body is geared then to act. It is pragmatically practical, and above all it wants to explore and to communicate. Communication implies a social nature. The body has within it inherently everything necessary for its own defense. The body itself will tease the child to speak, to crawl and walk, to seek its fellows. Through biological communication the child's cells are made aware of its physical environment, the temperature, air pressure, weather conditions, food supplies -- and the body reacts to these conditions, making some adjustments with great rapidity.
quotes.translation: 身体天生就是为了行动而设计的。它务实而实用，最重要的是，它想要探索和沟通。沟通意味着社会性。身体内在拥有自我防御所需的一切。身体本身会逗引孩子说话、爬行、行走，寻找同伴。通过生物性沟通，孩子的细胞会意识到其物理环境——温度、气压、天气状况、食物供应——而身体会对这些状况做出反应，并迅速做出一些调整。

quotes.text: （The stronger waves seemed to grow progressively stronger however. Once I "saw" a great light, as if perhaps the sun had come out suddenly. [It is a very dark, rainy day. ] This thrilling continued, till it was scarcely bearable. I felt that I would literally be carried away or swept away. At no time was I concerned for my own safety. The experience was amazingly pleasurable. I had suggested in the beginning that I snap out of the trance state by noon, and had set the alarm. It did not ring, however, and I became aware that the time set for the trance was over.
quotes.translation: （然而，较强的波动似乎逐渐增强。有一次我"看见"一道强光，仿佛太阳突然出来了。[这是一个非常阴暗的雨天。]这种激动持续着，直到几乎难以忍受。我觉得自己简直要被带走或冲走。我从未担心过自己的安全。这次体验极其愉悦。我一开始就建议在中午前脱离出神状态，并设定了闹钟。然而闹钟没有响，我意识到设定的出神时间已经结束了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Everything that is, is a materialization of aware, individualized, inquiring consciousness; and to love this is a personal, almost all-encompassing discipline and devotion. I say discipline because whenever, individualized inquiring consciousness expresses itself in form, it not only expresses its spontaneity; and this is not contradictory: But even while expressing its spontaneity, it disciplines it.
quotes.translation: 一切万有，都是有意识、个体化、探索中的意识的物质化；而爱这一切是一种个人的、近乎包罗万象的纪律与奉献。我说纪律，是因为每当个体化的探索中的意识以形态表达自己时，它不仅表达其自发性——这并不矛盾——而且在表达自发性的同时，它也约束了它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As mentioned (in the 614th session in Chapter Two), the first important step is to realize that your beliefs about reality are just that -- beliefs about reality and not necessarily attributes of reality. You must make a clear distinction between you and your beliefs. You must then realize that your beliefs are physically materialized. What you believe to be true in your experience is true. To change the physical effect you must change the original belief -- while being quite aware that for a time physical materializations of the old beliefs may still hold.
quotes.translation: 如前所述（第614节第二章），第一步重要的是认识到你对实相的看法只是对实相的看法，而非实相本身的属性。你必须清楚区分你自己和你的信念。然后你必须认识到你的信念是物质化的。你在经验中相信为真的事物就是真的。要改变物质效果，你必须改变最初的信念——同时清楚意识到，旧信念的物质化可能会暂时持续。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He continued, however, to remind himself that he was not going to worry about tomorrow today, regardless. He told himself that the prediction might be wrong, and he began with his intellect to pile up evidence that could in one way or another bring about a different, more beneficial experience. He did this by recognizing the way he had earlier been building up the picture in the old manner, by collecting all the evidence that fitted it. He used the same process, only for a more beneficial picture, and the process works. You have only to become aware of it.
quotes.translation: 然而，他继续提醒自己，无论如何他不会在今天为明天担忧。他告诉自己那个预测可能是错的，并开始用理智积累证据，这些证据能以某种方式带来不同、更有利的经验。他通过认识到自己以前如何以旧方式构建画面——收集所有符合它的证据——来做到这一点。他使用了同样的过程，只是为了更有利的画面，而这个过程是有效的。你只需要意识到它。

quotes.text: There is still relation to environment, however, and awareness of it. This may be purposely blocked off for greater efficiency, but it is not necessary. In many cases the eyes may be open, for example, though it may be easier to close them. Here sensitivity is quickened. Without necessarily following the methods given in A-1, the mental, physical and feeling aspects of past personalities will appear.
quotes.translation: 然而，与环境仍有联系，并且对其有觉知。这可能会为了更高效率而被刻意阻断，但并非必要。例如，在许多情况下，眼睛可能是睁开的，尽管闭眼可能更容易。此时敏感性会增强。不必严格遵循A-1中给出的方法，过去人格的心理、生理和情感方面就会出现。

quotes.text: Cellular transmission, for example, is indeed much more precise than any verbal language, communicating data so intricate that all of your languages together6 would fall far short of matching such complexity. This kind of communication carries information that a thousand alphabets could not translate. In such a way, one part of the body knows what is happening in every other part, and the body as a whole knows its precise position on the surface of the planet. It is biologically aware of all the other life-forms around it to the most minute denominator.
quotes.translation: 例如，细胞传递确实比任何口头语言精确得多，它传递的数据如此复杂，以至于你所有的语言加起来也远不及这种复杂性。这种沟通携带的信息，一千个字母表也无法翻译。通过这种方式，身体的一部分知道其他每一部分正在发生什么，而身体作为一个整体知道它在地球表面的精确位置。它在生物学上意识到周围所有其他生命形式，精确到最微小的分母。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The topmost layer of the subconscious contains predominantly present associations, but in these are mixed and interwoven associations which have their origin elsewhere. These may be called self-unifying associations, since merely by their presence in the uppermost layers of the subconscious they provide a unifying sense of psychic continuity; of which however the ego is not aware. For one thing, there are basic similarities between an individual's personality in various existences, so that quite naturally many associations of the same nature will arise.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的最上层主要包含当前的联想，但这些联想中混合并交织着源于其他地方的联想。这些可以称为自我统一的联想，因为仅仅通过它们存在于潜意识的最上层，它们就提供了一种统一的心理连续性感觉；然而，自我对此并无觉知。一方面，个体在不同存在中的人格之间存在基本相似性，因此很自然地会出现许多相同性质的联想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But you have on a subconscious level all the knowledge and experience of your previous selves upon which to build. Your dreams are free from the restrictions imposed by your ego, and your dreams affect your daily life much more than you know. For situations appear in them that affect your actions, and these are elements from your own previous selves. This is a large subject; but though I can tell you some things about your future, the future is not predestined, and subconsciously you are well aware yourself of what will happen, and all human beings are.
quotes.translation: 但在潜意识层面，你拥有所有前世自我的全部知识与经验作为基础。你的梦境不受自我设限的束缚，而梦对日常生活的影响远超你的认知。因为梦中出现的场景会影响你的行为，这些元素正来自你自身的前世自我。这是个宏大的主题；虽然我能告诉你一些关于未来的事，但未来并非注定，在潜意识层面你自身早已清楚将要发生什么——所有人类皆是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: To the extent that you are able to allow yourselves to be aware of data received by the inner senses, you are preparing yourself and are that far ahead. You remember, Joseph, the rather frightening sensation you felt during one instance of your use of one inner sense, when you translated inner data into the almost nightmare picture of open mouths that could not scream. This is but a minute instance.
quotes.translation: 当你能够允许自己觉察内在感官接收的数据时，你就在为自己做准备并领先一步。约瑟，还记得你运用内在感官时感受到的那种可怖震颤吗？当时你将内在数据转化为近乎噩梦的画面——张开的嘴巴却无法尖叫。这不过是微小的实例。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The ego however is not an afterthought disconnected from the whole self, and when the intellect becomes aware of data given to it by the intuitions or the inner self, it is then capable of informing the ego, which then changes its attitude accordingly. This way we are assured of the cooperation of the whole self, and avoid any possibility of splitting one self, one part of the self, against another.
quotes.translation: 然而自我并非脱离整体自我的事后产物，当理智觉察到直觉或内在自我给予的数据时，它便能告知自我，使自我相应调整态度。如此我们确保整体自我的协作，避免任何将自我的一部分与另一部分对立分裂的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action which is materialized within your plane appears within your field, and disappears from your field. This in no way affects the basic nature of action itself. That is, it does not change the basic laws of action. Action will change both within your physical field and outside your physical field. You are only aware of a small part of action, that portion which is materialized within your system.
quotes.translation: 在你们层面物质化的行动，出现在你们的场域中，又消失于你们的场域。这丝毫不会影响行动本身的基本性质——即不会改变行动的基本法则。行动既会在你们物理场域内变化，也会在物理场域外变化。你们仅能觉察行动的一小部分，即那些在你们系统内物质化的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This actual gathering up of prime vitality for the purpose of physical construction is not however truly automatic, and it is not truly performed unconsciously. The strong self-conscious self of which I have spoken, the self-conscious self of which your own personality is not aware, this self that faces into the inner world of reality, quite consciously draws upon the vitality and stuff of what is.
quotes.translation: 这种为物质建构而聚集原始生命力的过程，实则并非真正自动发生，也并非真正在无意识中进行。我曾提及的那个强大的自意识自我——你们人格尚未觉察的自意识自我——这个面向内在实相世界的自我，正完全有意识地汲取存在本身的活力与素材。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: That is, dreams are the best preventative medicine. Some psychological difficulties need clear conscious light and understanding. Others, however, operate even without conscious participation, and those are often solved, or remedied, at the same level without interfering with the conscious mind. As the body handles many physical manipulations without your own conscious knowledge of what is being done, or how, so the workings of your own psychological systems often automatically solve "their own problems" through dreams of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 换言之，梦境是最佳的预防药物。某些心理困境需要清醒的意识之光与理解。但另一些困境即便没有意识参与也会运作，它们往往在同一层面被解决或修正，无需干扰意识心智。正如身体在你不自知的情况下处理无数生理运作，你心理系统的运作也常通过你未曾察觉的梦境，自动"解决自身的问题"。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The hope and the possibilities here, as well as some of the dangers, lie in the fact that the ego does indeed change, and is not one specific reality but a series or group of actions, with direction, that have the potentiality for unlimited value fulfillment. The ego will never be less than it is now. It may very well be more. Possibilities for development here are very great, but most such possibilities lie still in the future, and only, so far, as possibilities. There is nothing that will force the ego to enlarge the scope of its awareness.
quotes.translation: 希望与可能性，以及某些危险，皆在于自我确实会改变这一事实——它并非某个特定的实相，而是一系列或一组具有方向性的行动，具备无限价值完成的潜能。自我永远不会比现在更少，它很可能变得更多。此处发展的可能性极为巨大，但大多数这类可能性仍存在于未来，且目前仅作为可能性存在。没有任何事物会迫使自我扩大其觉知的范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Instead events are built up, so to speak, from significances. But let us forget that term for a moment and consider association, with which you are already familiar, since your stream of consciousness operates in that fashion. By its very nature each consciousness is a particular, peculiar, and unique focus of awareness which will experience any possible realities through its own characteristics.
quotes.translation: 相反，事件是由意义构建而成的。但让我们暂时搁置这个术语，考虑一下你们已经熟悉的联想——因为你们的意识流正是以这种方式运作。就其本质而言，每个意识都是特定、独特且唯一的觉知焦点，它将通过自身的特性体验任何可能的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The hill house neighborhood is composed of a rather beneficial balance: No particular family of consciousness predominates. Instead, a love of woods and trees transcends such classifications. The area has brought together diverse kinds of people, united by love of nature, some airy spaces, and some privacy ... The people are also achievers of one kind or another, and while [your goals may be different] you appreciate the fact that they are trying to do something with their lives. Many are aware of their limitations. Many dabble in the arts.
quotes.translation: 山丘住宅区由相当有益的平衡构成：没有哪个特定的意识家族占据主导。相反，对树林与自然的热爱超越了这类分类。该区域汇聚了形形色色的人，他们因热爱自然、向往开阔空间与私密性而联结……这些人也都是某种程度的成就者，虽然[你们的目标可能不同]，但你们欣赏他们试图在生命中有所作为的事实。许多人意识到自身的局限，许多人涉猎艺术。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

source_raw.title: SESSION 739
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A large variety of dreams are the memories of this nonphysical existence that constantly occurs, though in waking life you are seldom aware of them. This cycle that psychologists have recently discovered, having to do with the various dream levels, corresponds to the ebb and tide of consciousness as it appears within and disappears from physical reality. It creates physical reality, as you know.
quotes.translation: 种类繁多的梦境是持续发生的非物质存在的记忆，尽管在清醒时你们很少意识到它们。心理学家最近发现的与不同梦境层次相关的周期，对应着意识在物质实相中出现与消失的潮汐涨落。如你所知，它创造了物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You are not aware, or Ruburt is not aware, of the direct inner perception. The physical organism cannot perceive it, hence some necessary transformations. The data may make itself known in visual or auditory forms. Some interpretation is always necessary.
quotes.translation: 你并未觉察，或鲁柏并未觉察到直接的内在感知。物质有机体无法感知它，因此需要某些必要的转化。数据可能以视觉或听觉形式显现自身。始终需要某种诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is impossible for you to examine an atom, a cell, or anything else except in your now. Period. Because your sense experience follows a time pattern that you can understand, then you take it for granted that a cell, for example, is the result of its past, and that its present condition arises from the past.4 The fetus grows into an adult, not because it is programmed from the past, but because it is to some extent precognitively aware of its probabilities, and from the "future" then imprints this information into the past structure.
quotes.translation: 你不可能在"当下"之外检视一个原子、一个细胞或任何事物。句号。因为你们的感官经验遵循着可理解的时间模式，于是你们理所当然地认为，例如细胞是其过去的结果，其当前状态源于过去。胎儿成长为成人，并非因为被过去所编程，而是因为它在一定程度上预知性地觉察到自身的可能性，并从"未来"将这种信息铭印到过去的结构中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: On some relatively few occasions, for example, Ruburt has been able to contact what he calls "Seth Two." That level of reality, however, is even further divorced from your own. It represents an even greater extension of the psyche, in your terms. (Long pause.) There is a much closer relationship, in that I recognize my own identity as a distinct portion of Seth Two's existence, where Ruburt feels little correspondence. In a manner of speaking, Seth Two's reality includes my own, yet I am aware of my contribution to "his" experience.
quotes.translation: 在少数情况下，例如，鲁柏曾接触到他所谓的“赛斯第二”。然而，那个层面的现实与你们的现实更加疏离。用你们的话来说，它代表了心灵更进一步的延伸。（长停顿）有一个更密切的关系，因为我认识到自己的身份是赛斯第二存在的一个独特部分，而鲁柏几乎感觉不到对应。可以说，赛斯第二的现实包含了我自己的现实，然而我意识到我对“他”的经验所做的贡献。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: That kind of dream awareness can literally regenerate your life, though the original impact will be forgotten, and the entire event will usually be translated into images before awakening. Such dream events may be called experiences of basic being. During them, the self or consciousness literally travels to the source of its own energy. On another level atoms possess this same kind of knowing.
quotes.translation: 那种梦中的觉知可以真正地重振你的生命，尽管最初的影响会被遗忘，整个事件通常会在醒来前被转化为图像。这样的梦事件可以被称为基本存在的经验。在它们期间，自我或意识真正地旅行到它自身能量的源头。在另一个层面上，原子也拥有这种同样的知晓。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Each of you, again, chose your parents and environment. You spoke in your notes (two days ago) of precognition in connection with art -- an excellent point. Precognition in those terms also applies at your birth, when ahead of time you are quite aware on unconscious levels of those conditions that you will meet. You have chosen them and projected them ahead of you, out into the medium of time.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你们每个人都选择了自己的父母和环境。你在笔记中（两天前）提到了与艺术相关的预知——这是一个很好的观点。那些术语中的预知也适用于你的出生，当时你在无意识层面上早已清楚你将遇到的那些条件。你选择了它们，并将它们投射到你面前，进入时间媒介中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There are many later-appended references in the Bible, such as the fig tree story, in which nature is played down. Christ's "father" was, however, the God who was indeed aware of every sparrow that fell, who knew of every creature's existence, whatever its species or kind. The story of the shepherds and flocks comes much closer to Christ's intent, where each creature looked out for the others.
quotes.translation: 圣经中有许多后来添加的引用，比如无花果树的故事，其中贬低了自然。然而，基督的“父亲”是那个确实知道每一只麻雀坠落、知晓每一个生物存在（无论其物种或种类）的上帝。牧羊人和羊群的故事更接近基督的本意，其中每个生物都照顾其他生物。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

9:30 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Telepathically you were aware of the full nature of the males relationship with his mother. You chase him precisely because you were fairly certain you would not have him, for it was the search, again, that was important. It is a substitute for facing your own destiny. It is a counterfeit living pattern, and you are using it to avoid developing your full strength and stature as a personality.
quotes.translation: 通过心电感应，你完全了解那个男性与他母亲关系的本质。你追求他，恰恰是因为你相当确定你不会得到他，因为再次强调，追求本身才是重要的。这是逃避面对你自己命运的一种替代。这是一种虚假的生活模式，你用它来避免发展你作为人格的全部力量和高度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You must allow the normal waking consciousness to become transparent, so to speak, without however disturbing its flow. When this is accomplished you can also become aware of the projection conditions. This is almost like working backward, for directly beneath the thoughts and impressions of waking consciousness, you will glimpse dream images like those that appear just as you fall to sleep.
quotes.translation: 你必须让正常的清醒意识变得透明，可以这么说，但不要干扰它的流动。当这完成时，你也能意识到投射的条件。这几乎像是逆向工作，因为在清醒意识的思绪和印象正下方，你会瞥见梦的图像，就像你刚入睡时出现的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As I also mentioned (in the 614th session in Chapter Two), the conscious mind is not basically cut off from the inner self or from those deep inner sources of knowledge available to it. The aware mind is not any one event, for that matter; it represents various portions of the inner self that "surface" at any given time.
quotes.translation: 如我先前所述（第二章第六一四节），意识心并非与内在自体或可用的深层内在知识来源根本隔绝。觉知心本身并非单一事件；它代表内在自体的不同部分在特定时刻"浮出水面"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: What you have is a kind of inner backbone of perception--a backup program, so to speak, an inner perceptive mechanism with its own precise psychological tuner that in one way or another operates within the field of your intent. This is somewhat like remote sensing, or like an interior (pause) radar equipment that operates in a psychological field of attention, so that you are somewhat aware of the existence of certain events that concern you as they come into the closer range of probabilities with which you are connected.
quotes.translation: 你所拥有的是某种内在感知脊梁——可说是备用程序，一种内在感知机制，配有精确的心理调谐器，以某种方式在你意图的场域内运作。这有点像遥感，或像内在（停顿）雷达设备在心理注意场中运作，使你多少能觉察到某些与你相关的事件，当它们进入与你相连的概率较近范围时。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The physical environment is as much a part of you, then, basically you see, as the physical image. Your control over it is quite effective, for you create it as you create your fingertip. You are not consciously aware, consciously underlined, of your control over the physical object that may be touched by that fingertip.
quotes.translation: 因此，物质环境与物质形象一样，基本上是你的一部分。你对它的控制相当有效，因为你创造它如同创造你的指尖。你并未有意识地——强调有意识——觉察你对指尖可能触碰的物质物体的控制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: However, when it is enabled to let go its preoccupation with the camouflage universe, it can receive and be aware of data received by the inner senses. Such data does not have to be retained on a subconscious level. The conscious personality can be trained to receive, interpret and retain such knowledge. Otherwise such knowledge would be relatively without value in your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 然而，当它能够放下对幻相宇宙的执念时，便能接收并觉察内在感官所接收的数据。这类数据无需保留在潜意识层面。有意识的人格可以经过训练来接收、解读并保留这类知识。否则，这类知识在你的幻相宇宙中将相对毫无价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is this inner self, out of the massive knowledge and unlimited scope of its consciousness, that forms the physical world, that provides stimuli to keep the ego constantly at the job of awareness . It is the inner self, termed here the inner ego, that organizes, initiates, projects, controls the EE units of which we have been speaking lately, transforming energy into objects, into matter.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在自体，凭借其意识的庞大知识与无限范围，形成了物质世界，提供刺激使自我持续保持觉知的工作。正是这个内在自体——此处称为内在自我——组织、启动、投射并控制我们近来讨论的EE单位，将能量转化为物体、转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (11:13.) There is more, but it will have to wait simply because it is not presently translatable. According to the impact of this session, your own comprehensions and perceptions will bring other clues, either in the waking or the dream state. Keep your minds open for them, but without any preconceived ideas of how they might appear. Ruburt's own development triggers certain psychic activity that then triggers further growth. He has been participating in his library, for example, whether or not he is always aware of it.
quotes.translation: （11点13分）还有更多内容，但必须暂缓，只因目前尚无法翻译。根据本节的冲击力，你们自己的理解与感知将带来其他线索，无论是在清醒状态还是梦境中。保持开放心态迎接它们，但不要预设立场认为它们会以何种形式出现。鲁柏自身的发展会触发某些心灵活动，进而引发进一步成长。例如，他一直在图书馆中参与活动，无论他是否始终觉察到这一点。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

SESSION 818, FEBRUARY 6, 1978

source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Now the ego's concepts are your concepts, since it is a part of you. If you dwell on ideas of danger or potential disaster, if you think of the world mainly in terms of your physical survival and consider all those circumstances that may work against it, then you may find yourself suddenly aware of precognitive dreams that foretell incidents of accidents, earthquakes, robberies or murders.
quotes.translation: 现在，自我的概念就是你的概念，因为它是你的一部分。如果你沉溺于危险或潜在灾难的想法，如果你主要从肉体生存的角度看待世界，并考虑所有可能威胁生存的情况，那么你可能会突然意识到那些预示事故、地震、抢劫或谋杀事件的预知梦。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The conscious mind is endlessly creative. This applies to all areas of conscious-mind thinking. It is also the organizer of physical data, so natural guilt became the basis for all kinds of variations. These closely followed man's religious and social groupings. The latter are also the result of the aware mind's capacity to play upon, mix and merge, and rearrange perception and experience.
quotes.translation: 意识心智具有无尽的创造力。这适用于意识心智思维的所有领域。它也是物质数据的组织者，因此自然内疚成为各种变体的基础。这些变体紧密追随人类的宗教和社会群体。后者也是觉知心智发挥、混合、融合并重新排列感知与经验的能力的结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many of the most powerful aspects of consciousness are at work precisely when it seems to you that you are relatively unconscious and asleep to physical reality. It would be impossible for you to handle the vast amount of material available, in the context of time as you presently experience it. To operate adequately in your highly specific field (pause), an almost infinite amount of information must be instantly assimilated, probabilities calculated, and certain balances maintained of which you are not even aware.
quotes.translation: 意识最强大的许多方面，恰恰在你似乎相对无意识、对物质实相沉睡时运作。在你目前体验的时间脉络中，你不可能处理大量可用的材料。为了在你高度特定的领域中充分运作（停顿），必须瞬间吸收几乎无限的信息，计算可能性，并维持某些你甚至没有察觉到的平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: （When I was a few car lengths from the light, the dream suddenly popped into my mind. Just as in the dream, I found myself stopping for a red light. The effect was so startling that I at once began to wonder whether it was possible to act out dream suggestions in waking life. My self questioning was particularly intriguing because I could have chosen from a half-dozen routes to work; yet I had picked a course that enabled me to act out the dream of the night before, while not being consciously aware of the dream.）
quotes.translation: （当我离红绿灯还有几个车距时，那个梦突然浮现在脑海中。就像在梦里一样，我发现自己正停下来等红灯。效果如此惊人，我立刻开始怀疑是否可能在清醒生活中演出梦的暗示。我的自我质疑特别引人入胜，因为我本可以从半打路线中选择去上班；然而我选了一条让我能演出前一晚梦境的路线，同时并没有有意识地意识到那个梦。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In certain terms, the ego is the eye through which the conscious mind perceives, or the focus through which it views physical reality. But the conscious mind automatically changes its focus throughout life. The ego, while appearing the same to itself, ever changes. It is only when the conscious mind becomes rigid in its direction, or allows the ego to take on some of its own functions, that difficulties arise. Then the ego allows the conscious mind to work in certain directions and blocks its awareness in others.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度来说，自我是意识心智用以感知的眼睛，或是它用以审视物质实相的焦点。但意识心智在一生中会自动改变其焦点。自我虽然对自己显得相同，却始终在变化。只有当意识心智在其方向上变得僵化，或允许自我接管它的一些功能时，困难才会出现。那时，自我允许意识心智在某些方向上运作，却阻挡了它在其他方向上的觉知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: But, you see, even this overall pyramid gestalt is not static. All or most concepts of a god deal with a static god and herein lies the main theological difficulties. The awareness and experience of this overall gestalt constantly change and grow. Again, there is no static god. When you say," This is God", then God is already something else. I am using the term God for simplicity's sake.
quotes.translation: 但是，你看，即使是这个整体的金字塔完形也不是静止的。所有或大多数关于神的概念都涉及一个静态的神，而这里正是主要的神学困难所在。这个整体完形的觉知与体验不断变化和成长。再次强调，没有静态的神。当你说"这就是神"时，神已经变成了别的东西。我使用"神"这个术语只是为了简便。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, the personalities that are reached under ordinary seance， quote ，"conditions", are not personalities such as mine. They are personalities recently dead, in your terms, with strong connections to your environment, and not aware as yet generally of their own larger existence. In other words, this is not what I am.
quotes.translation: 通常降神会所谓“条件”下接触到的那些人格，并非我这样的人格。按你们的说法，他们是刚去世不久、与你们环境有强烈联系的人格，通常尚未意识到自身更广大的存在。换言之，这并非我的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Again this in no way implies an invasion of Ruburt by myself, but instead implies an extension on Ruburts part to make way for the experience. It is not a lessening of self but an extension of self, so that the self-awareness can include not only self but independent （you may call this other） self experience, to include a value that is usually lacking in your ordinary behavior patterns.
quotes.translation: 这绝不意味着鲁柏被我侵入，而是指鲁柏扩展自身以容纳这种体验。这不是自我的缩减，而是自我的延伸——使自我意识不仅能包含自身，还能包含独立的（你们可称之为“他者”）自我体验，以纳入你们日常行为模式中通常缺乏的价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The sensations are a physical demonstration of an inner sense reaction on a psychic basis, or level, which you have not yet achieved, and cannot be expected to. The self would expand. In your relationship with your parents for example, such a psychic expansion of self would allow you to absorb your own awareness of their sometimes painful existence, and you would feel no wound yourself.
quotes.translation: 这些感受是内在感官在心灵基础或层面上的物理性展现，是你们尚未达到、也无法预期达到的状态。自我会扩展。例如在你们与父母的关系中，这种心灵性的自我扩展将使你们能吸收自身对他们有时痛苦存在的觉知，而自身却不会感到创伤。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Many actual physical intervening steps are cut out. The ego becomes more similar to the inner ego than to its old self, comparatively speaking. This altered ego is aware of large portions of inner reality that were previously denied. Structurally it remains intact, and yet it has changed chemically, and electromagnetically. It is able to open up so that inner experience can be received.
quotes.translation: 许多实际物理介入的步骤被省略了。相对而言，自我变得比旧有的自我更接近内在自我。这种被改变的自我能意识到先前被否认的广大内在实相。它在结构上保持完整，却在化学与电磁层面发生了改变。它能够敞开以接收内在经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is not meant to dilute the function or natural abilities of reasoning awareness, for its powers allow you to focus experience in a highly specific manner, and to direct energy with great purposeful attention. (Pause.) In your terms, this action is in the process of automatically changing the nature of rational consciousness -- which is, as you think of it, in a state of evolution.
quotes.translation: 这并非要削弱理性觉知的功能或天赋能力——因为其力量使你们能以高度特定的方式聚焦经验，并以极具目的性的专注引导能量。（停顿）按你们的说法，这种行动正自动改变理性意识的本质——你们所认为的理性意识，正处在演化状态中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Psychological vitality is a transformation of energy, again, into terms not recognizable by the outer senses. There are literally countless such manifestations of energy with which the outer senses are not familiar. The inner senses, to the contrary, are well aware of these manifestations, and of the existence of an open infinite system, within which they only are equipped to function.
quotes.translation: 心理活力是能量的转化，再次转化为外在感官无法识别的形式。外在感官不熟悉的能量显现方式，实际上多到不可胜数。相反，内在感官却对这些显现了如指掌，也深知那个开放无限系统的存在——它们正是被设计来在此系统中运作的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is communication between them but they are not aware of it. The tape is the element common to all the channels. Now. The inner ego is the director as you know, but the whole self must know itself simultaneously. It is not enough that the inner ego knows what is going on. Ultimately therefore the inner ego must itself bring about comprehension on the parts of the various portions.
quotes.translation: 它们之间存在着沟通，但它们并未意识到这一点。磁带是所有通道的共同元素。现在。内在自我是导演，如你所知，但整体自己必须同时知晓它自己。内在自我知道发生了什么还不够。因此，最终内在自我本身必须促使各个部分产生理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Referring to his Introduction again, he remarks that he misses the excitement of the chase, encountered in his own creative work. Here, you see, the acceleration is so rapid and intense that he is not consciously able to follow it. The unconscious, so-called, has little to do with this phenomenon. It is, however, related strongly to qualities inherent within each consciousness. Such ability is rarely used to full advantage. Connections are made so rapidly that the physical brain is not aware of them.
quotes.translation: 再次引用他的引言，他提到自己怀念在创作工作中遇到的追逐的兴奋感。你看，这里的加速如此迅速而强烈，以至于他无法有意识地跟上它。所谓的无意识与这种现象关系不大。然而，它却与每个意识内在固有的特质密切相关。这种能力很少被充分利用。连接建立得如此之快，以至于物质大脑无法意识到它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I hesitate in many instances to say what I might, because it is so easy to misinterpret meanings; but when you ask what is the purpose of consciousness you take it for granted there must be one purpose -- where the greater truth and creativity must be that consciousness itself cannot be aware of all of its own purposes, but ever discovers its own nature through its own manifestations.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，我犹豫是否说出我可能说的话，因为很容易误解含义；但当你问意识的目的是什么时，你理所当然地认为必须有一个目的——而更大的真理和创造力必须是意识本身无法意识到它自己的所有目的，而是通过它自己的展现不断发现它自己的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You consciously give the signals for reaction. It is not the other way around. Past events do not intrude in this manner unless they are beckoned by the conscious expectations and thoughts that exist within your mind. (Pause.) Those unconscious memories will be activated according to your current beliefs. You will be replenished and renewed as your thoughts motivate joyful body sensations and physical events, or you will be depressed as you bring into your awareness unpleasant past body happenings.
quotes.translation: 你有意识地发出反应的信号。不是反过来。过去的事件不会以这种方式侵入，除非它们被你心智中存在的有意识的期望和思想所召唤。（停顿。）那些无意识的记忆将根据你当前的信念被激活。当你的思想激发愉悦的身体感觉和物质事件时，你将得到补充和更新；或者当你将不愉快的过去身体经历带入你的觉知时，你将感到沮丧。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: At the same time imagine that these creatures are really one creature, but with definite parts equipped to handle two entirely different worlds. The subconscious therefore, in this truly ludicrous analogy, would exist between the two brains, and would enable the creature to operate as a single unity. At the same time, and this is the difficult part to explain, neither of the two faces would ever see the other world. They would not be aware of each other. And yet each would be fully self-conscious.
quotes.translation: 同时想象这些生物实际上是一个生物，但具有明确的部分，能够处理两个完全不同的世界。因此，在这个真正荒谬的类比中，潜意识将存在于两个大脑之间，并使该生物能够作为一个单一整体运作。同时，这是难以解释的部分，两张脸中的任何一张都永远不会看到另一个世界。它们不会意识到彼此。然而，每一张脸都完全具有自我意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (This effect appeared shortly before vacation, on an experimental head in oil I was working on. Brown was one of the colors used, and could have contributed to the undesirable purplish undertone in the flesh. The effect cropped up before I was aware of it. I cannot be positive the sepia caused the effect without trying some deliberate experiments to see, but certainly it contributed.
quotes.translation: （这种效果在假期前不久出现，在我正在创作的一幅油画实验头像上。棕色是使用的颜色之一，可能导致了肤色中不理想的紫色调。这种效果在我意识到之前就出现了。我不能肯定棕褐色导致了这种效果，除非进行一些有意的实验来验证，但它肯定起了作用。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (On page 6, see my notes in the third paragraph before Session 423.

quotes.text: The experience involved in learning to change your own focus of awareness will be most beneficial. It will even add to the beneficial nature of your own dreams. You do not have to sleep to dream. Every individual has had his daydreams, and here you can see more clearly this change of focus. I meant to mention this earlier. Ruburt can request levitation dreams, and he will have them.
quotes.translation: 学习改变自身觉知焦点的经验将大有裨益，甚至能提升你梦境的有益本质。你无需入睡即可做梦。每个人都曾有过白日梦，在此你能更清晰地观察到这种焦点的转变。我本应早些提及此事——鲁柏可以请求漂浮之梦，他将会获得这样的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: Again, master events are those that most significantly affect your system of reality, even though the original action was not physical but took place in the inner dimension. Most events appear both in time and out of it, their action distributed between an inner and outer field of expression. Usually you are aware only of events' exterior cores. The inner processes escape you.
quotes.translation: 现在：再次强调，主导事件是指那些最能影响你实相系统的事件，即便原始行动并非物质性的，而是发生于内在维度。多数事件既存在于时间之中又超越时间，其行动分布在内在与外在的表达场域之间。通常你只能觉察到事件的外在核心，其内在过程则逃逸你的感知。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am speaking now of course of both of you. That is, each of you should by now be aware of such an emerging psychological unit. It is the result of your ability to step out of your own system to some small extent, for you cannot do this until you are ready. For the very attempt, or successful attempt, results in an extension of the self out of the system in which you were nurtured.
quotes.translation: 此刻我自然是在谈论你们两位。也就是说，你们各自应当已经觉察到这样一个正在浮现的心理单元。这是你们能够在一定程度上脱离自身系统的能力所致——因为除非你已准备就绪，否则无法做到这一点。正是这种尝试或成功的尝试，导致自我延伸出滋养你的那个系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now when you use the word I, more and more, this is the portion of the self of which I spoke in our last session. You are aware of the ego and able to see yourself as something more than the ego is. This is the I that you have been using in the pendulum sessions, that questions both the ego and subconscious. These are all portions of the self, however; the difference is functional.
quotes.translation: 现在当你越来越多地使用"我"这个字眼时，这便是我在上次课程中提及的那部分自我。你已觉察到自我，并能视自己为超越自我的存在。这正是你在钟摆课程中使用的那个"我"，它既质疑自我也质疑潜意识。然而这些都属于自我的不同部分，差异仅在于功能层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I suggest something. I will say good night. If I feel like going on for hours, it is because one year ago tonight I first made contact with Ruburt--at least a subconscious initial contact of which he was not consciously aware. The year has been a good one, even though my practical suggestions have not been followed, your situation has improved in line with the laws of expectation.
quotes.translation: 我建议就此打住。我要说晚安了。若我意犹未尽想继续数小时，那是因为一年前的今夜我首次与鲁柏建立联系——至少是潜意识层面的初始接触，而他当时并未有意识地察觉。这一年堪称美好，尽管我的实用建议未被遵循，但你们的处境已按照期望法则获得改善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are other self-conscious portions of the self however, with which the ego is not at all familiar, but of which the subconscious has intuitive knowledge. These self-conscious portions of the self exist in different reality systems. Before we go into our Dr. Instream material, let me remind you however that there is a whole self, composed of these various self-conscious selves, and that a portion of the self is indeed aware of the unity that exists to form the whole psychological gestalt.
quotes.translation: 然而自我还有其他自我意识部分，这些部分自我全然陌生，但潜意识对其拥有直觉认知。这些自我意识部分存在于不同的实相系统中。在我们进入"因斯特里姆博士"资料前，容我提醒：存在着一个由这些不同自我意识部分组成的整体自我，而自我的某个部分确实觉察到构成整体心理完形的那份统一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: They are aware of your egotistical self, but very dimly. You are their environment, so to speak, and they are aware of your health and vitality as it affects them and their own well being. Some are stronger than others. Some are intrusive.
quotes.translation: 它们能感知到你的自我部分，但非常模糊。可以说，你是它们的环境，它们能感知到你的健康和活力如何影响它们自身及福祉。有些比其他的更强，有些则具有侵入性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: New paragraph: While your beliefs do structure much of your dream activity, other issues are also involved simply because the focus of your awareness is not acutely directed toward physical reality, but is only opaquely concerned with it.
quotes.translation: 新段落：虽然你的信念确实构建了你大部分梦境活动，但其他因素也参与其中，仅仅是因为你意识的焦点并未敏锐地指向物质实相，而只是模糊地与之相关。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the dreaming state and in other states of consciousness, he can indeed to some degree become aware of perceptions which will be neglected by the ego alone. In other words, psychologically there is only one portion of self A that is limited in its perceptions to the physical dimension, and that is the ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态及其他意识状态中，他确实能在某种程度上感知到单靠自我会忽略的知觉。换句话说，从心理层面来看，只有自我这一部分自我的知觉局限于物质维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The timeless quality will be built in, for the painting itself, though flawless in form, will suggest the changing quality of form, and stress the permanent quality that gives it its meaning. If you as artist are also aware that the same energy that fills the form that you paint also forms your own image, then the transformation into something better than excellent art is made.
quotes.translation: 永恒的特质将被融入其中，因为这幅画本身，尽管形式完美无瑕，却会暗示形式的变化特质，并强调赋予其意义的恒常特质。如果你作为艺术家也意识到，充满你所描绘形式的同一能量也构成了你自己的形象，那么就能转化为超越卓越艺术的作品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: They were observed by others. They were hysterical productions born of your own desperation and given instant physical validity. Your un-conscious-awareness was within them. They had no independent personality consciousness of their own.
quotes.translation: 它们被他人观察到。它们是因你自身的绝望而产生的歇斯底里产物，并被赋予了即时的物质有效性。你的无意识觉知存在于它们之内。它们自身没有独立的个性意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: These other existences of yours go on quite merrily whether you are waking or sleeping, but while you are awake ordinarily you block them out. In the dream state you are much more aware of them, although there is a final process of dreaming that often masks intense psychological and psychic experience, and unfortunately what you usually recall is this final dream version.
quotes.translation: 现在：无论你清醒还是沉睡，你的这些其他存在都愉快地进行着，但当你平常清醒时，你会屏蔽它们。在梦境状态中，你对它们有更多的觉知，尽管存在一个最终的梦境过程，常常掩盖了强烈的心理与心灵体验，不幸的是，你通常回忆起的正是这最终的梦境版本。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: However, the inner senses are aware of the body's own physical data at all times, while the outer senses are concerned with the body mainly in its relationship to camouflage environment. In other words the inner senses have an immediate, constant knowledge of the body in a way that the outer senses do not.
quotes.translation: 然而，内我感官始终觉察着身体自身的物理数据，而外我感官主要关注身体与伪装环境的关系。换言之，内我感官以某种方式持续直接地了解身体，这是外我感官所不具备的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Q-u-a-n-d-r-a-n-t-s, will not concern you for quite some time. Needless to say I wanted you to know that there is much more than even this, complexities that are truly astounding, intelligences that operate in what I suppose you would call a gestalt fashion, building blocks of vitalities of truly unbelievable maturity, awareness and comprehension. These are the near ultimate.
quotes.translation: 四-象-限-在相当长一段时间内不会涉及你们。不用说，我想让你们知道，甚至还有比这多得多的东西——真正令人惊叹的复杂性，以你们所谓完形模式运作的智慧，由真正难以置信的成熟度、觉知与理解力构成的生命积木。这些近乎终极。
