quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have told you that exterior reality is a materialization of inner electromagnetic reality. I have told you that all experience is electromagnetically coded. The inner senses pick up this data directly, you see, as in last Friday's episode. Some translation must occur if you are to become aware consciously of such material, or if it is to impress the physical senses at all.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉你们，外在实相是内在电磁实相的物质化。我曾告诉你们，所有经验都以电磁方式编码。内我感官直接接收这些数据，你们看，就像上周五的片段那样。若要有意识地觉察这类材料，或使其对物质感官产生印象，就必须发生某种转译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, so-called, is aware to some extent of the ego, regarding it as an extension of itself, over which it does not have as much control as it would like. This is precisely however the way the ego views the subconscious, as a rule. These two self-conscious portions of the self simply happen to coincide or to coexist with some proximity, psychologically speaking.
quotes.translation: 所谓的潜意识在某种程度上觉察着自我，将其视为自身的延伸，且对它的控制力不如其期望的那样强。然而，这恰恰是自我看待潜意识的方式——通常如此。从心理学角度而言，这两个自我的自觉部分只是恰好以某种邻近性共存或并存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The form is caused by a characteristic condition of the energy at any given time. If you are intuitively aware of that miraculous neatness, if you allow yourself to be enveloped within that particular moment point, then the painting will form itself about you in somewhat the same manner that I am formed about Ruburt's voice. But your painting of course will be more visible.
quotes.translation: 形态由能量在任何特定时刻的特征状态所决定。若你直觉地觉察到那奇迹般的精确性，若你允许自己被包裹在那个特定时间点中，那么画作将围绕你自行成形——某种程度上如同我围绕鲁柏的声音成形一般。但你的画作当然会更可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Each "part" of the soul contains the whole -- a concept I am sure will startle you. As you become more aware of your own subjective reality you will therefore, become familiar with greater portions of your own soul. When you think of the soul as a closed system you perceive it as such, and close off from yourself the knowledge of its greater creativity and characteristics.
quotes.translation: 灵魂的每个"部分"都包含整体——我确信这个概念会令你们震惊。当你对自己的主观实相愈发觉察，你便会愈发熟悉自己灵魂的更大片段。当你将灵魂视为封闭系统时，你便如此感知它，并因此隔绝了对其更大创造力与特性的认知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You possess within yourself all of those potentials in which consciousness creatively takes part. The cell does not need to be consciously aware of you in order to fulfill itself, even though your expectations of health largely influence its existence, but your recognition of the soul and entity can help you direct energies from these other dimensions into your daily life.
quotes.translation: 你自身拥有所有那些意识创造性参与其中的潜能。细胞无需有意识地觉察你就能完成自身，尽管你对健康的期望在很大程度上影响其存在，但你对灵魂与存有的认知能帮助你将这些其他维度的能量导向日常生活。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment. (Long pause.) All That Is is alive within the least of itself, aware within for example the molecule. It endows all of its parts -- or its creations -- with its own abilities that then act as inspiration, impetus, guiding lines and principles, by which these parts then seek to further create themselves, their own worlds and systems. This is freely given.
quotes.translation: 请稍等。（长停顿。）一切万有在其最微小的部分中都是活生生的，例如在分子内部具有觉知。它赋予其所有部分——或说其创造物——自身的能力，这些能力随后作为灵感、驱动力、指引方针与原则，使这些部分得以进一步创造自身、自己的世界与体系。这是无偿给予的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A painter puts part of himself into a painting. You put all of you of which you are aware into your body, so that it becomes you in flesh. An artist loves his painting. In physical terms it is completed when he puts down his brush -- at least for him, though its effects continue. But you are creating your material image as long as you live, and manifesting yourself in it.
quotes.translation: 画家将自己的一部分注入画作。你将你所觉察到的全部自己注入身体，使其成为肉身中的你。艺术家热爱自己的画作。就物质层面而言，当他放下画笔时画作便已完成——至少对他而言如此，尽管其影响仍在延续。但只要你活着，你就在持续创造自己的物质形象，并在其中展现自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: That center is like a road that you can follow inward. Remembered faces of those you have known, and remembered scenes from other existences, form the nucleus of your experience; the forms that you bring, seemingly out of nothing, into actuality. Although you are not consciously aware of the past familiarity, nevertheless you use the knowledge to your conscious advantage.
quotes.translation: 那个中心就像一条你可以向内追随的道路。你所认识之人的记忆面容，以及来自其他存在的记忆场景，构成了你经验的核质；那些你仿佛从虚无中带入现实的形态。尽管你并未有意识地觉察到过去的熟悉感，但你仍将这份知识用于有意识的益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You will continue to grow and develop, and you will become aware of other environments, even as you left your childhood home. But environments are not objective things, conglomerations of objects that exist independently of you. Instead you form them and they are quite literally extensions of yourself; materialized mental acts that extend outward from your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你将持续成长与发展，并会觉察到其他环境，正如你离开童年家园一般。但环境并非客观事物，并非独立于你而存在的物体集合。相反，你塑造它们，而它们确实是你自身的延伸；从你意识向外延伸的物质化心智行为。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Abroad. A few in your country are becoming aware on a very faint theoretical basis, when they consider the possibilities involved in the breaking down of physical components into basic energy forms, such theories being considered I believe along with a future space program. This idea will help you understand what I mean when I say that I have structure but can change it.
quotes.translation: 在国外。你们国家有少数人正基于非常模糊的理论基础开始觉察，当他们考虑将物质成分分解为基本能量形态的可能性时——我相信这类理论正与未来的太空计划一同被考量。这个想法将帮助你理解我说"我有结构但能改变它"的含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: From him, you instinctively knew that you would learn some awareness of passionate involvement. It is true that you are both learning, and learning well. There is little danger that you will become overly involved. Ruburt, however, could conceivably become so disciplined that his passionate intuitive involvement was rendered much less active, and this would be a mistake.
quotes.translation: 从他身上，你本能地知道你会学到某种对热情投入的觉知。确实，你们两人都在学习，而且学得很好。你几乎不可能变得过度投入。然而，鲁柏可能会变得过于自律，以至于他充满激情的直觉投入变得不那么活跃，这将是一个错误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Some of the information that I gave you in our last session, concerning the portions of the self, seem rather alien, I am sure. Do not forget however that you are not even aware of many portions of the self that you know intellectually do exist. So it is not so strange to imagine other portions of the self with which you are not at all familiar in any conscious way.
quotes.translation: 现在。我确信，在上次课程中我给你们的一些关于自我各部分的资讯，看起来相当陌生。但别忘了，你们甚至没有意识到许多你们理智上知道确实存在的自我部分。因此，想象你们在任何有意识的方式下完全不熟悉的自我其他部分，并不那么奇怪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: A psychological existence presupposes experience, experience in terms of value fulfillment (pause) and the Emotional manipulation and direct knowledge of subjective states. This involves a capacity and ability to throw yourself wholeheartedly into a reality enveloping situation, and yet to be aware of the self who is then so lost or enveloped. (Pause; emphatic delivery.)
quotes.translation: 心理上的存在预设了经验，以价值完成（停顿）和情感处理及对主观状态的直接知识为形式的经验。这涉及一种能力和本领，使你能够全心全意投入一个包裹着现实的处境，同时又能觉知那个当时如此迷失或被包裹的自我。（停顿；强调的语气。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Its sense of identity spontaneously goes beyond the change of its own form. It has no ego to cut the "I" identification short. Creatures without the compartment of the ego can easily follow their own identities beyond any changes of form. The inner self is aware of this integrity of identity, but the ego focused so securely in physical reality cannot afford this luxury.
quotes.translation: 它的身份感自发地超越自身形式的改变。它没有自我来切断"我"的认同。没有自我这个隔间的生物，可以轻易地跟随自己的身份超越任何形式的改变。内我觉知这种身份的完整性，但如此稳固地聚焦在物质实相中的自我却无法承受这种奢侈。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First I thought of Seth's assertion in the 92nd session for September 28, 1964, that "trees have their dreams"; [in Volume 1, see the quotations in Note 1 for Session 698]. Then I remembered that he'd come through with extensive material on tree consciousness in a much earlier session. With Jane's help the next day I found that information in the 18th session, which had been held on January 22, 1964. Most of that session is unpublished, although someday we'd like to print it in full. It contains many intriguing ideas -- as, for example: "A tree knows a human being also ... [yet it] does not even build up an image of a man, which is why this is so difficult to explain ... And the same tree will recognize the same man who passes it by each day."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In some ways you see, your dream world is actually much closer to the direct experience of reality than is your waking world, where the operation of the inner senses is shielded so from your own awareness. This is not to say that the dream world is more important to you in your present situation, merely that it contains more truth about the source of your own existence.
quotes.translation: 你看，在某些方面，你的梦境世界实际上比你的清醒世界更接近实相的直接经验，因为在清醒世界中，内在感官的运作被屏蔽在你的觉知之外。这并不是说在你们目前的情况下，梦境世界对你更重要，只是它包含了更多关于你自身存在源头的真相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is a difference in the various work done in different kinds of sessions, and subjectively Ruburt may be aware of this. The class sessions have their place, and they are meant to serve as illustration. While they each are legitimate within themselves they are each meant to show how the material can be applied. The source however is always in your private sessions.
quotes.translation: 在不同类型的课程中所做的各种工作存在差异，鲁柏主观上可能意识到这一点。班级课程有其地位，它们旨在作为示范。虽然它们各自在自身范围内是正当的，但每个都旨在展示如何应用这些资料。然而，源头始终在你们的私人课程中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is subconsciously aware of them in most cases, but seldom brings this to consciousness, so it is simply a feeling of disquietude on his part. He feels he will be interrupted, but is not consciously aware of this, you see.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在大多数情况下潜意识里知道它们，但很少将其带入意识层面，所以对他而言这仅仅是一种不安的感觉。他觉得自己会被打断，但并未有意识地察觉这一点，你明白吗。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt was working and without realizing it telepathically was aware of your emotional presence. It was this that gave him the idea of a projection experiment that morning. He wanted to see if he could become aware of your form.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏当时正在工作，并未意识到自己通过心灵感应感知到了你的情绪存在。正是这一点让他在那天早上产生了进行投射实验的想法。他想看看自己能否感知到你的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If you allow yourself to be more and more aware of your own beliefs, you can work with them. It is silly to try to fight what you think of as negative beliefs, or to be frightened of them. They are not mysterious. You may find that many served good purposes at one time, and that they have simply been overemphasized. They may need to be restructured rather than denied.
quotes.translation: 如果你允许自己越来越清楚地觉察自己的信念，你就能与它们合作。试图与你认为的负面信念对抗，或是对它们感到恐惧，都是愚蠢的。它们并不神秘。你可能会发现，许多信念曾一度服务于良好目的，只是被过度强调了。它们需要被重组而非否定。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When I use the term time-wise, I refer it to the formation of a structure from which one kind of consciousness then views itself, sees itself as unique, and then tries to form other kinds of conscious structures. A fly is conscious of itself, fulfilled within that reality, and feels no need to form an "extension" of that awareness from which to view its own existence.
quotes.translation: 当我使用"时间-wise"这个术语时，我指的是某种结构的形成——通过这种结构，某类意识得以审视自身，将自己视为独特的个体，并试图构建其他类型的意识结构。一只苍蝇意识到自己的存在，在那种实相中感到圆满，并不觉得需要将这种觉知"延伸"出另一个视角来审视自己的存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I said (in sessions 711 and 716, for instance) that your normal focus of consciousness can be compared to your home station. So far, exercises have been described that will gently lead you away from concentration upon this home base, even while its structure is strengthened at the same time. You can also call this home station or local program your world view, since from it you perceive your reality. To some extent it represents your personal focus, through which you interpret most of your experience. As I mentioned (in Session 715, for instance), when you begin to move away from that particular organization, strange things may start to happen. You may be filled with wonder, excitement, or perplexity. You may be delighted or appalled, according to whether or not your new perceptions agree or disagree with your established world view.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The inner material that "makes events real" comes from these other sources, however. Most of you are not aware of this basic, mysterious nature of events, because it does not occur to you to study the inner fabric. The past and future of any given event provides a kind of thickness, a kind of depth-in-time. The probabilities of an event escape you in practical terms.
quotes.translation: 然而，使"事件变得真实"的内在材料来自这些其他来源。你们大多数人并未察觉事件这种基本而神秘的本质，因为你们从未想过要研究其内在结构。任何给定事件的过去与未来都提供了一种厚度，一种时间中的深度。从实际层面而言，事件的概率性会从你们眼前溜走。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The same applies then to nations. Natural guilt is a creative mechanism, meant to serve as a conscious spur in the solving of problems that, in your terms, no other animals ever had. By taking advantage of it you leap still further through unknown frontiers, and break through into dimensions of awareness that were always latent since the birth of the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 同样的道理也适用于国家。自然内疚是一种创造性的机制，旨在作为有意识的鞭策，解决那些——用你们的话说——其他动物从未遇到过的问题。通过善用这种机制，你们将飞跃未知的疆界，突破进入自意识心智诞生以来便一直潜藏的觉知维度。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The ability to project idea or energy into physical construction is, therefore, generalized throughout the whole physical human body, and throughout the bodies of any living thing. This capacity, being a part of the generalized consciousness, or what you would call the subconsciousness, therefore performs its function without egotistical awareness or comprehension.
quotes.translation: 因此，将意念或能量投射到物质构造中的能力，普遍存在于整个人类肉体以及所有生物的身体中。这种能力作为普遍意识（即你们所谓的潜意识）的一部分，无需自我意识的理解或认知便能发挥其功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These connections between you therefore and All That Is can never be severed, and its awareness is indeed so delicate and focused that its attention is (underlined) directed with a prime creator's love to each consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们与一切万有之间的这些联系永远无法被切断，而它的觉知确实如此精微且专注，以至于它的注意力（着重号）以首要创造者的爱导向每一个意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If you wonder what Aunt Sally is doing in, say, Poughkeepsie, New York, then you will find yourself there. However, you cannot as a rule manipulate physical objects. You cannot pick up a lamp or throw a dish. This body is yours instantly, but it is not the only form that you will have. For that matter, this image is not a new one. It is interwound with your physical body now, but you do not perceive it. Following death, it will be the only body you are aware of for some time.
quotes.translation: 如果你想知道莎莉阿姨在纽约波基普西做什么，那么你会发现自己就在那里。然而，你通常无法操控物质物体。你无法拿起一盏灯或扔一个盘子。这个身体瞬间属于你，但它并非你将拥有的唯一形态。就此而言，这个影像并非新的。它现在与你的肉体交织在一起，但你并未感知到它。死亡之后，它将在某段时间内成为你唯一能意识到的身体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For energy regenerates itself. And as I have told you consciousness, conscious energy, continually manifests itself in various forms. Now. Remember last sessions explanation of mental enclosures, composed of inward, individualized, aware energy, materializing itself in physical form, and at a particular point closing off and becoming more or less a closed system.
quotes.translation: 因为能量会自我再生。正如我告诉过你们的，意识、有意识的能量，持续以各种形式展现自身。现在，请记住上次课程对心灵围场的解释——它由内在的、个体化的、有意识的能量构成，在物质形态中具体化，并在特定时刻封闭起来，或多或少成为一个封闭系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the same manner, the species as you think of it is at one level aware of its own probabilities and "future" lines of development. The child learning to walk may fall and hurt itself, yet it does learn. In the same way the race makes errors -- and yet in response to its own greater knowledge it continues to seek out those areas of its own probable fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 同样地，你们所认为的物种，在某一层面上也觉知自身的可能性与"未来"发展路线。学步的孩子可能会摔倒受伤，但他终究学会了。同样地，种族也会犯错——然而，响应于自身更伟大的知识，它持续探索那些可能实现自身圆满的领域。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Within the mind the dream has an electrical reality. Within the brain the dream has an electric and psychological reality; a much weaker electrical reality. That is, it still exists as an electrical reality, but it is not recognized as such by the brain or the psychological awareness of an individual. To the individual the dream has only a psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 在心灵中，梦境具有电性实相。在大脑中，梦境具有电性与心理实相——一种更微弱的电性实相。也就是说，它仍以电性实相存在，但大脑或个体的心理觉知并不将其视为如此。对个体而言，梦境仅具有心理实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have lived in physical terms within your three-dimensional universe, and I am aware of that universe. My main existence however is in a dimension of which your third-dimensional reality is only a part. I can therefore perceive, for example, portions of your future, simply because the future is only an illusion that exists in three-dimensional reality. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 我曾以肉身形式存在于你们的三维宇宙中，并觉察到那个宇宙。然而我的主要存在维度，是你们的三维实相仅为其一部分的领域。因此举例来说，我能感知你们未来的片段，仅仅因为未来只是存在于三维实相中的幻象。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I am not giving you some kind of disembodied knowledge, however. Knowledge itself (Pause, smile) is conscious. It is not a dead thing transmitted, since it has no meaning without personality and realization, and since it changes the personalities through whom it seems to flow. In changing them it of necessity is part of the awareness of the very cells it alters.
quotes.translation: 但我并非在传递某种脱离肉体的知识。知识本身（停顿，微笑）是有意识的。它不是被传输的死物，因为没有个性与了悟的知识毫无意义，且它会改变那些看似被它流经的人格。在改变它们的过程中，它必然成为被它改变的细胞本身觉察的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: He does all the things and says all the things that Augustus One would dearly love to do and say, with only certain safeguards. Augustus One, however, is not literally unconscious during this time, but quite aware of the "vicarious" activities and fulfillments. Again, it is a game of hide-and-seek, in which the so-called unconscious mind is relatively innocent.
quotes.translation: 他做着奥古斯都一号渴望去做的一切事情，说着他渴望说的一切话语，仅带有某些安全防护。然而奥古斯都一号在此期间并非真正无意识，而是相当清楚这些"替代性"活动与满足。这又是一场捉迷藏游戏，其中所谓的无意识心灵相对无辜。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you read your selves adjacently, you would build up confidence in the body, and in those cooperative consciousnesses that form it. You would have an intimate awareness of the body's healing processes also. You would not fear death as annihilation, and would feel your own consciousness gently disentangle itself from those others that so graciously couched it.
quotes.translation: 若你们能毗邻阅读自己的各个自我，就会对身体及构成身体的那些合作意识建立信心。你们也会对身体疗愈过程有亲密觉察。你们不会将死亡视为湮灭而恐惧，并能感知自己的意识温柔地从那些如此优雅地包裹它的其他意识中解脱出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The whole self or identity is aware of the experiences of all the egos, and since one identity forms these egos there is bound to be some similarities between them, and characteristics. The material that I have given you on reincarnation in the past is quite valid, particularly for working purposes, but it is a highly simplified version of what actually occurs.
quotes.translation: 整体自性或本体觉察所有自我的经验，由于同一个本体形成这些自我，它们之间必然存在某些相似性与特征。我过去给予你们的转世资料相当有效，尤其适用于工作目的，但这只是实际发生情况的极度简化版本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When falling off to sleep for example, imagine that you are in your yard, in another room of your apartment, or in front of the house. When this method is effective you will not be consciously aware of the actual separation however. I do not suggest at this point that you or Ruburt attempt to contact me during any projection. Later, when you have more training.
quotes.translation: 例如入睡时，想象自己身处庭院、公寓的另一房间或屋前。当此法生效时，你将有意识地觉察不到实际的分离。现阶段我不建议你或鲁柏在任何投射期间尝试联系我。待日后你们接受更多训练时再说。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They are felt according to their intensity only. You might say, returning to our analogy, that there is more color-mixing within the dream state, and the materials are immediately at hand. Distance is then seen in its true light, not in relation to physical space but in its basic relationship to emotional intensity. As you seem in the waking condition to travel out of an experience, or as you seem to separate yourself from it, then physical time enters into your awareness.
quotes.translation: 它们仅根据其强度被感知。回到我们的类比，你可以说在梦境状态中有更多的色彩混合，而且材料随手可得。距离于是以其真实面目被看见，不再与物理空间相关，而是与情感强度建立基本关联。正如你在清醒状态中似乎脱离某个经验，或似乎将自己与它分离，物理时间便进入你的觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: We will resume dictation. (Pause.) Such other existences and realities as just described coexist with your own, and in the waking state you are not aware of them. Now, often in your dreams you are able to perceive such other situations, but you often wind them into dream paraphernalia of your own, in which case upon awakening you have little clear memory.
quotes.translation: 现在：我们继续口述。（停顿。）刚才描述的那些其他存在和实相与你们自己的实相同存，而在清醒状态中你们觉察不到它们。现在，你们常常在梦中能感知到这些其他情境，但你们往往将它们编织进自己的梦境道具中，在这种情况下，醒来时你们几乎没有清晰的记忆。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You could retain the identity of yourself as you know yourself, and yet flow into a greater field or wave of reality that allowed you to perceive your own other motions or shapes or versions. You could become aware of a larger structure in which you also have your own validity, and therefore add to your own knowledge and to the dimensions of your experience.10
quotes.translation: 你可以保留你认知中的自己这个身份，同时流入一个更大的实相场域或波动，让你能感知到自己其他的运动、形状或版本。你可以觉察到一个更大的结构，在其中你也有自己的有效性，从而增加你自己的知识和你经验的维度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 722
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The entire subject is very important, however. As far as a true psychology is concerned, individuals who are made aware of the existence of probable realities will no longer feel trapped by events. Your consciousness is at a point where it is beginning to understand the significance of "predictive action" -- and predictive action always involves probabilities.
quotes.translation: 然而，整个主题非常重要。就真正的心理学而言，那些被引导意识到可能实相存在的人，将不再感到被事件所困。你的意识正处在一个开始理解"预测性行动"重要性的节点——而预测性行动总是涉及可能性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 741
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It was a tool of your art. It was also a part of your talent. It added to the dimension of your work, but to some degree it was also adopted as a protective mechanism, to give you some feeling of separation. Your mother's Emotionalism frightened you so that you distrusted strong feeling, even while you must use it, and be vividly aware of it in order to paint.
quotes.translation: 它是你艺术的工具。它也是你天赋的一部分。它增加了你作品的维度，但在某种程度上它也被当作一种保护机制，给你一些分离感。你母亲的情感主义吓到了你，以至于你不信任强烈的情感，即使你必须使用它，并且为了绘画而生动地觉察它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I have used the term "expansion of consciousness" here rather than the more frequently used "cosmic consciousness" (pause), because the latter implies an experience of proportions not available to mankind at this time. (Pause.) Intense expansions of consciousness by contrast to your normal state may appear to be cosmic in nature, but they barely hint at those possibilities of consciousness that are available to you now, much less begin to approach a true cosmic awareness.
quotes.translation: 我在这里使用了"意识扩展"这个术语，而不是更常用的"宇宙意识"（停顿），因为后者暗示了一种目前人类无法企及的规模的经验。（停顿。）与你的正常状态相比，强烈的意识扩展可能在本质上显得是宇宙性的，但它们几乎未能暗示你现在可用的那些意识可能性，更不用说开始接近真正的宇宙觉知了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now it is here that the seeming division in the self occurs, for in physical life the conscious mind must be connected with the brain, and in terms of time that organ itself must grow and develop. So all of your consciousness cannot be physically aware. The portion that must "wait for" the brain's development is the part you call in life "the conscious mind."
quotes.translation: 正是在这里，自我产生了看似分裂的现象，因为在物质生命中，意识心必须与大脑相连，而就时间而言，这个器官本身必须成长与发展。因此，你所有的意识无法在物质层面完全觉知。必须"等待"大脑发展的那部分，就是你此生所谓的"意识心"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Here you can get the feel of them so that you know what you are working with. You are always and constantly in the process of transforming energy from the inner senses into physical idea constructions. I want you to become acquainted with the process by which you accomplish this unknowingly, so that you can then perform the same feats with your own awareness.
quotes.translation: 在此你可以感受到它们的本质，从而明白你正在处理的是什么。你无时无刻不在将内在感官的能量转化为物质性的意念建构。我希望你熟悉这个你不知不觉完成的过程，这样你就能有意识地运用自己的觉知来完成同样的壮举。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is some material that we have not given you, lest the implications lead you to thoughts of insignificance. But you are not simply receivers, you are also givers. As your own universe was formed by entities that you do not presently understand, so the discards of your own consciousness form realities for entities that are scarcely aware of your existence.
quotes.translation: 这部分资料我们此前未曾提供，唯恐其含义会让你产生渺小之感。但你并非单纯的接收者，你同时也是给予者。正如你目前的宇宙是由你尚不理解的存在体所形成，你自身意识的"废弃物"也在为几乎意识不到你存在的存在体构建实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always there. You are always aware of it in the same manner that you are aware of what is happening in a trance. This is another excellent analogy, if you'll forgive me for patting myself on the back.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终存在。你一直都能觉察到它，就像你能觉察到出神状态中发生的事一样。如果你不介意我自夸的话，这又是一个绝妙的类比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are growing in consciousness; therefore using it expands its capabilities. It is not a thing, but an attribute and characteristic. That is why your understanding and desire are so important. The processes initiated are beyond your normal awareness. They occur automatically with your intent if you do not block them through fear, doubt or opposing beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你的意识正在成长；因此运用意识会扩展其能力。意识并非一个"东西"，而是一种属性与特性。这就是为什么你的理解与渴望如此重要。所启动的过程超越了你平常的觉知。只要你不用恐惧、怀疑或矛盾的信念加以阻挠，这些过程就会随着你的意图自动发生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can perceive the moment's reality as it exists for your intestine, or your hand; and experience, with practice, the present inner peace and commotion that exist simultaneously within your physical body. This brings a great appreciation and wonder, a sense of unity with the living corporeal material of which you are physically composed. With practice you can become as intuitively aware of your internal physical environment, as [of] your external physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你可以感知当下此刻——你的肠道或你的手所存在的实相；通过练习，你能体验到你肉身内同时存在的内在宁静与骚动。这会带来极大的赞叹与惊奇，一种与你肉体所构成的活生生的物质材料合而为一的感觉。通过练习，你对自己内在物质环境的直觉觉察，可以变得像对外在物质环境一样敏锐。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You indeed create your own dreams, as you realize, Joseph. Nevertheless, you do not create your own dreams during a specific point in time. The beginnings, to use that distortive term again, the beginnings of dreams reach back into past lives of which you are not aware, and beyond even this the origins are part of a heritage before your planet even existed.
quotes.translation: 你确实创造了自己的梦境，约瑟夫，正如你所认知的那样。然而，你并非在某个特定时间点创造自己的梦境。若再次使用那个扭曲的术语，梦境的起源可追溯至你未曾察觉的前世，甚至更早，其根源属于你行星诞生之前的传承。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The separate incarnated personalities however are still separate identities. This is no contradiction at all. The personality structures of which I am speaking are far more advanced than this example. They are aware of many existences within many systems. They organize the basic ground reality into many patterns, and then operate and manipulate within them.
quotes.translation: 然而，各自转世的人格仍是独立的身份。这绝非矛盾。我所言的人格结构远比这个例子更为先进。它们觉察到众多系统中的多重存在，将基本实相组织成多种模式，并在其中运作与操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The characteristics of consciousness are the same (seme) whether you are in a body or outside of one. The peaks and valleys of consciousness that I mentioned exist to some degree in all consciousness despite the form adopted (adepted) after death (deth). The nature of your consciousness is no different basically (bascially) than it is now, though you may not be aware of many of its characteristics.
quotes.translation: 无论你处于肉身之内或之外，意识的特性始终相同。我所提及的意识之峰谷，在死后所采取的任何形态中，皆以某种程度存在于所有意识之中。你意识的本质与现在并无根本差异，尽管你可能未觉察其诸多特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You -- being the ten of you -- would be aware of existence in each of the ten places. It would be impossible to ask which of the ten arrived first, except to say that all began with the original who decided to visit the ten locations. So it is with the Speakers, who in the same way do not originate in the locations or in the times in which they may appear.
quotes.translation: 你们——即你们十人——会觉察到在十个地点各自的存在。若问这十者中谁先抵达，除非说所有皆始于最初决定造访十个地点的那个原初者，否则无从回答。传讯者亦是如此，他们同样并非源于其可能显现的地点或时代。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In their materialization upon your plane, and as seen from your own camouflage perspective, you seem to be aware of new entities, but this is because of your own limited viewpoint. In your time scheme entities have had time to produce more fragmentary personalities, but in truth from your viewpoint these personalities can be seen to have changed long ago.
quotes.translation: 当他们在你们层面显化时，从你们自身的伪装视角看来，你们似乎觉察到新的存有，但这源于你们有限的视界。在你们的时间架构中，存有已有时间产生更多碎片化人格，但事实上，从你们视角观之，这些人格早已改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Again, the nature of space and time is glimpsed more clearly as it appears to the sleeping self, for in the dream state reality is to a large measure uncamouflaged, and the personality appears in a freer state. It should also be borne in mind that all aspects of the personality are part of the whole self. As such there is an overall communication between the various aspects of the self, although the separate aspects of the self may not be aware of the communications.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，空间与时间的本质在沉睡自我眼中更为清晰，因为在梦境状态中，实相在很大程度上未被伪装，人格以更自由的状态显现。同时需谨记，人格的所有面向皆属整体自性的一部分。正因如此，自性的各个面向之间存在整体性沟通，尽管自性的分离面向可能未觉察这些沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The perceptions of those who exist within them are basically different than your own, and many of them will not perceive you. Those who do are apt to be projecting also, you see. I told you that if you can you should mention the fact that you are dreaming. If the other individual realizes this also, then you are both projecting. He may on the other hand be projecting and not be aware of the fact.
quotes.translation: 存在于这些系统内的那些个体的感知，基本上与你们不同，而且他们中的许多个体不会感知到你们。那些能感知到你们的个体，也往往正在投射，你们明白吗。我告诉过你们，如果可能的话，你们应该提及自己正在做梦的事实。如果另一个个体也意识到这一点，那么你们俩就都在投射。另一方面，他可能正在投射，却没有意识到这个事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Through him I am aware of the nature and condition of your world, and offer from my viewpoint comments meant to help you. Through Ruburt, then, I am permitted to view the earth "again" in your terms. I exist apart from him, as he exists apart from me, yet we are together a part of the same entity -- and that simply carries the idea of the psyche further.
quotes.translation: 通过他，我得以了解你们世界的本质与状况，并从我的视角提供旨在帮助你们的评论。通过鲁柏，我得以用你们的说法"再次"观看地球。我独立于他而存在，正如他独立于我而存在，然而我们共同属于同一个存有的一部分——这仅仅是将心灵的概念进一步延伸。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The well-advanced personality then is aware of nontime, but can use the time illusions of others and can enter the particular camouflage structures. The nontime principle however operates in such a manner that a personality can only participate in the ways that I have described, in systems with which he has some familiarity because of his own experience.
quotes.translation: 高度发展的人格因此能意识到非时间，但能运用他人的时间幻相，并能进入特定的伪装结构。然而，非时间原理的运作方式，使得一个人格只能以我所描述的方式，参与那些因自身经验而有所熟悉的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Such dire conditions cannot be pretended out of human existence, nor should they be. But in your case, you aware of man's inhumanity to man. It is well that you are, but you must not allow this knowledge to weigh like a mountain upon your being, so that you are pinned under and your energies sucked away. This is the danger for which you must be alerted.
quotes.translation: 如此悲惨的状况无法通过假装从人类存在中消除，也不该如此。但在你的情况中，你意识到人对人的不人道。你能意识到这点很好，但你不该让这份认知像山一样压在你的存在上，以至于你被压垮，能量被吸走。这是你必须警惕的危险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is not done at all times, but the ego is not usually aware either of the motion nor of the other systems involved. Through your own abilities, and partially through circumstances that happen to be favorable, you are able with my help, to some degree, to add this experience of mobility to your natures and transfer the knowledge to the conscious ego.
quotes.translation: 这并非始终发生，但自我通常既意识不到运动，也意识不到所涉及的其他系统。通过你们自身的能力，部分通过恰好有利的环境，你们得以在我的帮助下，在一定程度上将这种移动的经验添加到你们的本性中，并将知识传递给有意识的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The same kind of interrelationship occurs with each individual now alive, in your terms, whether or not conscious awareness is involved. Ruburt is exploring time as he probes the reality of his own psyche, then.
quotes.translation: 用你们的说法，现在活着的每个个体都发生着同样类型的相互关系，无论是否涉及有意识的觉知。鲁柏在探索自己心灵实相的同时，也在探索时间。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 728
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I see this composite image myself. It is not registered by Ruburt's eyes (pause), which do not have the multidimensional depth perception necessary. I see the composite image clearly, whether or not I am looking through Ruburt's eyes. I use his eyes because they narrow down the focus for me, to the one "present" self of which the individual is aware.
quotes.translation: 我亲眼看见这个复合影像。它并非经由鲁柏的眼睛所记录（停顿），因为他的眼睛缺乏必要的多维深度感知能力。无论我是否透过鲁柏的眼睛观看，都能清晰看见这个复合影像。我使用他的眼睛，是因为这能为我缩小焦点，聚焦于个体所觉察到的那个"当下"自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You perceived in a normal fashion, which should tell you that perception is not dependent upon the physical image. You were well-aware of your relationship. You have both traveled together in such a fashion often from the dream state, without your knowledge. There is no reason why you cannot try such experiments by trying to project at the same time.
quotes.translation: 你以正常方式感知，这应当告诉你：感知并不依赖物质影像。你清楚知晓你们的关系。你们两人常以这种方式从梦境状态共同出游，只是你们自己未曾察觉。你们完全有理由尝试同时进行投射实验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As the probabilities exist, both of you will be well into the out-of-body work between now and early winter. (To me:) you have been operating far more than in the past, and you should shortly now gain conscious awareness. You will probably come to, realizing you have projected, several times, before becoming conscious of the mechanism of getting out.
quotes.translation: 就概率而言，从现在到初冬期间，你们两人都将深入进行出体工作。（对我说：）你比过去运作得更加频繁，很快就能获得有意识的觉察。你可能会在意识到出体机制之前，先经历几次突然发现自己已经投射出去的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a rule you are not aware of your whole entity, which as a rule does not reside within your boundaries. But there is no reason why you must be blind to the whole self of your present personality, which is part of your entity, and which can be glimpsed on your plane in terms of the breathing and dreaming self of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 诚然，你们通常无法觉察自己的整体存有——这个存有通常并不栖居于你们的界限之内。但你们没有理由必须对当前人格的完整自我视而不见，这个自我是你们存有的一部分，可以通过我提及的呼吸自我与做梦自我，在你们层面窥见其面貌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: At your stage it is of course easier if the actual separation of consciousness from the physical body occurs without your awareness. However the experience itself is excellent training. I have told you that these projections may carry you to different systems. In the beginning you are safer perhaps in those projections that involve your own reality.
quotes.translation: 在你目前的阶段，若意识与肉体的实际分离能在无意识状态下发生，自然更为容易。不过这种体验本身就是绝佳的训练。我曾告诉你们，这些投射可能将你们带往不同体系。初期阶段，涉及你们自身实相的投射或许更为安全。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: He will be reborn as a woman. This much he has decided. He will therefore become more aware of the spontaneous nature of creativity, for he will bear children. Your mother and he, beneath all of their difficulties in this life and in others past, have a deep relationship. They will meet again under different circumstances, but not in the same terms.
quotes.translation: 他将转世为女性。这是他已做出的决定。如此他将更能觉察创造力的自发本质，因为他将孕育子女。你的母亲与他，在今生及过往世的所有困境之下，存在着深刻的关系。他们将在不同情境下重逢，但不再以相同的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego is your idea of your physical image in relation to the world. Your self image is not unconscious, then. You are quite aware of it, though often you reject certain thoughts about it in favor of others. False beliefs can result in a rigid ego that insists upon using the conscious mind in one direction only, further distorting its perceptions.
quotes.translation: 自我是你对自己与世界相关的物质形象的概念。你的自我形象并非无意识。你相当清楚它，尽管你常常拒绝接受关于它的某些想法，而偏好其他想法。虚假信念可能导致僵化的自我，坚持只在一个方向上使用意识心，进一步扭曲其感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This self-awareness in each atom and molecule determines what sort of cell or combination that the particular atom or molecule will form. The cells then, being a gestalt, contain the individual conscious components, which then form a consciousness greater than the consciousness of any individual component within, and different in scope and ability.
quotes.translation: 每个原子和分子中的这种自我意识决定了该特定原子或分子将形成何种细胞或组合。细胞作为一个完形，包含了个体有意识的组成部分，这些部分随后形成一种意识，大于其中任何个体组成部分的意识，并在范围和能力上有所不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am putting this very simply here. It is far more complicated -- and yet early man, for example, became aware of the fact that no man was injured without that event first being imagined to one extent or another. Therefore, imagined healings were utilized, in which a physical illness was imaginatively cured -- and in those days the cures worked.
quotes.translation: 我在这里说得非常简单。实际情况要复杂得多——然而，例如早期人类就意识到一个事实：没有人在某种程度上没有先想象过那个事件，就不会受到伤害。因此，他们利用想象的治疗，在想象中治愈身体疾病——在那些日子里，这些治疗是有效的。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 828, MARCH 15, 1978
9:53 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: When people profess an interest in the nature of dreams, they usually have certain set questions in mind, such as: "How real are dream events?" "What do dreams mean?" "How do they affect daily life?" Each person is aware of the astonishingly intimate nature of dreams. Despite this, certain symbols seem to be fairly universal in your experience.
quotes.translation: 当人们声称对梦的本质感兴趣时，他们通常心中有一些固定问题，例如：“梦中的事件有多真实？”“梦意味着什么？”“它们如何影响日常生活？”每个人都意识到梦的惊人亲密本质。尽管如此，某些符号在你的体验中似乎是相当普遍的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One is that because objects just originate in man's imagination anyway, there's always a strong connection between objects and man's dreams. They act as symbols of inner reality, so it's only natural that whether he's aware of it or not, man perceives objects in such a fashion that they also stand for symbols that first originate in his dreams.
quotes.translation: 其一是，因为物体本来就起源于人类的想象，所以物体与人类的梦之间总是有强烈的联系。它们作为内在现实的符号，因此，无论他是否意识到，他以这样的方式感知物体，使它们也代表最初起源于他梦中的符号，这是很自然的。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 844, APRIL 1, 1979
4:01 P.M. SUNDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The flame feeds the fire and the fire feeds the flame. Therefore, while this time one of continuous moments is no longer experienced after death, it is still a reality within basic time itself, a reality toward which the personality simply is no longer focused. Because the individual is focused within time one now, you still realize, or should, that the time one is only a small portion of time, and that other kinds of time exist of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 火焰滋养火，火滋养火焰。因此，虽然死后不再体验这种连续时刻的时间，但它仍然是基本时间本身内的一个实相，一个人格只是不再聚焦的实相。因为个体现在聚焦于时间一，你仍然意识到，或应该意识到，时间一只是时间的一小部分，并且存在其他你未意识到的种类的时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I was indeed. There were two others that you know of. The one mentioned in class material (in the 558th session), and the other yourself. (This was a distinct surprise to me.) Now the Speakers themselves in the reincarnational process can also use or not use their abilities in any given life, or be aware of them. I bid you a fond good evening.
quotes.translation: 我确实如此。还有两位你认识的。一位是课堂资料（第558节）中提到的，另一位就是你自己。（这让我相当惊讶。）转世过程中的"代言人"本身，在特定人生中也可以选择使用或不使用他们的能力，或觉察到这些能力。我祝你们有个愉快的夜晚。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Oftentimes members of various groups -- military groups, church groups, hunting groups, will in another life form family relationships in which they will then work out old problems in new ways. Families must be considered as gestalts of psychic activity; they have a subjective identity, of which no particular member of the group may be aware.
quotes.translation: 各类团体——军事团体、教会团体、狩猎团体的成员，往往会在另一世中形成家庭关系，以新的方式解决旧的问题。家庭必须被视为心灵活动的完形；它们拥有主观身份，而团体中的特定成员可能对此毫无觉察。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He has been afraid of directing either outward for fear of hurting others. (Long pause.) He must learn to handle normal aggressions, and yet when he is operating spontaneously his natural exuberance is a mechanism for such release. (Long pause.) He was aware of your feelings. He felt that any success of his was a threat to you. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 他一直害怕将能量向外或向内引导，唯恐伤害他人。（长停顿。）他必须学会处理正常的攻击性，而当他自发运作时，他天生的活力正是释放这种攻击性的机制。（长停顿。）他觉察到了你的感受。他觉得自己的任何成功对你都是一种威胁。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: He is aware of this, but you are real to him in all of your Robert Butts time periods. From his vantage point it is a matter of when contact can best be made. He does not realize you do not perceive yourself as one in these separate time intervals. He realizes this about himself but he has not taken it into consideration in his calculations.
quotes.translation: 他觉察到这一点，但在他眼中，你在所有罗伯特·巴茨的时间段落里都是真实的。从他的视角来看，这只是何时能最佳接触的问题。他并未意识到，你并不认为自己在这些分离的时间间隔中是同一个自己。他明白自己具有这种特质，但在计算中并未将此纳入考量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In your theory of time however you believe yourselves bound to the road, do not realize that you have made it, and are unable to perceive other realities. You have chosen to do this however. Since you are learning and can only handle so many perceptions, you have forgotten that you have created the road. Multidimensional personalities do not need to forget. They are also aware of different such devices formed by others. (One minute pause; eyes closed.)
quotes.translation: 然而在你们的时间理论中，你们相信自己被束缚在这条道路上，没有意识到是你们自己建造了它，也无法感知其他实相。但这是你们自己的选择。由于你们正在学习，且只能处理有限数量的感知，你们便忘记了是自己创造了这条道路。多维人格无需遗忘。他们同样能觉察到他人所构建的其他此类装置。（闭眼停顿一分钟。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Give the spider an ego and an intellect and you will see then how the picture would change. These would enable him to enlarge upon his scope of awareness and activity, but at the same time impediments would be placed so that the web construction would no longer appear either as direct as far as its source is concerned, nor as spontaneous.
quotes.translation: 给蜘蛛一个自我和智力，你便会看到画面如何改变。这能扩展它的觉察与活动范围，但同时也会设置障碍，使得蛛网建造——就其源头而言——不再显得那么直接，也不再那么自发。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are practically aware in everyday life now of a self who watches the self. This is important. For later you will be aware of a self who watches this self, and I want you to note the difference.
quotes.translation: 你现在在日常生活中几乎都能觉察到一个观察自我的自我。这一点很重要。因为稍后你会觉察到一个观察这个自我的自我，我希望你注意其中的差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is very close to the entity. Largely due to its abilities are the creative processes used, but hardly understood by the ego. In many cases this supraselfis already, so to speak, moving into completely new systems. It is, of course, aware of your reincarnations on the individual's part, but these are not present nor future to the self.
quotes.translation: 它非常接近存有。很大程度上，创造过程凭借其能力得以运作，但自我几乎无法理解。在许多情况下，这个超我可以说已经进入全新的系统。当然，它知晓个体层面的转世经历，但这些对自我而言既非现在也非未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Obviously then so-called astral projection occurs frequently in the sleeping state. It also occurs however in the waking state, although the ego is not aware of such projection as a rule. When through training there is greater communication between the inner and outer selves, then it is possible for the ego to realize what has happened.
quotes.translation: 显然，所谓的星光体投射在睡眠状态中频繁发生。然而，它也会在清醒状态发生，尽管自我通常意识不到这种投射。当通过训练使内在自我与外在自我之间建立更紧密的沟通时，自我就有可能意识到所发生的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: That which is, is constantly aware of its growing, surging existence, through the diversity of experience which it creates constantly and simultaneously. You are part of that which is, you are that which is. It is impossible for any part of that which is not to be individualized. Every part of that which is, is alive, and knows itself.
quotes.translation: 那存在者，通过它同时不断创造的多样性体验，始终觉察着自己不断成长、涌动的存在。你是那存在者的一部分，你就是那存在者。那存在者的任何部分都不可能不被个体化。那存在者的每一部分都活着，并且知晓自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is this portion who seems to stand outside and view the subjective self. It is the I who is aware and alert within the dream state and who watches the dreaming self. (Long pause, eyes dosed.) This portion, while still within the three-dimensional system, is closely allied with other portions of the self that are free of that system.
quotes.translation: 正是这个部分似乎站在外部观察主观自我。它是在梦境状态中保持觉察与警醒的"我"，注视着做梦的自我。（长停顿，闭目。）这个部分虽然仍在三维系统内，却与系统中自由的其他自我部分紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now mankind uses but a portion of his capabilities, and when you are along in these experiments, properly set up, you will find that you handle them very well, with no draining of energies or difficulties. Your sleeping hours are already productive. We shall also use them to give you training in the utilization of various stages of consciousness, that will result in time with excellent control over various aspects and stages of your own awareness.
quotes.translation: 人类目前只运用了自身能力的一小部分。当你独自进行这些适当设置的实验时，你会发现能轻松驾驭它们，既不会消耗能量也不会遇到困难。你的睡眠时间已经富有成效。我们还将利用它们训练你运用各种意识状态，最终使你能够出色地掌控自身觉察的各个面向与阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You are active in these other layers whether or not you are aware of it. You learn not only in physical life and in the dream state, but in these interior existences of which you have no memory. Creative abilities of a specific nature, or healing abilities, are often trained in this fashion, only then emerging into physical actuality.
quotes.translation: 无论你是否意识到，你在这些其他层面都是活跃的。你不仅在物质生活和梦境状态中学习，也在这些你毫无记忆的内在存在中学习。特定性质的创造能力或疗愈能力，往往以这种方式训练，然后才显现为物质实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In their own ways, the animals are quite aware of this fact. Some of them even bring themselves to their own destruction through what you would call suicide, and en masse. At that level the animals understand, and are always in touch with deep biological connections in which they know their own continuances within the chain of nature.
quotes.translation: 动物们以自己的方式相当清楚这个事实。其中一些甚至通过你们所谓的自杀集体走向毁灭。在那个层面，动物们理解并始终与深层的生物联系保持接触，它们知道自己在自然链条中的延续性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I cannot stress too strongly the fact that any investigation into the nature of the human personality must indeed follow the lines which have been here given. The nature of reality, uncamouflaged, can be glimpsed to some degree as you study the personality in the dream state, where awareness does not operate in an ego-directed manner.
quotes.translation: 我必须再三强调：任何对人类人格本质的探究，确实必须遵循此处给出的路线。当你研究梦境状态中的人格时——此时意识并非以自我导向的方式运作——你就能在某种程度上瞥见未经伪装实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (Humorously:) Now, all probabilities are related. Joseph's mother is dead, in your terms, and aware to some extent of the nature of her own reality beyond the physical. She is able, again to some extent, to follow through with her own probable existences. That is, she is conscious of her own being outside of the official framework.4
quotes.translation: （幽默地）现在，所有可能性都是相互关联的。约瑟夫的母亲在你们看来已经去世，并在某种程度上知晓自身超越物质实相的本质。她同样能在某种程度上追踪自己的可能存在。也就是说，她意识到自身存在已脱离官方架构。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 693
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now I am speaking not only of legitimate projections, but of projections vivid enough to be recalled and recorded. Projections in other words in which the ego can take at least some small part. Spontaneous projections of which you are not aware occur frequently.
quotes.translation: 现在我说的不仅是正当的投射，更是那些生动到足以被回忆和记录的投射。换言之，是自我至少能参与其中的投射。你们未曾察觉的自发投射则频繁发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The physical organism is not aware of it. The subconscious does receive the information however, in some of these cases. In other cases the experience is simply not recorded in any way within the physical organism, but it is recorded to deeper layers of the self that are divorced to a large degree from any physical manipulations.
quotes.translation: 物质有机体对此毫无察觉。然而在某些案例中，潜意识确实接收到了这些信息。在其他案例中，这类体验根本未被物质有机体以任何方式记录，而是被记录在自我更深层的层面——这些层面在很大程度上与任何物质运作相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind is a maker of distinctions. It brings to the surface of awareness whole gestalts of previously unconscious material, then assembles and organizes it in ever-changing form. Through purposeful focus, a literally infinite amount of such data can be unconsciously sorted; then only the desired elements will emerge.
quotes.translation: 意识心是区分者。它将先前无意识材料的整体完形带到觉知表面，然后以不断变化的形式进行整合与组织。通过有目的的聚焦，无穷无尽的数据可以被无意识分类；随后只有所需的元素会浮现出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "Units of consciousness do help form different kinds of physical realities--as indeed Ruburt has himself hinted in some of his poetry. There are many dimensions that are as physical, so to speak, as your own world, but if you are not focused in them you would not at all be aware of their existence, but perceive only empty space.
quotes.translation: "意识单位确实有助于形成不同种类的物质实相——正如鲁柏本人在他的一些诗歌中暗示的那样。可以说，有许多维度与你们的世界一样物质化，但如果你不聚焦其中，你根本不会意识到它们的存在，而只会感知到空无的空间。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. While the inner self is aware of this connection, the present self has been fooling itself to some degree, for it did not accept the intuitional knowledge. Regardless of what you thought consciously therefore, you still inwardly blamed yourself for letting the child go, and therefore the difficulty with the womanly organs.
quotes.translation: 现在。虽然内在自己知晓这种关联，但当前自己在某种程度上一直在欺骗自己，因为它没有接受直觉知识。因此，无论你有意识地怎么想，你内心仍然因让孩子离去而自责，从而导致了女性器官的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: None of this is predetermined. An offshoot probable self might leave your reality at age 13, say, but could intersect with you again at age 30 for a variety of reasons -- where to you, you suddenly change a profession, or become aware of a talent you thought you had forgotten, and find yourself developing it with amazing ease.
quotes.translation: 这些都不是预先注定的。一个分支的可能自己可能在13岁时离开你的实相，但出于各种原因，可能在30岁时再次与你交汇——对你而言，你突然改变职业，或意识到一个你以为已遗忘的才能，并发现自己以惊人的轻松发展它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The animals possess a consciousness of self, and without the human intellect. You do not need a human intellect to be aware of your own consciousness. Animals, it is true, do not reflect upon the nature of their own identities as man does (pause), but this is because that nature is intuitively comprehended. It is self-evident.
quotes.translation: 动物拥有自我意识，却没有人类智力。你不需要人类智力来觉知自己的意识。诚然，动物不像人类那样反思自身身份的本质（停顿），但这是因为那种本质被直觉地理解了。这是不言自明的。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: I use the word directly loosely, for only the inner senses can really contact them without the necessity of distortions. To some extent, on their own level they have an awareness of the dreams in which they participate. They function to some extent independently. However your Emotional Moods become their psychological climate.
quotes.translation: 我松散地使用"直接"这个词，因为只有内在感官才能真正接触它们而无需扭曲。在某种程度上，在它们自己的层面上，它们对参与其中的梦有所觉知。它们在一定程度上独立运作。然而，你的情绪状态成为它们的心理气候。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, Ruburts subconscious simply got in our way at last evening's session. Now and then it is to be expected, but I regret the particular circumstances deeply. He was subconsciously but never consciously aware that next month marked the time of his grandfather's death, and subconsciously he knew his grandfathers age at death.
quotes.translation: 昨晚的课程中，鲁柏的潜意识确实妨碍了我们。这种情况偶尔会发生，但我对这次的具体情况深感遗憾。他潜意识里——而非有意识地——知道下个月是他祖父去世的月份，并且潜意识里知道他祖父去世时的年龄。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You exist in many dimensions, although the ego is not aware of such existence. The ego can be taught however. What it cannot experience directly it can still understand to some degree if it is given the proper information. There is no reason for Ruburt to be surprised at Mr. Fox's thesis on dreams and out-of-body experiences.
quotes.translation: 你们存在于许多维度中，尽管自我意识不到这种存在。然而，自我是可以被教导的。如果给予适当的信息，它无法直接体验的事物，仍能在某种程度上理解。鲁柏对福克斯先生关于梦境和出体经验的论文感到惊讶，这是没有理由的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that the outer ego is a puppet. It is to say that the outer ego is far less conscious than the inner ego or the inner self, that its perception is less, that it is far less stable, though it makes great pretense at stability; that it springs from the inner self, and is less rather than more, aware. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并不是说外在自我是个傀儡。而是说，外在自我的意识远不如内在自我或内在自体，它的感知力较弱，稳定性也远逊一筹——尽管它极力伪装出稳定。它源自内在自体，其觉知力更少而非更多。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A system of checks and balances exists, however, so that in certain dreams you are made aware of these blueprints. They may appear throughout your lifetime as recurring dreams of a certain nature -- dreams of illumination; and even if you do not remember them you will awaken with your purposes strengthened or suddenly clear.
quotes.translation: 然而，存在一套制衡系统，因此在某些梦境中，你们会意识到这些蓝图。它们可能以某种性质的反复梦境贯穿你的一生——比如启示之梦；即使你记不住它们，醒来时你的目标也会被强化或突然变得清晰。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is aware energy, identified within itself as itself, not "personified" but awareized. It is therefore the source of all other kinds of consciousness, and the varieties of its activity are infinite. It combines with others of its kind, forming then units of consciousness -- as, mentioned often, atoms and molecules combine.
quotes.translation: 它是觉知的能量，在其自身内认同为自身，并非"人格化"，而是"觉知化"。因此，它是所有其他意识类型的源头，其活动的变化无穷无尽。它与同类结合，形成意识单位——正如常被提及的，原子和分子结合那样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You focus your awareness in altered form into another universe, that is in every way as valid and permanent as your own. It is also as changing as the physical universe. A small amount of energy only is focused upon the physical field during sleep, enough simply to maintain the physical body within its physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你将你的觉知以改变的形式聚焦到另一个宇宙中，那个宇宙在各方面都与你的宇宙同样真实且永恒。它也和物质宇宙一样不断变化。睡眠期间，只有少量能量聚焦于物质领域，仅足以维持物质身体在其物质环境中的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is quite possible to meet survival personalities, incidentally, during such projections. This does not happen often, because so many other issues are necessary. It is also possible of course to move into your own future. This occurs regularly, though not always with awareness. Projections into the past are also frequent.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，在出体投射中遇见生存人格是完全可能的。这种情况并不常见，因为还需要许多其他条件。当然，你也可能进入自己的未来。这经常发生，尽管并非总是有意识地。投射到过去也同样频繁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The image can be perceived at times. Contact can be made by those who are psychically aware. Now. It is obviously beneficial to learn now to change your own direction of attention away from your physical system. When this is accomplished then legitimate firsthand experience can be gained, that is not physical in your terms.
quotes.translation: 这个影像有时能被感知。具有灵性觉知的人可以与之接触。现在，学会将注意力转向离开物质系统显然是有益的。当做到这一点时，就能获得合法的第一手经验，这种经验在你们的说法中是非物质的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: And this is also an example of an instance where Ruburt would have blocked me, but this time he did not. My good afternoon instantly confused him since he was well aware of the time. He almost blocked me, changing this to the more ordinary good evening. But as you both can see I had my reason and Ruburt gave me the chance.
quotes.translation: 这也是一个例子，说明鲁柏本会阻止我，但这次他没有。我的"下午好"立刻让他困惑，因为他很清楚时间。他几乎要阻止我，将其改为更普通的"晚上好"。但你们俩都能看到，我有我的理由，而鲁柏给了我机会。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: CU's can also operate as "particles" or as "waves." Whichever way they operate, they are aware of their own existences. When CU's operate as particles, in your terms, they build up a continuity in time. They take on the characteristics of particularity. They identify themselves by the establishment of specific boundaries.
quotes.translation: CU也可以作为"粒子"或"波"运作。无论以何种方式运作，它们都觉知其自身的存在。当CU以粒子形式运作时，在你们的说法中，它们在时间中建立起连续性。它们呈现出特殊性的特征。它们通过建立特定边界来确认自身身份。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This sixth sense is too important to skim over, and yet I wanted to mention it this evening because it fits in with our discussion. Without this sixth sense, and without its constant use by the inner self-conscious ego, you could not even construct the physical camouflage universe of your own plane. This sense, again, is used constantly beneath the outer egos awareness, and forms the basis for camouflage constructions on every plane.
quotes.translation: 这第六感太重要了，不能草率带过，但我今晚想提到它，因为它符合我们的讨论。没有这第六感，没有内在自我意识自我对它的持续运用，你们甚至无法构建自己层面的物质伪装宇宙。再次强调，这种感官在外在自我觉知之下持续使用，并构成每个层面伪装建构的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (The vision had one oddity--I stood at my desk working at something else when I became aware of it to my left. It was large, framed, and cocked at an odd angle to the floor, as if propped up by invisible hands. While I stared at it it appeared to be solid, and very nearly animated--note the wind effect mentioned earlier.
quotes.translation: （这个幻象有一个奇特之处——我正站在书桌前做别的事时，突然意识到它在我的左侧。它很大，有画框，以奇怪的角度倾斜在地板上，仿佛被无形的手支撑着。当我凝视它时，它看起来是实体的，几乎栩栩如生——注意之前提到的风吹效果。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are points in that book which we have not yet discussed, for the ground has not been prepared sufficiently. Reincarnation and projection are as real and as difficult for the ego to grasp, as the nature of dreams. You can begin to understand the effect of dreams at least upon your daily life. Reincarnations and projections of which you are not consciously aware have an equal effect, a stronger effect, upon your daily existence.
quotes.translation: 那本书中有一些我们尚未讨论的要点，因为基础尚未充分建立。轮回与投射，如同梦的本质一样真实，且同样难以被自我理解。你至少可以开始理解梦对你日常生活的影响。那些你尚未有意识地察觉的轮回与投射，对你的日常存在有着同等甚至更强的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The soul perceives all experience directly. Most experiences of which you are aware come packaged in physical wrapping, and you take the wrapping for the experience itself, and do not think of looking inside. The world that you know is one of the infinite materializations taken by consciousness, and as such it is valid.
quotes.translation: 灵魂直接感知所有经验。你所察觉的大部分经验都包裹在物质外衣中，你把这层外衣当作经验本身，却未曾想过向内探寻。你所认知的世界是意识所呈现的无限物质化形态之一，因此它本身是有效的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: With deep trance the conscious outer state is completely switched off. Knowledge is forcibly poured down the imaginary gullet, and I can't feel very enthusiastic over such a method. What we are doing may be slower on your terms, but the effects are more durable and the whole self is aware of any knowledge thus received.
quotes.translation: 在深度出神状态下，有意识的外在状态完全关闭。知识被强行灌入想象性的食道，我对这种方法实在提不起热情。以你们的时间尺度来看，我们正在做的事情可能较慢，但效果更为持久，整个自我都能意识到如此获得的任何知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is necessary. I have no qualms with this, but it is possible, and in this stage of your evolution it is necessary, that the human personality learn to become flexible, to change the focus of awareness so that other realities can be perceived. There are indeed as I have said, effects that I can show you, and I will.
quotes.translation: 这是必要的。我对此并无异议，但在你们演化的这个阶段，人类人格必须学会变得灵活，改变意识的焦点，以便感知其他实相。正如我所说，确实存在一些我能向你展示的效果，我也会这么做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You will be aware however of your body, and you will experience some duality. In the third form you will no longer be aware that your body is on the bed, and you will not see it.
quotes.translation: 然而你仍会意识到你的身体，并体验到某种二元性。在第三种形式中，你将不再意识到你的身体在床上，也不会看到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your idea of one soul, one self, forms a significance and a selectivity that blinds you to these other realities that are as much "here and now" as your present self. The units of consciousness that compose your physical being alone are aware of those greater significances, to which your limited ideas make you opaque.
quotes.translation: 你们关于一个灵魂、一个自我的观念，形成了一种意义与选择性，这使你们对这些同样"此时此地"的实相视而不见，正如你们现在的自我一样。仅构成你物质存在的意识单位，就知晓那些更伟大的意义，而你们有限的观念却使你们对其浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The continued existence of your physical body is determined by action, although consciously you are not aware of this most of the time. Action may not seem to be going any place. Action, by its nature, while part of every reality necessarily changes that reality and forms from it a new reality. This should be obvious.
quotes.translation: 你肉身的持续存在是由行动决定的，尽管你意识上大部分时间并未觉察到这一点。行动看似并未前往任何地方。行动就其本质而言，虽是每个实相的一部分，却必然改变该实相，并从中形成新的实相。这理当显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now consciousness as you know it is used to these brief gaps of physical nonexistence mentioned earlier. Longer gaps disorient it to varying degrees, but these are not unusual. When the physical body sleeps, consciousness often leaves the physical system for fairly long periods, in your terms. But because the consciousness is not in the normally physically awake state, it is not aware of these gaps and is relatively unconcerned.
quotes.translation: 你所知的意识已习惯先前提及的那些短暂肉身不存间隙。较长的间隙会使其在不同程度上迷失方向，但这并不罕见。当肉身睡眠时，意识常离开物质系统相当长的时间——以你们的时间尺度而言。但因意识并非处于正常清醒状态，它便察觉不到这些间隙，也相对不以为意。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: In all cases the decisions have been made ahead of time, as I told you. The reincarnating personality is aware, therefore, when the conception for which it has been waiting takes place.
