And while it may or may not choose to enter at that point, it is drawn irresistibly to that time and point in space and flesh.
quotes.translation: 现在：如我告诉过你的，所有情况下决定都早已做出。因此，转世人格会觉察到它所等待的受孕时刻何时发生。尽管它可能选择或不选择在那时进入，它仍会被不可抗拒地吸引到那个时空与肉身的交点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within you is the ability to change your ideas about reality and about yourself, to create a personal living experience that is fulfilling to yourself and others. I would like you to write down your beliefs about yourself as you become aware of them. Later you can use this list in a way that you do not now suspect.
quotes.translation: 你内在拥有改变对实相及自身看法的能力，能创造令自己与他人皆感充实的个人鲜活体验。我希望你觉察到自身信念时便将其写下。日后你将以此刻无法预料的方式运用这份清单。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can learn, even a Jesuit can learn, to change the focus of your attention within seconds. Practice is all that is required, but the practice itself will show results. When you fear any difficulty with your particular physical problem, you can immediately turn your awareness away. This is no Pollyanna gibberish.
quotes.translation: 你可以学会——连耶稣会士都能学会——在数秒内转换注意力的焦点。所需唯有练习，而练习本身自会显现成效。当你对特定身体问题产生任何恐惧时，可立即将觉知转向别处。这绝非盲目乐观的胡言乱语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is strongly aware of your feelings toward it. At times the personality traits that it had earlier color this perception. It pushes these aside impatiently. It has mental images of its own probable future, and parts of it do become frightened at times, to relinquish old adult powers for an infant's helplessness.
quotes.translation: 它强烈觉察到你对它的感受。有时它早先的人格特质会为这种感知染上色彩。它不耐烦地推开这些特质。它拥有自身可能未来的心灵图像，其部分有时确实会因放弃成人力量、换取婴儿的无力感而感到恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is as if you could consciously come to terms with each of your own cells and become aware, in your terms, of their future and their past. This traveling- through obviously changes the nature of the moment points. It is, again, action working within itself. The time element, as you understand it, hardly exists.
quotes.translation: 仿佛你能有意识地与自己的每个细胞达成和解，并觉察到它们的未来与过去——以你们的时间概念而言。这种穿越显然改变了"当下点"的本质。这又是行动在自身内部运作。你们所理解的时间要素几乎不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The psyche knows itself and is aware of its parts. When ego consciousness reached a certain point of biological and mental competence, when experience in the present became extensive enough, then ego consciousness would be at the stage where it could begin to accept greater data. Indeed, it is now at that stage.
quotes.translation: 心灵认识自身，并觉察其各个部分。当自我意识达到生物与心智能力的某个临界点，当当下的经验足够丰富时，自我意识便进入能够开始接纳更宏大数据的阶段。事实上，它此刻正处在这个阶段。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In one way, on one level, such a personality seems to be operating "blind," while in another it is aware of its accomplishments and challenges. Often a situation of unbalance is set up that would not exist had the personality not accepted the challenges and, hence, the potentials for an even greater development.
quotes.translation: 从某个层面看，这种人格似乎在"盲目"运作；而从另一层面看，它却清楚自己的成就与挑战。常常会出现一种失衡状态——若非人格接受了挑战及其蕴含的更大发展潜能，这种失衡本不会存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (11:38. Now Jane came through with several pages of material for herself. Some of it was quite personal, but one part consisted of Seth's response to an assessment she'd written after supper tonight, wherein she examined her progress since the inauguration of her psychic abilities late in 1963. Seth, here, adds to our understanding of Jane's reactions to some of the challenges she took up 11 years ago. His material is also an extension of much that he gave in the 679th session for Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, when he discussed the early background of the probable Jane who chose to live in this physical reality, and how that Jane began to contend with her strongly mystical nature. See especially Note 8 for Session 679, and Appendix 1.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The subconscious merely is aware of, and operates within, a very valid psychological perspective, with which the so-called conscious self is not familiar. Before physical construction can occur therefore, psychological perception, manipulation and construction of inner data or inner structures must be performed.
quotes.translation: 潜意识仅仅觉察并运作于一个非常有效的心理视角中，而所谓的显意识自我对此并不熟悉。因此，在物质构建发生之前，必须完成对内在数据或内在结构的心理感知、操控与构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is aware of itself as the smallest seed, both those that grow and those that do not grow. The personality of this gestalt is beyond comprehension at this point. It is both demanding and compassionate. The word, justice, is a human one, always implying punishment. And it has nothing to do with the God concept.
quotes.translation: 它觉察自身如同最微小的种子——无论那些会生长的还是不会生长的。这种完形的人格在此刻已超乎理解。它既严苛又慈悲。"正义"一词是人类的概念，总暗含惩罚之意，与神之概念毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The source and the power of your present consciousness is not and has never been physical, and where I am many are not even aware that such a physical system exists. You have chosen your own illusion, and so you must accept it, and from its viewpoint must you try to understand the realities that exist beyond it.
quotes.translation: 你当前意识的源头与力量从来不是物质的，也从未是物质的。在我所在之处，许多存在甚至不知道存在这样一个物质系统。你选择了自己的幻象，因此必须接受它，并必须从其视角出发，去理解超越其外的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: His observations were not complete enough, for there are changes occurring now that he did not perceive. Therefore he did not project them into these other times. The becoming self grows more and more aware of its own portions, and of these various aspects of time in which these portions are or will be focused.
quotes.translation: 他的观察并不够完整，因为现在正在发生一些他未能感知的变化。因此他没有将这些变化投射到其他时间中。正在形成的自己对自身的各个部分越来越有觉知，也对这些部分所在或将要聚焦的时间的各个面向越来越有觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Again, this is not symbolic. Only by the use of the inner senses can you obtain a viewpoint that is to some extent free of your own system. The inner self realizes the nature of its own reality, is sure of its identity and well aware of its power in the creation of actions which it projects outward from itself.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非象征性的说法。只有通过内在感官，你才能获得某种程度脱离自身系统的视角。内在自己认识到自身实相的本质，确信自己的身份，并清楚知道自己在向外投射的行动创造中所拥有的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: When you let your attention waver, however, you may often fall into a state in which you momentarily perceive glimpses of another alternate present. The whole self, the soul, knows of its reality in all such systems, and you, as a part of it, are working toward the same state of self-awareness and development.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你让注意力游移时，常常会陷入一种状态，在其中你瞬间瞥见另一个交替的当下。整体自己、灵魂，知晓自身在所有这类系统中的实相，而你作为它的一部分，正朝着相同的自我觉知与发展状态迈进。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is quite true that the inner ego is aware through the inner senses of any choices that the outer ego will make with the use of free will. This does not mean that decisions are in any way predetermined. It only means that the inner ego is not bound by the dimensions in which those free will choices are made.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实通过内在感官觉知到外在自我将运用自由意志做出的任何选择。这并不意味着决定在任何方面被预先注定。这只意味着内在自我不受那些自由意志选择发生的维度所束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am indeed aware of many of the events in both of your lives, but it is relatively simple for me to so acquaint myself with your situations. I am willing at any time to render whatever services I can so render, but I do not walk ghostly through your rooms; and most certainly I do not peek through the windows.
quotes.translation: 我确实觉知到你们两人生活中的许多事件，但对我来说，熟悉你们的情况相对简单。我随时愿意提供任何我能提供的服务，但我不会幽灵般穿行于你们的房间；更不会透过窗户窥视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This could lead to errors in the interpretation of the material itself. The outer senses are schooled to interpret data in rather narrow terms, and therefore are not fluent. I hope that this is cleared up, and anything else like it should be instantly brought to my attention as soon as you become aware of it.
quotes.translation: 这可能导致对资料本身的解读出现错误。外在感官被训练以相当狭隘的方式解读数据，因此不够流畅。我希望这一点已经澄清，一旦你意识到任何类似情况，应立即引起我的注意。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The subconscious in sleep has great freedom, and has at its command information gained through past experience in this life and in other lives. In the intense focus of awareness that occurs within the dream state, the inner self is able to direct all of its energies for the purpose of solving a given problem.
quotes.translation: 睡眠中的潜意识拥有极大自由，并能调取此生及前世经验所积累的信息。在梦境状态中发生的强烈觉知聚焦中，内在自体得以调动全部能量以解决特定问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 此感官如同所有内在感官，正被内在自我意识我执所运用，但外在自我不被允许沿此方向获得觉知。这些内在感官的信息经潜意识筛选后，仅将最低限度的内容传递给外在自我——且确实只是最低限度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You will have to strike a balance. Too many influences of this nature would be distracting, but some are definitely necessary; and again now, I would suggest that you invite a few congenial visitors to your home. Telepathically and through the inner senses, you pick up extremely valuable and diversified data in this manner, that is enlightening and helpful to the subconscious, and broadens the psychic base of awareness.
quotes.translation: 你必须取得平衡。过多此类性质的影响会造成干扰，但某些影响绝对必要；我再次建议你邀请几位投缘的访客到家中。通过心电感应与内在感官，你能以这种方式获取极具价值且多元的数据，这些信息既能启发并助益潜意识，又能扩展觉知的心灵基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt nicely channeled these so that they could be used with the writing ability. You have only begun to use your own psychic abilities, in line with your painting. You have had glimpses, but the two abilities will work hand in hand so that ideas for paintings will occur with greater vividness, and your hand itself will know how to get certain effects that you want, before you are consciously aware of how this is done.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏巧妙疏导这些能量使其与写作能力结合。你才刚刚开始运用自身的心灵能力来配合绘画创作。你虽已瞥见端倪，但两种能力将携手并进——在你尚未有意识地知晓如何达成之前，绘画灵感会以更鲜活的姿态涌现，你的手自会知晓如何获得想要的效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego's false ideas prevent it from accepting this energy, but once the ego is aware of its position as a portion of the self, then it should not be shunted aside, but can take its place. It is sometimes referred to almost as if it stood entirely outside of basic reality. It is, of course, within it also.
quotes.translation: 我执的错误观念使其拒绝接纳此能量，但一旦我执意识到自身作为自体一部分的定位，就不应被弃置一旁，而应各安其位。它有时被描述得仿佛完全独立于基本实相之外——实则它也在实相之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that as you create physical reality you also form the other planes of existence in which you operate. You do operate simultaneously within all levels of reality and if you become familiar with various coordinates, the self that you know could become aware of your own other existences.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，当你创造物质实相时，也同时构建了你运作其中的其他存在层面。你确实同时运作于所有实相层面，若你熟悉各种坐标，你所知的这个自体就能觉察到自身的其他存在形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In this section, therefore, I have outlined various experiments or exercises for the reader. These will certainly lead you to form your own versions of the exercises given, or will open your mind so that spontaneously, in your own way, you become aware of events that were literally invisible to you before.
quotes.translation: 因此，在本节中，我为读者概述了各种实验或练习。这些练习无疑会引导你形成自己版本的练习，或开启你的心智，使你自发地以自己的方式意识到那些之前对你而言完全不可见的事件。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now, in the normal course of events you attract experience in the same fashion. You anticipate events. You are aware of them before they happen, whether or not you ever succeed in conscious predictions. You form your life, however, through the intimate interworkings of your own conscious goals and beliefs.
quotes.translation: 现在，在事件的常规进程中，你以同样的方式吸引经验。你预知事件。无论你是否成功进行有意识的预测，你在它们发生之前就已意识到它们。然而，你通过自身有意识目标与信念的紧密交织来塑造你的人生。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They simply appear to be different. As a rule the ego is not aware of its departure from one physical organism and its growth into another. This is a projection. The years of growth, as I have told you, are illusion. Value fulfillment is the law of the universe, and it appears as growth within your system.
quotes.translation: 它们只是看似不同。通常，自我并未意识到它从一个物理有机体离开并进入另一个物理有机体。这是一种投射。如我所告诉你的，成长的岁月是幻相。价值完成是宇宙的法则，它在你的系统内表现为成长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are only aware of any such changes when your present conscious attention is directed at any object or event. Objects or events known to you in your past still exert their pressures upon you even as your own effect still changes them. The same holds true for what you would term future objects or events.
quotes.translation: 只有当你的当前有意识注意力指向任何物体或事件时，你才会意识到任何此类变化。你过去所知的物体或事件仍对你施加压力，正如你自身的影响仍在改变它们。这同样适用于你所谓的未来物体或事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are operating at a rather high level of awareness, and you are using inner senses. These enable you to perceive an added depth or dimension, and this is responsible for the increased sense of vividness, and also for the sense of exhilaration that sometimes occurs within this particular sort of dream.
quotes.translation: 你正以相当高的意识层次运作，并且你在使用内在感官。这些感官使你能够感知到额外的深度或维度，这导致了增强的生动感，以及有时在这种特定梦境中出现的振奋感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: States of mind are not permanent. Their reflections upon the system are not permanent, generally speaking, though they can be cumulative. It is much easier to pass through such periods if names are not given to symptoms, and many people pass through many so-called diseases without ever being aware of it.
quotes.translation: 心境并非永久不变。一般来说，它们在系统上的反映也不是永久的，尽管它们可能累积。如果不给症状命名，就更容易度过这样的时期，而许多人经历了许多所谓的疾病却从未意识到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: On your plane such transformations are carried on without the awareness of the ego with which you are familiar, and therefore other mechanisms become necessary. On some planes the inner senses are the only senses, because all other necessities vanish since the inner senses function at greatest capacity.
quotes.translation: 在你们的层面上，这类转化是在你们所熟悉的自我意识未察觉的情况下进行的，因此其他机制变得必要。在某些层面上，内在感官是唯一的感官，因为所有其他需求都消失了，内在感官以最大能力运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This will make sense to you as you contemplate it. It is true that these constructions take place on a subconscious level, but to the degree that you realize what you are doing, they will become more comprehensible to the intellect, until full awareness of the origin of physical matter would be reached.
quotes.translation: 当你思考这一点时，它会变得有意义。这些构建确实发生在潜意识层面，但当你意识到自己在做什么时，它们对理智来说会变得更加可理解，直到完全意识到物质实相的起源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are many portions of the self, as you know. They do assume a form that is visible within their own dimension. These portions of the self are all simultaneous; in various stages of consciousness you become aware of other portions of the self, and an I identifies itself with one or another of these.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，自我有许多部分。它们确实会在自己的维度内呈现可见的形态。这些自我的部分都是同时存在的；在不同的意识阶段，你会意识到自我的其他部分，而一个“我”会与其中之一认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You can hold within your conscious attention far more data than you realize. You have hypnotized yourselves into believing that your awareness is highly limited.
quotes.translation: 你可以在意识注意中容纳比你所意识到的多得多的数据。你们催眠了自己，相信自己的觉知是高度受限的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: "You have a relationship not only unique, the two of you, but one that also serves as a springboard for creativity. You have talents and abilities that carry with them satisfactions that you both often blithely take for granted: They are so a part of your existences that you are not even aware of them.
quotes.translation: “你们不仅拥有独特的关系，而且这种关系还充当了创造力的跳板。你们拥有的才能和能力带来了满足感，而你们常常轻率地视之为理所当然：它们如此成为你们存在的一部分，以至于你们甚至没有意识到它们。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: NOTES: SESSION 805
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: They learn from you almost through a process of osmosis. Dimly through many cycles of such activities, they become aware of the existence of conceptual thought. At the same time they support you. The capsule comprehension within them will evolve more and more toward the direction of conscious endeavor.
quotes.translation: 他们几乎通过渗透过程向你们学习。经过许多这样的活动周期，他们模糊地意识到概念性思维的存在。同时他们支持着你们。他们内在的胶囊理解将越来越朝着有意识努力的方向进化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When a clairvoyant event is perceived the data is received by the mind and given to the brain, which then interprets it as it does usual data. The physical body becomes aware of it in other words, but the senses have been bypassed.
quotes.translation: 当感知到超视事件时，数据被心智接收并传递给大脑，大脑随后像处理常规数据一样对其进行解读。换言之，肉体变得意识到这一事件，但感官被绕过了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We will later discuss the nature of mass reality, but for now we are dwelling upon the personal aspects. The main point I wanted to make in this chapter was that your conscious beliefs are extremely important, and that you are not at the mercy of events or causes that dwell far beneath your awareness.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后将讨论大众实相的本质，但目前我们专注于个人层面。本章我想强调的主要观点是，你的意识信念极为重要，你并非受制于深藏于你觉知之下的事件或起因。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the same way you also carry within you structures not yet fully used; those organizations point -- in your terms now -- toward future evolution. Use of the spacious mind involves these. Individuals through all the ages have experienced this other kind of awareness, though never to its fullest form.
quotes.translation: 同样地，你内在也携带着尚未完全使用的结构；这些组织——以你们现在的说法——指向未来的进化。运用广阔心智便涉及这些结构。历代个体都体验过这种其他类型的觉知，尽管从未达到其最完整的形式。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience, or any mystical experience, is sometimes apt to put you in touch with what may seem to you to be a future self. This self of course, again, always existed. The inner self has the ability to delve beneath all your camouflage data to perceive these other reality systems. For the fullest development however these perceptions must be made conscious. Even the ego must become aware of them.
quotes.translation: 迷幻体验或任何神秘体验，有时容易让你接触到看似未来自我的存在。当然，这个自我始终存在。内在自我有能力深入所有伪装数据之下，去感知这些其他实相系统。然而，为了最充分的发展，这些感知必须被意识化。甚至自我也必须意识到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Once more, your personality is creative and constructive even when it is tuned to a destructive trend. Therefore more than is normal you must be aware of this problem. The very fact that the images were so solid and real, and so vested with physical attributes shows how strong your aggressions were.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，你的人格具有创造性和建设性，即便它调谐至破坏性趋势时也是如此。因此，你必须比平常更意识到这个问题。这些影像如此坚实真实、如此具备物质属性这一事实，恰恰显示你的攻击性有多强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Man tried to form a new realm, attain a different kind of focus and awareness. His consciousness turned a corner outside of itself. To do this he concentrated less and less upon inner reality, and therefore began the process of inner reality only as it was projected outward into the physical world.
quotes.translation: 人类试图构建一个新领域，获得一种不同的焦点和觉知。他的意识在自身之外转了个弯。为此，他越来越不关注内在实相，因此只将内在实相投射到外在物质世界时才开始其过程。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you will remember what you know of the trance state, you are for example in a light trance, able to maintain awareness of yourself, your environment and your place in it. You simply behave somewhat differently, not bestirring yourself in any direction unless the suggestion to do so be given you.
quotes.translation: 如果你记得自己对出神状态的了解，例如在轻度出神中，你能维持对自身、环境及所处位置的觉知。你只是行为略有不同，除非受到暗示引导，否则不会主动朝任何方向行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inwardness is individualized. This is the rule. There is no unindividualized energy. There is no energy that is not to some extent aware of itself; having sought and achieved expression through physical form in one way or another, it is not satisfied but forever seeks more complicated gestalts.
quotes.translation: 内在性是个体化的。这是法则。不存在非个体化的能量。不存在某种程度不觉知自身的能量；它通过物质形式以各种方式寻求并达成表达后，仍不满足，永远在追寻更复杂的完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In your present daily life the same process continues. Most of these dreams are very disconnected from the ego, and will seldom be recalled. The self who pursues these divergent paths is actual however. These are legitimate projections. They represent systems of reality of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 在你当前的日常生活中，同样的过程仍在继续。这些梦境大多与自我极度脱节，极少被忆起。然而，追寻这些分岔路径的自我是真实存在的。这些是合法的投射。它们代表着你尚未觉知的实相系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is an obviously intimate relationship between each cell and another. There is a constant give-and-take and grouping of awareness within the body's own miraculous corporeal structure. Your idea of reality and its experience is much different than that of any cell, yet each is interconnected.
quotes.translation: 每个细胞与其他细胞之间显然存在亲密关系。在身体自身奇迹般的物质结构中，存在着持续的给予与接收以及觉知的集群。你对实相及其体验的看法与任何细胞截然不同，但每个细胞又彼此相连。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As you are not aware of many so-called realities with which your own cat is familiar, so you are completely unaware of other universes that coexist with your own. Your outer senses are equipped to perceive your own camouflage patterns. They are not equipped to deal with other camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 正如你对自己猫咪所熟悉的许多所谓实相毫无觉知，你也完全意识不到与你的宇宙共存的其他宇宙。你的外在感官被设计用来感知自身的伪装模式。它们无法处理其他伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The conscious self does not perceive, or the so-called conscious self does not perceive, the equally valid dream constructions. You will discover that the whole self is composed of many so-called conscious selves. But neither of those conscious selves are aware of the existence of the others.
quotes.translation: 意识自我无法感知——或所谓的意识自我无法感知——同样有效的梦境建构。你会发现，整体自我由许多所谓的意识自我组成。但这些意识自我彼此间都未觉知到对方的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: There is a constant interaction in the plant, between its parts, that you do not perceive. The leaves now present are biologically valid, interrelating in your terms. Yet in time terms each leaf is also aware of the past history of the plant, and biologically they spring up from that "past."
quotes.translation: 植物各部分之间存在一种你无法察觉的持续互动。当前呈现的叶片在生物学上是有效的，以你们的时间观念相互关联。然而从时间角度而言，每片叶子也知晓植物的过往历史，并在生物学意义上从那个"过去"中萌发出来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The solution may or may not be given to the consciousness. In many instances this would not be necessary. The inner ego of which we have spoken is the director of such unifying activities, and while the inner ego is mainly concerned with inner reality, it is also aware of physical existence.
quotes.translation: 解决方案可能给予意识，也可能不给予。在许多情况下这并无必要。我们所说的内在自我正是这类统一活动的指挥者，虽然内在自我主要关注内在实相，但它也知晓物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: They were highly impressed. They did not, however, see through Bernard's real meaning. Van Over did senseit. He has some abilities of his own, incidentally, of which he is not aware. When Ruburt is completely healed his health will be exuberant--not a halfway thing. It is his way. (Amused.
quotes.translation: 他们深受震撼，却未能看穿伯纳德的真实意图。范·欧佛确实察觉到了。顺便一提，他自身拥有一些尚未察觉的能力。当鲁柏完全康复时，他的健康将蓬勃焕发——绝非半途而废的状态。这是他的方式。（带着笑意）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (On page 6, see my notes in the third paragraph before Session 423.

quotes.text: One of Ruburt's little prize perceptions was his realization that you see, or are aware of, only your own idea constructions. Basically each individual inhabits a completely different world. We will carry this further.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏一个精妙的小领悟是：你只能看见或意识到自己的观念建构。基本上每个个体都栖居于完全不同的世界。我们将进一步探讨这点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If you say that the personality cannot take any choice of which the entity is not aware, then this is true; but it is also true that the entity is utterly incapable of changing that choice made by the personality, even though the entity knows about the choice ahead of time, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 若说人格无法做出本体不知晓的任何选择，这确实成立；但同样真实的是，本体完全无法改变人格所做的选择，即便本体可以说事先知晓这个选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It plays hopscotch in and out of reality. It is gone sometimes and you are not aware of it. On such occasions your attention is focused elsewhere, in what you might call mini-dreams or hallucinations, or associative and intuitive processes of thought that go quite beyond normal focus.
quotes.translation: 它在实相内外玩跳房子游戏。有时它会消失，而你毫无察觉。在这种时刻，你的注意力集中在别处——那些可称为迷你梦境或幻觉，或是远超正常聚焦范围的联想性与直觉性思维过程。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the terms that you can understand (underlined), all species that you are aware of (underlined) appeared more or less at once, because the mental patterns had peaked (gesturing). Their vitality was strong enough to form differentiation and cooperation within the framework of matter.
quotes.translation: 以你们所能理解的措辞来说，你们所知的所有物种几乎是同时出现的，因为心智模式已经达到巅峰。它们的活力足够强大，能在物质框架内形成分化与合作。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Practically speaking however there are usually only three. Your own fourth-dimensional personality structure obviously operates constantly. One of the main purposes and goals of the whole self is to become aware of all such existences, and to correlate them into an identity structure.
quotes.translation: 然而实际上通常只有三个。你们自己的第四维人格结构显然在持续运作。整体自我的主要目的和目标之一，就是觉察所有此类存在，并将它们整合成一个身份结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, you see, when you paint a picture you use your physical body as a tool to create your inner idea. When you create physical matter you are not aware of doing so, but you affect energy directly in such an execution, your own attention being focused primarily in the physical system.
quotes.translation: 你看，当你作画时，你运用肉体作为工具来创造内在意念。当你创造物质实相时，你并未觉察自己正在这样做，但你在执行过程中直接影响了能量，而你的注意力主要聚焦在物质系统中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This concept is hardly a new one. It is not a generally accepted theory, but it has ancient roots. When you carry the waking I into the dream state, this is one approach to this different consciousness. There is also an opening up that can occur in the waking condition. When this occurs the inner and outer egos merge. The outer ego recognizes its own duties, but it is aware that more is involved.
quotes.translation: 这个概念并非新创。它并非普遍接受的理论，却有着古老的根源。当你将清醒的自我带入梦境状态，这便是接近这种不同意识的一种途径。在清醒状态下也可能发生一种开启。当这种开启发生时，内在与外在自我会融合。外在自我认知到自身的职责，但也觉察到有更多层面牵涉其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: On leaving the dream state, he becomes more and more aware of the ego, and creates then activities which have meaning to it. In the deep dream state the inner purposes are more involved. As I have mentioned however, all dream symbols have meanings to all portions of the personality.
quotes.translation: 离开梦境状态后，他越来越觉察到自我，并创造出对它有意义的活动。在深层梦境状态中，内在目的则更深入参与。然而如我先前所述，所有梦境象征对人格的所有部分都具有意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Other portions of yourself, therefore, of which you are not consciously aware, do inhabit what you could call a supersystem of reality in which consciousness learns to handle and perceive much stronger concentrations of energy, and to construct "forms" of a different nature indeed.
quotes.translation: 因此，你自身中那些你并未有意识觉察的部分，确实栖居于你可称之为实相的超系统中，在那里意识学习处理并感知更强烈的能量凝聚，并构建出性质截然不同的"形态"。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you have done this often enough so that you are intimately aware of the contrast, you will have a subjective feeling, a point of knowing within yourself, that will clearly indicate to you how your consciousness feels when it is at its finest point of focus in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 当你反复进行这种练习，直到能深切体会到对比时，你内心会产生一种主观感受、一种了知点，它会清晰地向你表明：当你的意识处于物质实相中最精微的聚焦点时，它究竟是何等感受。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Those that do not presently combine to form a complicated strong identity-pattern （hyphen） nevertheless still maintain the need for value fulfillment. By helping to form into charged emotional patterns, they share in a certain kind of awareness fulfillment otherwise denied to them.
quotes.translation: 那些尚未结合成复杂强大身份模式（连字符）的存在，依然保持着价值完成的需求。通过协助形成带电的情感模式，它们得以分享某种意识完成的体验——否则这种体验将被它们拒之门外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All animal gods hint of various experiments and species in which consciousness took different forms, in which the birth of egotistical awareness as you know it tried several areas of exploration. There were, for example, different versions of man-animal comprehension and activity.
quotes.translation: 所有动物神祇都暗示着各种实验与物种形态：在这些形态中，意识采取了不同形式；你所认知的自我意识诞生，曾尝试过多种探索领域。例如，曾存在过不同版本的人兽理解与活动模式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 689
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now, in primary constructions, a consciousness, usually fully aware and alert, adopts a form -- not his "native" one -- and consciously projects it, often into another level of reality. Even this is a rather complicated endeavor, and one seldom used for purposes of communication.
quotes.translation: 在初级建构中，一个通常完全清醒警觉的意识会采用非其"原生"形态，并有意识地投射它——往往投射到另一层实相中。即便如此，这仍是相当复杂的尝试，且极少用于沟通目的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will have no doubt noticed that these inner senses all represent actual inner abilities. I am rather surprised that Ruburt hit upon this one at this time, as it is usually a rather difficult ability to attain. He went along with it, which is very good, but he didn't sustain it long enough so that he could distinguish the other tissue capsules which came within his own extended awareness.
quotes.translation: 你无疑已注意到，这些内在感官都代表着真实的内在能力。鲁柏此刻能触及这一点令我颇感惊讶，因为这通常是相当难以掌握的能力。他顺应了这种体验（这非常好），但未能持续足够久，以至于无法分辨那些进入他扩展意识范围内的其他组织囊。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The one self that he recognizes is the only part of himself of which he is presently aware. Other facets of consciousness available to him, and a part of his greater nature, appear foreign, or "not-self," or "beyond self," because of the focus of selectivity as it now operates.
quotes.translation: 他所认知的那个自我，只是他目前能意识到的自身的一部分。其他可触及的意识面向——作为他更伟大本性的一部分——因当前运作的选择性聚焦，显得陌生、如同"非我"或"超越自我"。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The inner ego has access, again, to a much vaster amount of knowledge. It is aware not only of its own private position, as you are of yours, but it is also familiar with the mass events of its reality. It is intimately involved in the creation of your own private experience.
quotes.translation: 内在自我同样能获取更广博的知识。它不仅知晓自身私密状态（如同你了解自己的状态），也熟悉其所在实相中的群体事件。它深度参与着你个人经验的创造过程。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 823, FEBRUARY 27, 1978
9:43 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You may have experiences through all of the inner senses but not at once. This is a great simplification. What I should perhaps add for the sake of clearness is that you will not as a rule be aware of data that comes to you through more than one sense, inner sense, at a time.
quotes.translation: 你或许能通过所有内在感官获得体验，但无法同时进行。为清晰起见，或许该补充说明：通常情况下，你不会同时意识到来自多个感官（包括内在感官）的信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now I am speaking generally. Again, there are exceptions where memory is retained, but as a rule ghosts and apparitions are not any more aware of their effect upon others than you are when you appear quite unconsciously as ghosts in worlds that would be quite strange to you.
quotes.translation: 此处我作概括性论述。虽然存在记忆保留的例外情况，但一般而言，鬼魂与幻影对自己影响他人的程度，并不比你无意中作为鬼魂出现在陌生世界时更清楚。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The experience did involve several experiments that he was making without, of course, conscious knowledge. Several lessons may also be learned from this. The inner self is well aware of its innate capabilities in certain directions, and directs its efforts along these lines.
quotes.translation: 这次经历确实涉及他无意识中进行的几项实验。从中亦可汲取若干教训。内在自我清楚知晓自身在特定方向的天赋能力，并会沿此方向引导自身努力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As you know however, it is almost impossible for you to be aware of the full perceptions possible, for the ego would never stand for it. Oftentimes, even in simple dreams, you feel concepts, you understand a particular piece of information, without a word having been spoken.
quotes.translation: 但如你所知，你几乎不可能意识到所有可能的感知，因为自我无法承受。即便在简单梦境中，你常能无需言语便感知概念、理解特定信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Generally speaking, the psyche has the same kind of instant overall comprehension of psychological events and environments as your body has of physical ones. It is then aware of your overall psychological climate locally, as it involves you personally, and in world terms.
quotes.translation: 一般而言，心灵对心理事件与环境的即时整体理解，如同身体对物理环境的感知。它既知晓你个人层面的本地心理气候，也通晓全球层面的心理气候。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In some trance stages however, you may become aware of these generic patterns, you see, project them outward, and think you are perceiving some strange apparition. This kind of experience could take place immediately before a projection, you see, though this is not usual.
quotes.translation: 然而在某些出神阶段，你可能会意识到这些通用模式，你看，将它们向外投射，并以为自己正感知到某种奇异幻象。这种体验可能发生在投射之前，你看，尽管这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (Very slowly at 11:18:) The conscious mind is an excellent perceiving attribute, a function that belongs to inner awareness but in this case is turned outward toward the world of events. Through the conscious mind the soul looks outward. Left alone, it perceives clearly.
quotes.translation: （11:18分极缓慢地：）意识心是一种卓越的感知属性，一种属于内在觉知的功能，但在此情况下它转向外在，朝向事件的世界。通过意识心，灵魂向外观看。若不受干扰，它便能清晰感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In all religions, those that you did not officially adopt in your society, what you would think of as the female religions predominated. Those people did not progress in industrial terms because they were too well aware of their part in nature. They could not dissect it.
quotes.translation: 在所有宗教中，那些你们社会未正式采纳的、你们视为阴性宗教的信仰曾占主导地位。那些民族在工业方面没有进步，因为他们太清楚自己在自然中的位置。他们无法剖析自然。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You will learn to manipulate and control various levels of awareness, and the habit will carry over into other aspects of reality. With continued development you will be able to keep appointments and pass information in the dream state, and have your records to prove it.
quotes.translation: 你将学会操控与掌握不同层次的觉知，这种习惯会延续到实相的其他面向。随着持续发展，你将能在梦境状态中赴约并传递信息，并有记录为证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: These various stages of consciousness and fluctuations of psychic activity can also be examined through direct experience from the waking state. In the following chapter we will let you become more aware of these ever-active portions of your own reality. End of chapter.
quotes.translation: 这些不同的意识阶段与心灵活动的波动，也可通过清醒状态下的直接体验来检视。在下一章中，我们将让你更清楚地意识到自己实相中这些始终活跃的部分。本章结束。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your dream3 you were, of course, in the process of forming new ideas about the nature of the magical self (through my art) and also in your way working that idea out through imagery. The dream is above all an example of "work" being done at other levels of awareness.
quotes.translation: 在你的梦3中，你当然正在形成关于神奇自性本质的新观念（通过我的艺术），同时也以你的方式通过意象来运作那个观念。这个梦首先是“工作”在其他觉知层面进行的例证。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: A part of the whole self is quite aware of the probabilities. Now. This is a portion of the self that exists as a perceiving participator, in the dimension which we discussed in our last session. This is fairly difficult material, and so I am giving it to you carefully.
quotes.translation: 整体自性的某部分相当清楚这些可能性。现在。这是自性的一部分，它作为感知的参与者存在于我们上次课讨论的那个维度中。这是相当困难的材料，所以我正在仔细地把它传递给你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Even in reincarnation for example, an ego who experienced a Civil War life is now aware of another ego who may have experienced life in the year three thousand. Within the earthly cycle, such knowledge is not transmitted to the physical brain, but it is always known.
quotes.translation: 例如，即使在转世中，一个经历过内战生活的自我，现在也意识到另一个可能经历过公元三千年生活的自我。在世俗的循环中，这种知识不会传递给物质大脑，但它始终被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is merely an analogy but it will explain your body's concept of itself; for as a whole it knows it "dies," as now its portions do, but is also aware of its "future" transformation. Within this framework it protects and maintains its own stability and survival.
quotes.translation: 这仅仅是一个类比，但它将解释你的身体对自身的概念；因为作为一个整体，它知道自己会"死亡"，就像现在它的部分会死亡一样，但它也意识到自己的"未来"转化。在这个框架内，它保护并维持自身的稳定和生存。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are personalities however to whom it is highly alien. It must be interpreted. Using concepts, I can relate my understanding of your time pattern to others clairvoyantly. Other portions of my entity are aware of it, by a process of mental osmosis, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 然而，有些人格对此感到非常陌生。它必须被诠释。运用概念，我可以通过千里眼将我对你时间模式的理解传达给其他人。可以说，我实体的其他部分通过一种精神渗透的过程意识到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The nature of reality can only be approached by an investigation of reality as it is directly experienced in all levels of awareness: reality as it appears under dream conditions, under other conditions of dissociation, and as it appears in the waking condition.
quotes.translation: 实相的本质只能通过直接体验所有意识层面的实相来探究：在梦境条件下显现的实相，在其他解离条件下显现的实相，以及在清醒状态下显现的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The information was perceived through the inner senses, and though Ruburt is not consciously aware of the dream's importance the inner self has assimilated the knowledge. He will most likely have several other dreams of this nature within a short period of time.
quotes.translation: 这些信息是通过内在感官感知的，尽管鲁柏并未有意识地意识到这个梦的重要性，但内在自性已经吸收了这些知识。他很可能会在短时间内再做几个类似性质的梦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: Let us make a clear distinction here: Your conscious beliefs direct the flow of unconscious processes which bring your ideas into physical reality, so while your thoughts cause your experience, you are not consciously aware of how this takes place (forcefully).
quotes.translation: 让我们在此明确区分：你有意识的信念引导着无意识过程的流向，这些过程将你的想法带入物质实相，因此，虽然你的思想导致了你的体验，但你并未有意识地觉察到这是如何发生的（强烈地）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner self is obviously not only conscious, but conscious of itself, both as an individuality apart from others, and as an individuality that is a part of all other consciousness.In your terms it is continually aware, both of this apartness and unity-with.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然不仅具有意识，而且能意识到自身，既作为与他人分离的个体性，也作为所有其他意识的一部分的个体性。用你们的说法，它持续觉察着这种分离与合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now this is what you attempt when you experiment with psychological time, when your communication comes through the inner rather than the outer senses. And all living consciousness initially enter your plane of awareness by route of such a mental enclosure.
quotes.translation: 现在，这就是你们在尝试心理时间时所做的事，当你们的沟通通过内在而非外在感官进行时。所有活着的意识最初都是通过这样一种心智围场进入你们的觉知层面的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Dictation: You experience yourself in a certain way topside, so to speak, and so in order to take advantage of information at other levels of awareness, you must learn to experience those other organizational systems with which you are usually unfamiliar.
quotes.translation: 口授：你们在表层以某种方式体验自己，可以这么说，因此为了利用其他觉知层面的信息，你们必须学会体验那些通常不熟悉的组织系统。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is legitimate, but without the strange mixture of discipline and freedom already achieved in these sessions, such awareness would not be possible at all, and certainly this is something you will have to work at. It is not instantaneous by any means.
quotes.translation: 这是合理的，但如果没有这些课程中已经达成的纪律与自由的奇特混合，这种觉知根本不可能实现，当然这是你们必须努力的事情。它绝非一蹴而就。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind will benefit greatly as it becomes more and more aware of its directing influence upon events. It will no longer fear the emotions, or the body, as threatening or unpredictable, but sense the greater unity in which it is involved.
quotes.translation: 有意识的心智将大大受益，因为它越来越觉察到它对事件的引导性影响。它将不再恐惧情绪或身体，视其为威胁或不可预测，而是感受到它所参与的更大合一。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You have by now become acquainted with a self you did not know before our sessions, a self who keeps watch upon both the ego and the subconscious. This is no longer theory to you, for you are practically aware of the self in an ever-growing fashion.
quotes.translation: 如今你已逐渐认识了一个在课程开始前你并不知晓的自我——这个自我同时观照着自我意识与潜意识。这已不再是理论，因为你正以日益增长的方式实际觉察到这个自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The girl worked in a shoe store in 1938. Your mother, I believe, was aware of this or mentioned it to you at the time. (Pause.) The fox is a strong connection here. An address, perhaps 428. This may be a Fox Street, to the outside area of town...
quotes.translation: 这个女孩在1938年曾在一家鞋店工作。我相信你的母亲当时知晓此事，或曾向你提及。（停顿）狐狸在此处有强烈关联。一个地址，或许是428号。这可能是通往城镇外围区域的狐狸街……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I also participate to some degree, personally, in your system during our sessions. There is no need for Ruburt to feel uneasy when I speak in a different guise. That other portion has gone a different way, but we, are aware of our relationship.
quotes.translation: 在课程期间，我个人也在某种程度上参与你们的系统。当我以不同面貌说话时，鲁柏无需感到不安。那个其他部分已走上不同道路，但我们知晓彼此的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now: There are basically no limitations to the self, and all portions of the self are connected -- so the probable selves are aware, unconsciously, of their relationships.
quotes.translation: 现在：自我本质上没有限制，自我的所有部分都相互关联——因此可能性自我在潜意识层面知晓它们的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I can perceive many other systems similar to your own. I cannot with any ease or facility enter into them in any familiar manner however, to experience camouflage as you do. (Pause.) This does not mean of course that I am not aware of you.
quotes.translation: 我能感知许多与你们系统相似的其它系统。但我无法像你们那样轻松自如地以熟悉方式进入其中体验伪装。（停顿）这当然不意味着我无法觉察你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There was however a telepathic connection. The present personality of our visitor was aware of the sessions before Philip mentioned them. I expect that the association will continue. The number fifteen is an important one to our visitor.
quotes.translation: 然而存在心电感应连接。在菲利普提及课程之前，我们访客的当前人格就已觉察到这些课程。我预期这种关联将持续。数字十五对我们的访客很重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This process is carried out unconsciously, and yet if mankind follows through then he will become consciously aware of his own part in this continual creation of matter, and he will be able to continue in a much more intelligent manner.
quotes.translation: 这个过程是在无意识中进行的，然而如果人类坚持到底，他就会开始有意识地觉察到自己在这持续的物质创造中所扮演的角色，并能以更明智的方式继续下去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In answer to your question, Joseph: both you and Ruburt were subconsciously aware of the Instreams' location, and it was for this reason that you chose the photograph of York Beach, though you did not consciously realize the connection.
quotes.translation: 回答你的问题，约瑟：你和鲁柏都潜意识地觉察到了“内流”的位置，正因如此，你们选择了约克海滩的照片，尽管你们并未有意识地意识到其中的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am still waiting for the day when you become aware of your own dreams while you are awake, and conscious at the same time, fully, of your physical environment, and able to operate normally at the same time in the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 我仍在等待那一天：当你清醒时能觉察到自己的梦境，同时完全意识到物质环境，并能正常地在物质宇宙中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Indeed. Remember, this is your entire identity of which we are speaking. It is only you who are presently aware of but one portion of it; and this portion you insist upon calling yourself. You are the self who makes these decisions.
quotes.translation: 确实。记住，我们谈论的是你完整的身份。你目前只觉察到其中的一部分，却执意将这一部分称为自己。你正是做出这些决定的那个自己。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are aware of such activities now as automatic speaking and automatic writing, and of sleepwalking. These all give signs in modern times of some very important evidence in man's early relationship with the world and with himself.
quotes.translation: 你现在已觉察到自动说话、自动书写和梦游这类活动。这些在现代都提供了重要证据，显示人类早期与世界及自身的关联。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This portion is conscious, aware, alert. It is you, so focused in physical reality, who do not listen to its voice, who do not understand that it is the great psychological strength from which your physically oriented self springs.
quotes.translation: 这一部分是清醒的、觉察的、警觉的。正是你——如此聚焦于物质实相的你——没有倾听它的声音，没有理解它是你物质导向自我所源自的伟大心理力量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In all probability you will become aware of me first either in a dream projection or in a session. The book you are reading will help you both. It can hardly cover very many points, but it is generally legitimate as far as it goes.
quotes.translation: 你极有可能先通过梦境投射或课程感知到我。你正在读的这本书对两者都有助益。它虽无法涵盖所有要点，但就其涉及的范围而言基本可靠。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To a certain extent what you are was latent in the fetus, but there is no one point when "the full awareness of the soul enters into the flesh." The process is gradual. In physical terms it begins before your own parents are born.
quotes.translation: 从某种程度上说，你现在的状态在胎儿时期就已潜藏，但"灵魂的完整觉知进入肉身"并不存在某个特定时刻。这是一个渐进的过程。从物质层面而言，这个过程始于你父母尚未出生之时。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A more powerful connection exists, you see, now; and this means you have reached, as you are well aware, somewhat beyond the personality by which I usually make myself known to you. Even if I continue to speak, end the trance.
quotes.translation: 你看，现在存在着更强大的连接；这意味着你已超越了我通常用以显现的人格层面——这一点你心知肚明。即使我继续说话，也请结束出神状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It does not know whether or not others like it may exist. It is not aware of them if they do exist. It is constantly searching. It knows that something existed before its own primary dilemma, when it could not express itself.
quotes.translation: 它不知道是否有其他同类存在。即便存在，它也浑然不觉。它不断搜寻着。它知道在自身最初的两难困境之前——当它无法表达自己时——曾存在过某种东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As hinted, there have been all kinds of species of animal-man, and man-animal, of which your sciences are not aware, and bones found thought to form, say, a man and an animal that were from the same creature. Afgastan --
quotes.translation: 如先前暗示，曾存在过各种动物-人类与人类-动物的物种，你们的科学对此一无所知。那些被认为分属人类与动物的骨骼，实则源自同一生物。阿夫加斯坦——
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This particular individual was quite aware of what would occur, on what you would call an unconscious basis. He was not predestined to die. He chose both the time, in your terms, and the method, for reasons of his own.
quotes.translation: 这个特定个体完全清楚将会发生什么——在你们所谓的无意识层面。他并非注定要死亡。出于自身原因，他既选择了时间（按你们的说法），也选择了方式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They cannot be consciously aware of each other. Now the ego interprets all it perceives mainly in terms of its self. Other portions of the self, also self-conscious, interpret what they perceive in terms of themselves.
quotes.translation: 它们无法有意识地觉察彼此。自我主要根据自身来诠释它所感知的一切。自我的其他部分——同样具有自我意识——则根据自身来诠释它们所感知的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You create them both waking and sleeping, although you are not aware of them in the waking state. You constantly project and constantly emit energy in meaningful patterns on as many layers of activity as possible.
quotes.translation: 你在清醒与睡眠状态中都创造它们，尽管在清醒时你并未觉察到它们。你持续投射并持续以有意义的模式在尽可能多的活动层面上发射能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, while it is basically true that the personality is composed of action, and that its very awareness and identity is a result of action--
quotes.translation: 现在，虽然人格由行动组成，且其觉察力与身份认同本身就是行动的结果——这基本上是真实的——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, both systems exist in actuality. Usually you only perceive your own. Ruburt turned off his usual focus of perception. He focused it differently, and so saw an image of which he would normally not be aware.
quotes.translation: 现在，两种系统都实际存在。通常你只感知到自己的系统。鲁柏关闭了他惯常的感知焦点，以不同的方式聚焦，于是看到了他通常不会觉察到的影像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: All experience as I have told you is basically simultaneous, and the dreaming self is simply aware of its experiences in their entirety.
quotes.translation: 正如我告诉过你们的，所有经验在本质上都是同时发生的，而做梦的自我只是完整地觉察到它的所有经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I am not telling you to inhibit thoughts or feelings. I am asking that you become aware of those you have. Realize that they form your reality. Concentrate upon those that give you the results that you want.
quotes.translation: 我并非要你压抑思想或感受。我是要你觉察到你所拥有的那些思想与感受。认识到它们形成了你的实相。专注于那些能带给你想要结果的思想与感受。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There will be a rather sudden change of fortune, of which Ruburt is well aware. It is not immediate, but it is inevitable with the publication of the book, and he fears having money, even though he wants it.
quotes.translation: 运势将出现相当突然的转变，鲁柏对此心知肚明。这并非即刻发生，但随着书籍出版已成必然，他既渴望金钱又恐惧拥有它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You are not aware of how the body performs its many involuntary functions. The conscious mind could not handle all that data, but those functions perfectly mirror your consciously held ideas and beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你们并未觉察身体如何执行诸多非自主功能。意识心无法处理所有数据，但这些功能完美映照出你们有意识持有的想法与信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You have put yourselves in a position where your consciousness must now become aware of the probable pasts and probable futures, in order to form for yourselves a sane, fulfilling, and creative present.
quotes.translation: 你们已将自己置于必须觉察可能性的过去与可能性的未来的境地，以便为自身构建一个健全、充实且富有创造力的当下。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: As awareness develops, so do the abilities develop that enable the whole self to handle ever-varying data, and therefore to manipulate it and function within the perspective of its meaning. There are--
quotes.translation: 随着觉察力的发展，能力也随之发展，使整体自我能够处理不断变化的数据，从而操控数据并在其意义视角中运作。另有——

quotes.text: And speaking of matter, I am aware that Ruburt picked up a book on the nature of matter, which is to the good. You are both expected to keep up intellectually, and I am pleased that you are doing so.
quotes.translation: 说到物质，我注意到鲁柏拿起了一本关于物质本质的书，这很好。你们两人都应保持知识上的跟进，我很高兴你们正在这样做。

quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is not aware of the Jesuit's messages, but Seth is. The Jesuit sent the information he picked up from this woman telepathically, about the character and nature of Dr. Rhine and his foundation.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏并未觉察到耶稣会士的信息，但赛斯觉察到了。那位耶稣会士通过心灵感应传递了从这位女士处获取的信息，内容涉及莱恩博士及其基金会的性格与本质。

quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is not that the inner self is not aware of all of this, but that it has already chosen a framework, or a given frame of existence, that emphasizes certain kinds of experience over others.
quotes.translation: 并非内在自己不觉察这一切，而是它已选择了一个框架，或某个特定的存在架构，强调某些经验类型而非其他。

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: (2nd Question: What does the big A refer to?" "I do not know. A large A impression. Whether it is symbolic or literal I am not aware." The meaning is symbolic, and Seth explains after break.
quotes.translation: （第二个问题：大写的A指什么？"我不知道。一个大写的A印象。是象征性的还是字面性的，我不清楚。"）其含义是象征性的，赛斯在休息后解释。

quotes.text: In the waking state the whole self is focused toward physical reality. In the dreaming state the whole self is focused within a different dimension. It is every bit as conscious and aware.
quotes.translation: 在清醒状态，整个自己聚焦于物质实相。在梦境状态，整个自己聚焦于另一个维度。它同样具有意识和觉察。

quotes.text: I wanted this evening to discuss these matters, since you have both been concerned with them. I am aware of the work done on the book so far, and find that it is indeed quite remarkable.
quotes.translation: 我今晚想讨论这些事，因为你们两人都对此关注。我觉察到迄今为止在书上所做的工作，并发现它确实相当卓越。

quotes.text: When CU's operate as waves, however, they do not set up any boundaries about their own self-awareness--and when operating as waves CU's can indeed be in more than one place at one time.
quotes.translation: 然而，当CU以波的形式运作时，它们不会对自己的自我觉察设定任何界限——而当以波的形式运作时，CU确实可以同时存在于多个地方。

quotes.text: ... You have a whole self, a multidimensional self of which your present personality is a small part. It is your responsibility to expand your awareness , to utilize these abilities...
quotes.translation: ……你有一个完整的自己，一个多维度自己，你当前的人格只是其中一小部分。扩展你的觉察、运用这些能力是你的责任……

quotes.text: This is not necessarily the best analogy, but I wanted to make the point that various scales of awareness contain their own infinities, no matter how finite they may appear to be.
quotes.translation: 这未必是最恰当的比喻，但我想强调的是，无论各种意识层面看似多么有限，它们都包含着自身的无限性。

source_raw.title: SESSION 740
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There are multitudinous physical constructions in the space between these two chairs, of which you are not aware, because you cannot perceive the perspective in which they occur.
quotes.translation: 在这两把椅子之间的空间里，存在着无数你尚未察觉的物理构造，因为你无法感知它们所发生的视角。

quotes.text: The false beliefs must be weeded out so that the conscious mind can become aware of its source once again, and open to the inner channels of splendor and power available to it.
quotes.translation: 必须清除虚假信念，使意识心能够重新觉察到它的源头，并向内在的辉煌与力量通道敞开。

quotes.text: It is not a simple matter to explain life conditions as you know them, so it is extremely difficult to discuss the complexities of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 解释你所知的生命状况并非易事，因此讨论你尚未察觉的复杂性更是极其困难。

quotes.text: -energy is within and behind all universes and all planes and all fields, it is indeed aware of each sparrow that falls, for it is each sparrow that falls.
